  push:
    branches: [main]
  pull_request:

jobs:
  smoke-tests:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Run PowerShell smoke suite
        shell: pwsh
        run: |
          ./tests/run-tests.ps1


====================================================================================================
FILE: .github/workflows/deploy-vercel.yml
CATEGORY: workflow
====================================================================================================
name: Deploy To Vercel

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
  push:
    branches: [main]

jobs:
  deploy:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Node
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: 20

      - name: Install Vercel CLI
        run: npm install --global vercel@latest

      - name: Pull Vercel environment metadata
        run: vercel pull --yes --environment=production --token=${{ secrets.VERCEL_TOKEN }}

      - name: Build
        run: vercel build --prod --token=${{ secrets.VERCEL_TOKEN }}

      - name: Deploy prebuilt output
        run: vercel deploy --prebuilt --prod --token=${{ secrets.VERCEL_TOKEN }}

FILE: advanced-biomechanics-engine.js
CATEGORY: script
====================================================================================================
// ============================================================================
// ADVANCED BIOMECHANICS METRICS ENGINE
// SmartSwing AI - Professional Tennis Analysis
// ============================================================================

/**
 * Advanced Biomechanics Calculator
 * Generates 20+ professional-grade metrics from MoveNet keypoints
 */

class BiomechanicsEngine {
  constructor() {
    this.KEYPOINT = {
      NOSE: 0,
      LEFT_EYE: 1, RIGHT_EYE: 2,
      LEFT_EAR: 3, RIGHT_EAR: 4,
      LEFT_SHOULDER: 5, RIGHT_SHOULDER: 6,
      LEFT_ELBOW: 7, RIGHT_ELBOW: 8,
      LEFT_WRIST: 9, RIGHT_WRIST: 10,
      LEFT_HIP: 11, RIGHT_HIP: 12,
      LEFT_KNEE: 13, RIGHT_KNEE: 14,
      LEFT_ANKLE: 15, RIGHT_ANKLE: 16
    };
    
    this.pixelsToMeters = 0.01; // Calibrated per video
    this.courtReference = null;
    this.history = [];
  }

  // ============================================================================
  // 1. CALIBRATION & SETUP
  // ============================================================================
  
  /**
   * Auto-calibrate using player height
   */
  calibrate(keypoints) {
    const shoulder = this.getKeypoint(keypoints, this.KEYPOINT.RIGHT_SHOULDER);
    const ankle = this.getKeypoint(keypoints, this.KEYPOINT.RIGHT_ANKLE);
    
    if (shoulder && ankle) {
      const heightPixels = Math.abs(shoulder.y - ankle.y);
      const estimatedTorsoHeight = 0.9; // meters
      this.pixelsToMeters = estimatedTorsoHeight / heightPixels;
      console.log(`ðŸ“ Calibrated: ${this.pixelsToMeters.toFixed(4)} m/pixel`);
      return true;
    }
    return false;
  }

  /**
   * Manual calibration using court lines
   */
  calibrateWithCourtLines(point1, point2, realDistance) {
    const pixelDistance = this.distance(point1, point2);
    this.pixelsToMeters = realDistance / pixelDistance;
    console.log(`ðŸ“ Manual calibration: ${this.pixelsToMeters.toFixed(4)} m/pixel`);
  }

  // ============================================================================
  // 2. CORE GEOMETRY FUNCTIONS
  // ============================================================================
  
  getKeypoint(keypoints, index, minConfidence = 0.3) {
    const kp = keypoints[index];
    if (!kp) return null;
    const conf = kp.score ?? kp.confidence ?? 0;
    return conf >= minConfidence ? kp : null;
  }

  distance(a, b) {
    const dx = b.x - a.x;
    const dy = b.y - a.y;
    return Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy);
  }

  midpoint(a, b) {
    return { 
      x: (a.x + b.x) / 2, 
      y: (a.y + b.y) / 2 
    };
  }

  vector(from, to) {
    return { 
      x: to.x - from.x, 
      y: to.y - from.y 
    };
  }

  magnitude(v) {
    return Math.sqrt(v.x * v.x + v.y * v.y);
  }

  normalize(v) {
    const mag = this.magnitude(v);
    return mag > 0 ? { x: v.x / mag, y: v.y / mag } : { x: 0, y: 0 };
  }

  dot(u, v) {
    return u.x * v.x + u.y * v.y;
  }

  cross2D(u, v) {
    return u.x * v.y - u.y * v.x;
  }

  /**
   * Calculate angle at point B in triangle A-B-C
   */
  angle3Points(A, B, C) {
    const u = this.vector(B, A);
    const v = this.vector(B, C);
    
    const dot = this.dot(u, v);
    const magU = this.magnitude(u);
    const magV = this.magnitude(v);
    
    if (magU === 0 || magV === 0) return null;
    
    const cosAngle = Math.max(-1, Math.min(1, dot / (magU * magV)));
    return Math.acos(cosAngle) * (180 / Math.PI);
  }

  /**
   * Signed angle between vectors (for rotation)
   */
  signedAngle(u, v) {
    const cross = this.cross2D(u, v);
    const dot = this.dot(u, v);
    return Math.atan2(cross, dot) * (180 / Math.PI);
  }

  /**
   * Wrap angle to -180 to 180 range
   */
  wrapAngle(angle) {
    while (angle > 180) angle -= 360;
    while (angle < -180) angle += 360;
    return angle;
  }

  // ============================================================================
  // 3. BODY SEGMENT CALCULATIONS
  // ============================================================================
  
  /**
   * Get body midpoints
   */
  getBodyMidpoints(keypoints) {
    const leftShoulder = this.getKeypoint(keypoints, this.KEYPOINT.LEFT_SHOULDER);
    const rightShoulder = this.getKeypoint(keypoints, this.KEYPOINT.RIGHT_SHOULDER);
    const leftHip = this.getKeypoint(keypoints, this.KEYPOINT.LEFT_HIP);
    const rightHip = this.getKeypoint(keypoints, this.KEYPOINT.RIGHT_HIP);
    
    const shoulderMid = (leftShoulder && rightShoulder) ? 
      this.midpoint(leftShoulder, rightShoulder) : null;
    const hipMid = (leftHip && rightHip) ? 
      this.midpoint(leftHip, rightHip) : null;
    
    return { shoulderMid, hipMid };
  }

  /**
   * Calculate Center of Mass (COM) proxy
   */
  getCOM(keypoints) {
    const { shoulderMid, hipMid } = this.getBodyMidpoints(keypoints);
    if (!shoulderMid || !hipMid) return null;
    
    // Weighted average (hips carry more mass)
    return {
      x: 0.4 * shoulderMid.x + 0.6 * hipMid.x,
      y: 0.4 * shoulderMid.y + 0.6 * hipMid.y
    };
  }

  /**
   * Determine dominant side (right/left handed)
   */
  getDominantSide(keypoints) {
    const rightShoulder = this.getKeypoint(keypoints, this.KEYPOINT.RIGHT_SHOULDER);
    const rightElbow = this.getKeypoint(keypoints, this.KEYPOINT.RIGHT_ELBOW);
    const rightWrist = this.getKeypoint(keypoints, this.KEYPOINT.RIGHT_WRIST);
    
    const leftShoulder = this.getKeypoint(keypoints, this.KEYPOINT.LEFT_SHOULDER);
    const leftElbow = this.getKeypoint(keypoints, this.KEYPOINT.LEFT_ELBOW);
    const leftWrist = this.getKeypoint(keypoints, this.KEYPOINT.LEFT_WRIST);
    
    const rightScore = (rightShoulder?.score || 0) + (rightElbow?.score || 0) + (rightWrist?.score || 0);
    const leftScore = (leftShoulder?.score || 0) + (leftElbow?.score || 0) + (leftWrist?.score || 0);
    
    return rightScore >= leftScore ? 'right' : 'left';
  }

  // ============================================================================
  // 4. JOINT ANGLES
  // ============================================================================
  
  /**
   * Calculate all joint angles
   */
  calculateJointAngles(keypoints) {
    const side = this.getDominantSide(keypoints);
    const angles = {};
    
    // Shoulder, elbow, wrist indices based on dominant side
    const shoulderIdx = side === 'right' ? this.KEYPOINT.RIGHT_SHOULDER : this.KEYPOINT.LEFT_SHOULDER;
    const elbowIdx = side === 'right' ? this.KEYPOINT.RIGHT_ELBOW : this.KEYPOINT.LEFT_ELBOW;
    const wristIdx = side === 'right' ? this.KEYPOINT.RIGHT_WRIST : this.KEYPOINT.LEFT_WRIST;
    const hipIdx = side === 'right' ? this.KEYPOINT.RIGHT_HIP : this.KEYPOINT.LEFT_HIP;
    const kneeIdx = side === 'right' ? this.KEYPOINT.RIGHT_KNEE : this.KEYPOINT.LEFT_KNEE;
    const ankleIdx = side === 'right' ? this.KEYPOINT.RIGHT_ANKLE : this.KEYPOINT.LEFT_ANKLE;
    
    const shoulder = this.getKeypoint(keypoints, shoulderIdx);
    const elbow = this.getKeypoint(keypoints, elbowIdx);
    const wrist = this.getKeypoint(keypoints, wristIdx);
    const hip = this.getKeypoint(keypoints, hipIdx);
    const knee = this.getKeypoint(keypoints, kneeIdx);
    const ankle = this.getKeypoint(keypoints, ankleIdx);
    
    // Elbow angle: shoulder-elbow-wrist
    if (shoulder && elbow && wrist) {
      angles.elbow = this.angle3Points(shoulder, elbow, wrist);
    }
    
    // Shoulder angle: hip-shoulder-elbow
    if (hip && shoulder && elbow) {
      angles.shoulder = this.angle3Points(hip, shoulder, elbow);
    }
    
    // Knee angle: hip-knee-ankle
    if (hip && knee && ankle) {
      angles.knee = this.angle3Points(hip, knee, ankle);
    }
    
    // Hip angle: shoulder-hip-knee
    if (shoulder && hip && knee) {
      angles.hip = this.angle3Points(shoulder, hip, knee);
    }
    
    return angles;
  }

  // ============================================================================
  // 5. ROTATION & ORIENTATION
  // ============================================================================
  
  /**
   * Calculate hip rotation relative to reference
   */
  calculateHipRotation(keypoints, referenceAxis = { x: 1, y: 0 }) {
    const leftHip = this.getKeypoint(keypoints, this.KEYPOINT.LEFT_HIP);
    const rightHip = this.getKeypoint(keypoints, this.KEYPOINT.RIGHT_HIP);
    
    if (!leftHip || !rightHip) return null;
    
    const hipLine = this.vector(leftHip, rightHip);
    return this.signedAngle(referenceAxis, hipLine);
  }

  /**
   * Calculate shoulder rotation
   */
  calculateShoulderRotation(keypoints, referenceAxis = { x: 1, y: 0 }) {
    const leftShoulder = this.getKeypoint(keypoints, this.KEYPOINT.LEFT_SHOULDER);
    const rightShoulder = this.getKeypoint(keypoints, this.KEYPOINT.RIGHT_SHOULDER);
    
    if (!leftShoulder || !rightShoulder) return null;
    
    const shoulderLine = this.vector(leftShoulder, rightShoulder);
    return this.signedAngle(referenceAxis, shoulderLine);
  }

  /**
   * Calculate X-Factor (hip-shoulder separation)
   */
  calculateXFactor(keypoints, referenceAxis = { x: 1, y: 0 }) {
    const hipRotation = this.calculateHipRotation(keypoints, referenceAxis);
    const shoulderRotation = this.calculateShoulderRotation(keypoints, referenceAxis);
    
    if (hipRotation === null || shoulderRotation === null) return null;
    
    const separation = this.wrapAngle(shoulderRotation - hipRotation);
    return Math.abs(separation);
  }

  /**
   * Calculate trunk tilt/lean
   */
  calculateTrunkTilt(keypoints) {
    const { shoulderMid, hipMid } = this.getBodyMidpoints(keypoints);
    if (!shoulderMid || !hipMid) return null;
    
    const spine = this.vector(hipMid, shoulderMid);
    const vertical = { x: 0, y: -1 }; // Assuming y increases downward
    
    return this.angle3Points(
      { x: hipMid.x, y: hipMid.y - 100 },
      hipMid,
      shoulderMid
    );
  }

  // ============================================================================
  // 6. VELOCITY & SPEED
  // ============================================================================
  
  /**
   * Calculate point velocity between frames
   */
  calculateVelocity(currentPos, previousPos, timeDelta) {
    if (!currentPos || !previousPos || timeDelta === 0) return null;
    
    const dx = currentPos.x - previousPos.x;
    const dy = currentPos.y - previousPos.y;
    const distPixels = Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy);
    const distMeters = distPixels * this.pixelsToMeters;
    
    const speedMS = distMeters / timeDelta;
    const speedMPH = speedMS * 2.237;
    const speedKPH = speedMS * 3.6;
    
    return {
      ms: speedMS,
      mph: speedMPH,
      kph: speedKPH,
      direction: Math.atan2(dy, dx) * (180 / Math.PI)
    };
  }

  /**
   * Calculate angular velocity
   */
  calculateAngularVelocity(currentAngle, previousAngle, timeDelta) {
    if (currentAngle === null || previousAngle === null || timeDelta === 0) return null;
    
    let diff = currentAngle - previousAngle;
    diff = this.wrapAngle(diff);
    
    return diff / timeDelta; // degrees per second
  }

  /**
   * Calculate racquet head speed (wrist proxy)
   */
  calculateRacquetSpeed(keypoints, previousKeypoints, timeDelta) {
    const side = this.getDominantSide(keypoints);
    const wristIdx = side === 'right' ? this.KEYPOINT.RIGHT_WRIST : this.KEYPOINT.LEFT_WRIST;
    
    const wrist = this.getKeypoint(keypoints, wristIdx);
    const prevWrist = previousKeypoints ? this.getKeypoint(previousKeypoints, wristIdx) : null;
    
    if (!wrist || !prevWrist) return null;
    
    return this.calculateVelocity(wrist, prevWrist, timeDelta);
  }

  // ============================================================================
  // 7. STABILITY & BALANCE
  // ============================================================================
  
  /**
   * Calculate head stability
   */
  calculateHeadStability(keypoints, window = 10) {
    const nose = this.getKeypoint(keypoints, this.KEYPOINT.NOSE);
    if (!nose) return null;
    
    this.history.push(nose);
    if (this.history.length > window) {
      this.history.shift();
    }
    
    if (this.history.length < 3) return null;
    
    // Calculate variance
    const avgX = this.history.reduce((sum, p) => sum + p.x, 0) / this.history.length;
    const avgY = this.history.reduce((sum, p) => sum + p.y, 0) / this.history.length;
    
    const variance = this.history.reduce((sum, p) => {
      const dx = p.x - avgX;
      const dy = p.y - avgY;
      return sum + (dx * dx + dy * dy);
    }, 0) / this.history.length;
    
    return {
      variance,
      stability: Math.max(0, 100 - variance), // Higher is better
      displacement: Math.sqrt(variance) * this.pixelsToMeters * 100 // cm
    };
  }

  /**
   * Calculate COM stability
   */
  calculateCOMStability(keypoints, window = 10) {
    const com = this.getCOM(keypoints);
    if (!com) return null;
    
    // Similar to head stability but for COM
    // Implementation similar to above
    return { stable: true }; // Simplified for now
  }

  /**
   * Calculate balance score
   */
  calculateBalanceScore(keypoints) {
    const leftAnkle = this.getKeypoint(keypoints, this.KEYPOINT.LEFT_ANKLE);
    const rightAnkle = this.getKeypoint(keypoints, this.KEYPOINT.RIGHT_ANKLE);
    const com = this.getCOM(keypoints);
    
    if (!leftAnkle || !rightAnkle || !com) return null;
    
    // COM should be between ankles for good balance
    const baseWidth = Math.abs(rightAnkle.x - leftAnkle.x);
    const comOffset = Math.abs(com.x - (leftAnkle.x + rightAnkle.x) / 2);
    
    const balanceRatio = 1 - (comOffset / (baseWidth / 2));
    return Math.max(0, Math.min(100, balanceRatio * 100));
  }

  // ============================================================================
  // 8. KINEMATIC CHAIN SEQUENCING
  // ============================================================================
  
  /**
   * Detect kinematic sequence timing
   */
  analyzeKinematicChain(velocityHistory) {
    // Find peaks in velocity for: hips â†’ shoulders â†’ elbow â†’ wrist
    const peaks = {
      hip: this.findPeak(velocityHistory.hip),
      shoulder: this.findPeak(velocityHistory.shoulder),
      elbow: this.findPeak(velocityHistory.elbow),
      wrist: this.findPeak(velocityHistory.wrist)
    };
    
    const delays = {
      hipToShoulder: peaks.shoulder - peaks.hip,
      shoulderToElbow: peaks.elbow - peaks.shoulder,
      elbowToWrist: peaks.wrist - peaks.elbow
    };
    
    // Ideal sequence: positive delays (proximal to distal)
    const properSequence = delays.hipToShoulder > 0 && 
                          delays.shoulderToElbow > 0 && 
                          delays.elbowToWrist > 0;
    
    return {
      peaks,
      delays,
      properSequence,
      efficiency: properSequence ? 100 : 50
    };
  }

  findPeak(values) {
    if (!values || values.length === 0) return -1;
    let maxIdx = 0;
    let maxVal = values[0];
    
    for (let i = 1; i < values.length; i++) {
      if (values[i] > maxVal) {
        maxVal = values[i];
        maxIdx = i;
      }
    }
    
    return maxIdx;
  }

  // ============================================================================
  // 9. ADVANCED METRICS
  // ============================================================================
  
  /**
   * Calculate contact point quality
   */
  calculateContactPoint(keypoints) {
    const side = this.getDominantSide(keypoints);
    const wristIdx = side === 'right' ? this.KEYPOINT.RIGHT_WRIST : this.KEYPOINT.LEFT_WRIST;
    const hipIdx = side === 'right' ? this.KEYPOINT.RIGHT_HIP : this.KEYPOINT.LEFT_HIP;
    
    const wrist = this.getKeypoint(keypoints, wristIdx);
    const hip = this.getKeypoint(keypoints, hipIdx);
    
    if (!wrist || !hip) return null;
    
    // Contact should be in front of body
    const inFront = side === 'right' ? wrist.x > hip.x : wrist.x < hip.x;
    const distance = Math.abs(wrist.x - hip.x) * this.pixelsToMeters * 100; // cm
    
    // Optimal distance: 25-45 cm in front
    const optimal = distance >= 25 && distance <= 45;
    
    return {
      inFront,
      distance,
      optimal,
      quality: optimal ? 100 : Math.max(0, 100 - Math.abs(distance - 35) * 2)
    };
  }

  /**
   * Calculate power generation score
   */
  calculatePowerGeneration(metrics) {
    let score = 0;
    let count = 0;
    
    // X-Factor contribution (30-50Â° is optimal)
    if (metrics.xFactor !== null) {
      const xFactorScore = metrics.xFactor >= 30 && metrics.xFactor <= 50 ? 100 :
                          Math.max(0, 100 - Math.abs(metrics.xFactor - 40) * 2);
      score += xFactorScore;
      count++;
    }
    
    // Knee drive (lower = more power)
    if (metrics.knee !== null) {
      const kneeScore = metrics.knee >= 145 && metrics.knee <= 165 ? 100 :
                       Math.max(0, 100 - Math.abs(metrics.knee - 155));
      score += kneeScore;
      count++;
    }
    
    // Racquet speed
    if (metrics.maxSpeed !== null) {
      // Assume 85 mph is good for intermediate
      const speedScore = Math.min(100, (metrics.maxSpeed / 85) * 100);
      score += speedScore;
      count++;
    }
    
    return count > 0 ? score / count : null;
  }

  /**
   * Calculate efficiency score
   */
  calculateEfficiency(metrics) {
    let score = 100;
    
    // Deduct for poor kinematic sequence
    if (metrics.kinematicChain && !metrics.kinematicChain.properSequence) {
      score -= 20;
    }
    
    // Deduct for poor balance
    if (metrics.balance !== null && metrics.balance < 70) {
      score -= (70 - metrics.balance) * 0.5;
    }
    
    // Deduct for head instability
    if (metrics.headStability && metrics.headStability.displacement > 5) {
      score -= metrics.headStability.displacement;
    }
    
    return Math.max(0, Math.min(100, score));
  }

  // ============================================================================
  // 10. COMPREHENSIVE ANALYSIS
  // ============================================================================
  
  /**
   * Analyze single frame - returns all metrics
   */
  analyzeFrame(keypoints, previousKeypoints = null, timeDelta = 1/30) {
    const metrics = {};
    
    // Basic joint angles
    const angles = this.calculateJointAngles(keypoints);
    Object.assign(metrics, angles);
    
    // Rotation metrics
    metrics.hipRotation = this.calculateHipRotation(keypoints);
    metrics.shoulderRotation = this.calculateShoulderRotation(keypoints);
    metrics.xFactor = this.calculateXFactor(keypoints);
    metrics.trunkTilt = this.calculateTrunkTilt(keypoints);
    
    // Speed metrics
    if (previousKeypoints) {
      metrics.racquetSpeed = this.calculateRacquetSpeed(keypoints, previousKeypoints, timeDelta);
      metrics.maxSpeed = metrics.racquetSpeed?.mph || null;
    }
    
    // Stability metrics
    metrics.headStability = this.calculateHeadStability(keypoints);
    metrics.balance = this.calculateBalanceScore(keypoints);
    
    // Contact point
    metrics.contactPoint = this.calculateContactPoint(keypoints);
    
    // Derived metrics
    metrics.powerGeneration = this.calculatePowerGeneration(metrics);
    metrics.efficiency = this.calculateEfficiency(metrics);
    
    return metrics;
  }

  /**
   * Analyze sequence of frames - returns aggregated metrics
   */
  analyzeSequence(framesData) {
    const aggregated = {
      angles: { shoulder: [], elbow: [], hip: [], knee: [] },
      speeds: [],
      xFactors: [],
      balance: [],
      headStability: []
    };
    
    framesData.forEach((frame, idx) => {
      const prevFrame = idx > 0 ? framesData[idx - 1] : null;
      const timeDelta = prevFrame ? frame.timestamp - prevFrame.timestamp : 1/30;
      
      const metrics = this.analyzeFrame(frame.keypoints, prevFrame?.keypoints, timeDelta);
      
      // Aggregate
      if (metrics.shoulder !== null) aggregated.angles.shoulder.push(metrics.shoulder);
      if (metrics.elbow !== null) aggregated.angles.elbow.push(metrics.elbow);
      if (metrics.hip !== null) aggregated.angles.hip.push(metrics.hip);
      if (metrics.knee !== null) aggregated.angles.knee.push(metrics.knee);
      if (metrics.maxSpeed !== null) aggregated.speeds.push(metrics.maxSpeed);
      if (metrics.xFactor !== null) aggregated.xFactors.push(metrics.xFactor);
      if (metrics.balance !== null) aggregated.balance.push(metrics.balance);
    });
    
    // Calculate summary statistics
    return {
      avgAngles: {
        shoulder: this.avg(aggregated.angles.shoulder),
        elbow: this.avg(aggregated.angles.elbow),
        hip: this.avg(aggregated.angles.hip),
        knee: this.avg(aggregated.angles.knee)
      },
      maxSpeed: this.max(aggregated.speeds),
      avgSpeed: this.avg(aggregated.speeds),
      maxXFactor: this.max(aggregated.xFactors),
      avgXFactor: this.avg(aggregated.xFactors),
      avgBalance: this.avg(aggregated.balance),
      consistency: {
        shoulderStdDev: this.stdDev(aggregated.angles.shoulder),
        elbowStdDev: this.stdDev(aggregated.angles.elbow)
      }
    };
  }

  // Helper statistics functions
  avg(arr) {
    return arr.length > 0 ? arr.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0) / arr.length : null;
  }

  max(arr) {
    return arr.length > 0 ? Math.max(...arr) : null;
  }

  stdDev(arr) {
    if (arr.length < 2) return null;
    const mean = this.avg(arr);
    const variance = arr.reduce((sum, val) => sum + Math.pow(val - mean, 2), 0) / arr.length;
    return Math.sqrt(variance);
  }
}

// ============================================================================
// USAGE EXAMPLE
// ============================================================================

/*
// Initialize
const bioEngine = new BiomechanicsEngine();

// Calibrate on first frame
bioEngine.calibrate(firstFrameKeypoints);

// Analyze each frame
const metrics = bioEngine.analyzeFrame(currentKeypoints, previousKeypoints, timeDelta);

console.log('Metrics:', {
  elbow: metrics.elbow,
  xFactor: metrics.xFactor,
  speed: metrics.maxSpeed,
  balance: metrics.balance,
  power: metrics.powerGeneration
});

// Or analyze entire sequence
const summary = bioEngine.analyzeSequence(allFrames);
console.log('Summary:', summary);
*/

// Export for use in modules
if (typeof module !== 'undefined' && module.exports) {
  module.exports = BiomechanicsEngine;
}


====================================================================================================
FILE: analytics.js
CATEGORY: script
====================================================================================================
(function () {
  const COOKIE_KEY = 'smartswing_cookie_preferences_v1';

  window.va = window.va || function () {
    (window.vaq = window.vaq || []).push(arguments);
  };

  function hasAnalyticsConsent() {
    try {
      const prefs = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(COOKIE_KEY) || 'null');
      return Boolean(prefs?.analytics);
    } catch (error) {
      return false;
    }
  }

  function loadVercelAnalytics() {
    if (window.__smartSwingVercelAnalyticsLoaded) return;
    if (!hasAnalyticsConsent()) return;
    const script = document.createElement('script');
    script.defer = true;
    script.src = '/_vercel/insights/script.js';
    script.onload = () => { window.__smartSwingVercelAnalyticsLoaded = true; };
    document.head.appendChild(script);
  }

  if (document.readyState === 'loading') {
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', loadVercelAnalytics);
  } else {
    loadVercelAnalytics();
  }

  window.addEventListener('smartswing:cookies-updated', loadVercelAnalytics);
})();

  <script>
    console.log('ðŸŽ¾ SmartSwing AI - MoveNet 17-Point Version');
    
    // Global State
    const playerProfile = {
      gender: null,
      age: null,
      level: null,
      shots: [],
      videoFile: null,
      sessionMode: 'stroke-tune-up',
      sessionGoal: '',
      setupScore: 100
    };

    const store = window.SmartSwingStore;
    const currentUser = store ? store.getCurrentUser() : null;
    let cachedPlanState = null;

    let currentStep = 1;
    let detector = null;
    let backend = 'unknown';
    let isAnalyzing = false;
    let rafId = null;
    let analysisTimeoutId = null;
    let lastPersistedSignature = null;
    let aiInitInFlight = null;
    let activeVideoUrl = null;
    let lastFrameAt = 0;
    let aiInitStage = 'idle';
    let detectorLabel = 'Not initialized';
    let lastAnalyzedVideoTime = -1;
    let lastStableKeypoints = [];
    let lastMetricKeypoints = [];
    let lastUiRefreshAt = 0;
    let lastAngleUiRefreshAt = 0;
    let lastDrawAt = 0;
    let videoFrameCallbackId = null;
    let analysisInputCanvas = null;
    let analysisInputContext = null;
    let analysisInFlight = false;

    const AI_SETTINGS = {
      libraryTimeoutMs: 30000,
      backendTimeoutMs: 20000,
      detectorTimeoutMs: 50000,
      metadataTimeoutMs: 20000,
      poseFpsCap: 10,
      fallbackPoseFpsCap: 12,
      litePoseFpsCap: 10,
      fullPoseFpsCap: 8,
      cpuMoveNetFpsCap: 12,
      maxStoredFrames: 1800,
      uiRefreshMs: 90,
      angleUiRefreshMs: 110,
      drawRefreshMs: 70,
      minKeypointConfidence: 0.18,
      smoothingAlpha: 0.68,
      carryForwardDecay: 0.92,
      analysisInputMaxSide: 288,
      minPoseMotionPx: 3.5
    };

    const analysisData = {
      frames: [],
      angles: {
        shoulder: [],
        elbow: [],
        hip: [],
        knee: [],
        trunk: [],
        wrist: []
      },
      derivedMetrics: {
        shoulderTilt: [],
        hipTilt: [],
        stanceWidth: [],
        contactHeight: [],
        reach: [],
        balance: [],
        alignmentGap: [],
        footworkLoad: []
      },
      landmarks: [],
      confidence: []
    };

    function withTimeout(promise, timeoutMs, label) {
      return Promise.race([
        promise,
        new Promise((_, reject) => {
          setTimeout(() => reject(new Error(`${label} timed out after ${timeoutMs}ms`)), timeoutMs);
        })
      ]);
    }

    function refreshPlanStrip() {
      const strip = document.getElementById('planStrip');
      if (!strip || !store || !currentUser) {
        if (strip) strip.innerHTML = '<strong>Guest mode:</strong> Sign in to save history and track monthly usage.';
        return;
      }

      const plan = store.getCurrentPlan();
      const usage = store.canGenerateReport();
      cachedPlanState = usage;
      const limitLabel = Number.isFinite(usage.limit) ? `${usage.used}/${usage.limit}` : `${usage.used}/Unlimited`;
      const remainingLabel = Number.isFinite(usage.remaining) ? usage.remaining : 'Unlimited';
      const restrictions = [];
      if (!store.canSaveReport()) restrictions.push('Save disabled on this plan');
      if (!store.canPrintReport()) restrictions.push('Print/export disabled on this plan');

      strip.innerHTML = `
        <div><strong>Active plan:</strong> ${plan.name} | <strong>Monthly reports:</strong> ${limitLabel} used | <strong>Remaining:</strong> ${remainingLabel}</div>
        <div>${restrictions.length ? restrictions.join(' Â· ') : 'Full report actions enabled.'} <a href="./pricing.html" style="color: var(--electric-cyan); font-weight: 800;">Change plan</a></div>
        ${usage.allowed ? '' : '<div class="usage-alert">Monthly limit reached. Upgrade your plan to generate more reports.</div>'}
      `;
    }

    function applyActionPermissions() {
      const saveBtn = document.getElementById('saveBtn');
      const printBtn = document.getElementById('printBtn');
      if (!store || !currentUser) return;

      const canSave = store.canSaveReport();
      const canPrint = store.canPrintReport();

      saveBtn.disabled = !canSave;
      if (!canSave) {
        saveBtn.title = 'Upgrade plan to enable report saving.';
        saveBtn.style.opacity = '0.65';
      } else {
        saveBtn.title = '';
        saveBtn.style.opacity = '';
      }

      printBtn.disabled = !canPrint;
      if (!canPrint) {
        printBtn.title = 'Upgrade plan to enable report print/export.';
        printBtn.style.opacity = '0.65';
      } else {
        printBtn.title = '';
        printBtn.style.opacity = '';
      }
    }

    function consumeReportCreditOrAlert(shotType) {
      if (!store || !currentUser) return true;
      try {
        cachedPlanState = store.consumeMonthlyReportCredit({ shotType, source: 'analyzer-report' });
        refreshPlanStrip();
        return true;
      } catch (error) {
        alert((error.message || 'Monthly report limit reached.') + '\n\nOpen pricing to upgrade and continue.');
        window.location.href = './pricing.html';
        return false;
      }
    }

    // MoveNet 17 Keypoint Indices
    const KEYPOINT = {
      NOSE: 0,
      LEFT_EYE: 1,
      RIGHT_EYE: 2,
      LEFT_EAR: 3,
      RIGHT_EAR: 4,
      LEFT_SHOULDER: 5,
      RIGHT_SHOULDER: 6,
      LEFT_ELBOW: 7,
      RIGHT_ELBOW: 8,
      LEFT_WRIST: 9,
      RIGHT_WRIST: 10,
      LEFT_HIP: 11,
      RIGHT_HIP: 12,
      LEFT_KNEE: 13,
      RIGHT_KNEE: 14,
      LEFT_ANKLE: 15,
      RIGHT_ANKLE: 16
    };

    // MoveNet Skeleton Connections
    const POSE_CONNECTIONS = [
      [KEYPOINT.LEFT_SHOULDER, KEYPOINT.RIGHT_SHOULDER],
      [KEYPOINT.LEFT_SHOULDER, KEYPOINT.LEFT_ELBOW],
      [KEYPOINT.LEFT_ELBOW, KEYPOINT.LEFT_WRIST],
      [KEYPOINT.RIGHT_SHOULDER, KEYPOINT.RIGHT_ELBOW],
      [KEYPOINT.RIGHT_ELBOW, KEYPOINT.RIGHT_WRIST],
      [KEYPOINT.LEFT_SHOULDER, KEYPOINT.LEFT_HIP],
      [KEYPOINT.RIGHT_SHOULDER, KEYPOINT.RIGHT_HIP],
      [KEYPOINT.LEFT_HIP, KEYPOINT.RIGHT_HIP],
      [KEYPOINT.LEFT_HIP, KEYPOINT.LEFT_KNEE],
      [KEYPOINT.LEFT_KNEE, KEYPOINT.LEFT_ANKLE],
      [KEYPOINT.RIGHT_HIP, KEYPOINT.RIGHT_KNEE],
      [KEYPOINT.RIGHT_KNEE, KEYPOINT.RIGHT_ANKLE]
    ];

    const BLAZEPOSE_TO_MOVENET_INDEX = [
      0, 2, 5, 7, 8,
      11, 12, 13, 14, 15, 16,
      23, 24, 25, 26, 27, 28
    ];

    // Helpers
    function kpOk(kp, min = 0.3) {
      return kp && (kp.score ?? kp.confidence ?? 0) >= min;
    }

    function calculateAngle(a, b, c) {
      const radians = Math.atan2(c.y - b.y, c.x - b.x) - Math.atan2(a.y - b.y, a.x - b.x);
      let angle = Math.abs((radians * 180) / Math.PI);
      if (angle > 180) angle = 360 - angle;
      return Math.round(angle);
    }

    function midpoint(a, b) {
      return { x: (a.x + b.x) / 2, y: (a.y + b.y) / 2 };
    }

    function distance(a, b) {
      if (!a || !b) return null;
      return Math.hypot(safeNumber(b.x, 0) - safeNumber(a.x, 0), safeNumber(b.y, 0) - safeNumber(a.y, 0));
    }

    function clamp(value, min, max) {
      return Math.min(max, Math.max(min, value));
    }

    function average(values) {
      const list = (values || []).filter((value) => Number.isFinite(value));
      return list.length ? list.reduce((sum, value) => sum + value, 0) / list.length : null;
    }

    function roundMetric(value, digits = 0) {
      if (!Number.isFinite(value)) return null;
      const factor = 10 ** digits;
      return Math.round(value * factor) / factor;
    }

    function standardDeviation(values) {
      const list = (values || []).filter((value) => Number.isFinite(value));
      if (!list.length) return null;
      const avg = average(list);
      const variance = average(list.map((value) => (value - avg) ** 2));
      return Math.sqrt(variance);
    }

    function normalizeLevel(value) {
      const input = String(value || '').toLowerCase();
      if (input.includes('beginner')) return 'beginner';
      if (input.includes('advanced')) return 'advanced';
      if (input.includes('pro')) return 'pro';
      return 'intermediate';
    }

    function parseAgeMidpoint(value) {
      const raw = String(value || '').trim();
      if (!raw) return null;
      if (raw.includes('+')) {
        const base = Number.parseInt(raw, 10);
        return Number.isFinite(base) ? base + 5 : null;
      }
      if (raw.includes('-')) {
        const [start, end] = raw.split('-').map((part) => Number.parseInt(part, 10));
        if (Number.isFinite(start) && Number.isFinite(end)) {
          return (start + end) / 2;
        }
      }
      const direct = Number.parseInt(raw, 10);
      return Number.isFinite(direct) ? direct : null;
    }

    function formatMetricName(metric) {
      return String(metric || '')
        .replace(/([A-Z])/g, ' $1')
        .replace(/[-_]/g, ' ')
        .replace(/\s+/g, ' ')
        .trim()
        .replace(/\b\w/g, (char) => char.toUpperCase());
    }

    function calculateLineTilt(a, b) {
      if (!a || !b) return null;
      let angle = Math.abs(Math.atan2(b.y - a.y, b.x - a.x) * (180 / Math.PI));
      if (angle > 90) angle = 180 - angle;
      return roundMetric(angle);
    }

    function safeNumber(value, fallback = 0) {
      const num = Number(value);
      return Number.isFinite(num) ? num : fallback;
    }

    function getCanvasDisplaySize() {
      const canvas = document.getElementById('poseCanvas');
      if (!canvas) return { width: 1280, height: 720 };

      const width = Math.max(1, Math.round(canvas.clientWidth || 1280));
      const height = Math.max(1, Math.round(canvas.clientHeight || 720));
      return { width, height };
    }

    function syncCanvasToViewport() {
      const canvas = document.getElementById('poseCanvas');
      if (!canvas) return;
      const size = getCanvasDisplaySize();
      if (canvas.width !== size.width || canvas.height !== size.height) {
        canvas.width = size.width;
        canvas.height = size.height;
      }
    }

    function getVideoFitTransform(video, canvas) {
      const sourceWidth = Math.max(1, safeNumber(video?.videoWidth, 0) || safeNumber(canvas?.width, 1280));
      const sourceHeight = Math.max(1, safeNumber(video?.videoHeight, 0) || safeNumber(canvas?.height, 720));
      return getSourceFitTransform(sourceWidth, sourceHeight, canvas);
    }

    function getSourceFitTransform(sourceWidth, sourceHeight, canvas) {
      const targetWidth = Math.max(1, safeNumber(canvas?.width, 1280));
      const targetHeight = Math.max(1, safeNumber(canvas?.height, 720));
      const scale = Math.min(targetWidth / sourceWidth, targetHeight / sourceHeight);
      const drawWidth = sourceWidth * scale;
      const drawHeight = sourceHeight * scale;
      const offsetX = (targetWidth - drawWidth) / 2;
      const offsetY = (targetHeight - drawHeight) / 2;
      return { sourceWidth, sourceHeight, scale, offsetX, offsetY };
    }

    function getDetectorInput(video) {
      const sourceWidth = Math.max(1, safeNumber(video?.videoWidth, 0) || 1);
      const sourceHeight = Math.max(1, safeNumber(video?.videoHeight, 0) || 1);
      const maxSide = AI_SETTINGS.analysisInputMaxSide;
      const scale = Math.min(1, maxSide / Math.max(sourceWidth, sourceHeight));
      const width = Math.max(1, Math.round(sourceWidth * scale));
      const height = Math.max(1, Math.round(sourceHeight * scale));

      if (!analysisInputCanvas) {
        analysisInputCanvas = document.createElement('canvas');
        analysisInputContext = analysisInputCanvas.getContext('2d', { willReadFrequently: false, alpha: false });
      }

      if (analysisInputCanvas.width !== width || analysisInputCanvas.height !== height) {
        analysisInputCanvas.width = width;
        analysisInputCanvas.height = height;
      }

      analysisInputContext.drawImage(video, 0, 0, width, height);
      return { source: analysisInputCanvas, width, height };
    }

    function formatAngle(value) {
      return value != null ? `${value} deg` : '- deg';
    }

    function cloneKeypoints(keypoints) {
      return Array.isArray(keypoints) ? keypoints.map((kp) => ({ ...kp })) : [];
    }

    function computePoseMotion(currentKeypoints) {
      if (!Array.isArray(currentKeypoints) || currentKeypoints.length === 0) {
        lastMetricKeypoints = [];
        return 0;
      }

      if (!Array.isArray(lastMetricKeypoints) || lastMetricKeypoints.length !== currentKeypoints.length) {
        lastMetricKeypoints = cloneKeypoints(currentKeypoints);
        return 0;
      }

      let totalDistance = 0;
      let compared = 0;
      currentKeypoints.forEach((kp, index) => {
        const prev = lastMetricKeypoints[index];
        if (!kpOk(kp, AI_SETTINGS.minKeypointConfidence) || !kpOk(prev, AI_SETTINGS.minKeypointConfidence)) {
          return;
        }

        totalDistance += Math.hypot(
          safeNumber(kp.x, 0) - safeNumber(prev.x, 0),
          safeNumber(kp.y, 0) - safeNumber(prev.y, 0)
        );
        compared += 1;
      });

      lastMetricKeypoints = cloneKeypoints(currentKeypoints);
      return compared ? totalDistance / compared : 0;
    }

    function getSmoothedAngle(metricName, immediateValue) {
      const history = (analysisData.angles[metricName] || []).slice(-4);
      if (immediateValue != null) {
        history.push(immediateValue);
      }
      if (!history.length) {
        return null;
      }
      return Math.round(history.reduce((sum, value) => sum + value, 0) / history.length);
    }

    function normalizeKeypointsToMoveNet(rawKeypoints, sourceWidth = 0, sourceHeight = 0) {
      if (!Array.isArray(rawKeypoints) || rawKeypoints.length === 0) {
        return [];
      }

      const toPoint = (kp) => {
        if (!kp) return { x: 0, y: 0, score: 0 };
        let x = safeNumber(kp.x, 0);
        let y = safeNumber(kp.y, 0);
        if (sourceWidth > 2 && sourceHeight > 2 && x >= 0 && x <= 1.5 && y >= 0 && y <= 1.5) {
          x *= sourceWidth;
          y *= sourceHeight;
        }
        return {
          x,
          y,
          score: safeNumber(kp.score ?? kp.confidence ?? kp.visibility, 0)
        };
      };

      if (rawKeypoints.length <= 17) {
        return rawKeypoints.map((kp) => toPoint(kp));
      }

      return BLAZEPOSE_TO_MOVENET_INDEX.map((sourceIndex) => toPoint(rawKeypoints[sourceIndex]));
    }

    function projectKeypointsToCanvas(keypoints, transform) {
      if (!Array.isArray(keypoints) || keypoints.length === 0) return [];
      return keypoints.map((kp) => ({
        ...kp,
        x: transform.offsetX + (safeNumber(kp.x, 0) * transform.scale),
        y: transform.offsetY + (safeNumber(kp.y, 0) * transform.scale)
      }));
    }

    function stabilizeKeypoints(keypoints) {
      if (!Array.isArray(keypoints) || keypoints.length === 0) {
        return lastStableKeypoints.map((kp) => ({ ...kp }));
      }

      const stabilized = keypoints.map((kp, index) => {
        const current = {
          x: safeNumber(kp?.x, 0),
          y: safeNumber(kp?.y, 0),
          score: safeNumber(kp?.score ?? kp?.confidence ?? kp?.visibility, 0)
        };
        const previous = lastStableKeypoints[index];

        if (!previous) {
          return current;
        }

        if (current.score < AI_SETTINGS.minKeypointConfidence) {
          return {
            x: previous.x,
            y: previous.y,
            score: Math.max(current.score, previous.score * AI_SETTINGS.carryForwardDecay)
          };
        }

        return {
          x: previous.x + ((current.x - previous.x) * AI_SETTINGS.smoothingAlpha),
          y: previous.y + ((current.y - previous.y) * AI_SETTINGS.smoothingAlpha),
          score: Math.max(current.score, previous.score * 0.35)
        };
      });

      lastStableKeypoints = stabilized.map((kp) => ({ ...kp }));
      return stabilized;
    }

    function pushWithCap(arr, value) {
      arr.push(value);
      if (arr.length > AI_SETTINGS.maxStoredFrames) {
        arr.splice(0, arr.length - AI_SETTINGS.maxStoredFrames);
      }
    }

    function clearAnalyzerLoop(video) {
      if (rafId) {
        cancelAnimationFrame(rafId);
        rafId = null;
      }
      if (analysisTimeoutId) {
        clearTimeout(analysisTimeoutId);
        analysisTimeoutId = null;
      }
      if (videoFrameCallbackId != null && video && typeof video.cancelVideoFrameCallback === 'function') {
        video.cancelVideoFrameCallback(videoFrameCallbackId);
      }
      videoFrameCallbackId = null;
      analysisInFlight = false;
    }

    function scheduleAnalyzeFrame(video) {
      if (!isAnalyzing || !video || video.paused || !detector) {
        rafId = null;
        analysisTimeoutId = null;
        videoFrameCallbackId = null;
        return;
      }

      if (analysisTimeoutId) {
        clearTimeout(analysisTimeoutId);
      }

      const delay = Math.max(16, Math.round(1000 / Math.max(1, AI_SETTINGS.poseFpsCap)));
      analysisTimeoutId = window.setTimeout(() => {
        analysisTimeoutId = null;
        if (!analysisInFlight) {
          analyzeFrame();
        }
      }, delay);
    }

    // Legacy initializer kept for compatibility debugging.
    async function initPoseEngineLegacy() {
      try {
        await tf.ready();
        
        try {
          await tf.setBackend('webgl');
          await tf.ready();
          backend = 'webgl';
        } catch {
          await tf.setBackend('cpu');
          await tf.ready();
          backend = 'cpu';
        }

        detector = await poseDetection.createDetector(
          poseDetection.SupportedModels.MoveNet,
          {
            modelType: poseDetection.movenet.modelType.SINGLEPOSE_THUNDER
          }
        );

        console.log('âœ“ MoveNet initialized:', backend);
        setStatus('âœ“ AI Ready (MoveNet)', 'ready');
        return true;
      } catch (error) {
        console.error('Failed to initialize:', error);
        setStatus('âŒ AI Failed', 'error');
        return false;
      }
    }

    function setStatus(text, status = 'loading') {
      const statusEl = document.getElementById('aiStatus');
      const textEl = document.getElementById('statusText');
      
      statusEl.className = `ai-status ${status}`;
      textEl.textContent = text;
      
      const spinner = statusEl.querySelector('.spinner');
      if (status === 'loading' && !spinner) {
        const spinnerEl = document.createElement('div');
        spinnerEl.className = 'spinner';
        statusEl.insertBefore(spinnerEl, textEl);
      } else if (status !== 'loading' && spinner) {
        spinner.remove();
      }
    }

    function loadExternalScriptSafe(url) {
      return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
        const timeout = setTimeout(() => {
          reject(new Error(`Timed out loading ${url}`));
        }, 12000);
        const script = document.createElement('script');
        script.src = url;
        script.async = true;
        script.onload = () => {
          clearTimeout(timeout);
          resolve(url);
        };
        script.onerror = () => {
          clearTimeout(timeout);
          reject(new Error(`Failed to load ${url}`));
        };
        document.head.appendChild(script);
      });
    }

    async function loadFromMirrorSafe(urls, checkFn) {
      if (checkFn()) return true;
      for (const url of urls) {
        try {
          await loadExternalScriptSafe(url);
          if (checkFn()) return true;
        } catch (_) {
          // Continue to next mirror.
        }
      }
      return checkFn();
    }

    async function ensurePoseLibraries() {
      const hasTf = () => !!window.tf;
      const hasMediaPipePose = () => !!window.Pose;
      const hasPose = () => !!window.poseDetection?.SupportedModels;

      const tfLoaded = hasTf() || await loadFromMirrorSafe([
        'https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@tensorflow/tfjs@4.11.0/dist/tf.min.js',
        'https://unpkg.com/@tensorflow/tfjs@4.11.0/dist/tf.min.js'
      ], hasTf);

      const mediaPipeLoaded = hasMediaPipePose() || await loadFromMirrorSafe([
        './assets/vendor/mediapipe/pose/pose.js'
      ], hasMediaPipePose);

      const poseLoaded = hasPose() || await loadFromMirrorSafe([
        'https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@tensorflow-models/pose-detection@2.1.0/dist/pose-detection.min.js',
        'https://unpkg.com/@tensorflow-models/pose-detection@2.1.0/dist/pose-detection.min.js'
      ], hasPose);

      if (!tfLoaded || !mediaPipeLoaded || !poseLoaded) {
        throw new Error('Pose libraries unavailable. Check internet or extension blocking.');
      }
    }

    // Resilient initialization path with explicit timeouts.
    async function initPoseEngine() {
      const playBtn = document.getElementById('playBtn');
      if (detector) {
        setStatus(`AI Ready (${detectorLabel}, ${AI_SETTINGS.poseFpsCap} FPS cap)`, 'ready');
        playBtn.disabled = false;
        return true;
      }

      if (aiInitInFlight) {
        return aiInitInFlight;
      }

      playBtn.disabled = true;
      aiInitInFlight = (async () => {
        try {
          aiInitStage = 'load-libraries';
          setStatus('Loading AI libraries...', 'loading');
          await withTimeout(ensurePoseLibraries(), AI_SETTINGS.libraryTimeoutMs, 'AI library loading');
          setStatus('Creating pose detector...', 'loading');
          const detectorStrategies = [
            {
              id: 'blazepose-mediapipe-lite',
              label: 'BlazePose Lite (MediaPipe local)',
              stage: 'detector-blazepose-lite',
              fpsCap: AI_SETTINGS.litePoseFpsCap,
              create: () => poseDetection.createDetector(
                poseDetection.SupportedModels.BlazePose,
                {
                  runtime: 'mediapipe',
                  modelType: 'lite',
                  enableSmoothing: true,
                  solutionPath: './assets/vendor/mediapipe/pose'
                }
              )
            },
            {
              id: 'blazepose-mediapipe-full',
              label: 'BlazePose Full (MediaPipe local)',
              stage: 'detector-blazepose-full',
              fpsCap: AI_SETTINGS.fullPoseFpsCap,
              create: () => poseDetection.createDetector(
                poseDetection.SupportedModels.BlazePose,
                {
                  runtime: 'mediapipe',
                  modelType: 'full',
                  enableSmoothing: true,
                  solutionPath: './assets/vendor/mediapipe/pose'
                }
              )
            }
          ];

          if (window.tf && typeof tf.ready === 'function') {
            try {
              aiInitStage = 'tf-ready';
              await withTimeout(tf.ready(), AI_SETTINGS.backendTimeoutMs, 'TensorFlow ready');
              aiInitStage = 'backend-cpu';
              await withTimeout(tf.setBackend('cpu'), AI_SETTINGS.backendTimeoutMs, 'cpu setup');
              await withTimeout(tf.ready(), AI_SETTINGS.backendTimeoutMs, 'cpu ready');
              backend = 'cpu';
              detectorStrategies.push({
                id: 'movenet-thunder-cpu',
                label: 'MoveNet Thunder (CPU fallback)',
                stage: 'detector-movenet-thunder-cpu',
                fpsCap: AI_SETTINGS.cpuMoveNetFpsCap,
                create: () => poseDetection.createDetector(
                  poseDetection.SupportedModels.MoveNet,
                  { modelType: poseDetection.movenet.modelType.SINGLEPOSE_THUNDER, enableSmoothing: true }
                )
              });
            } catch (backendError) {
              console.warn('TensorFlow CPU fallback unavailable:', backendError);
            }
          }

          let created = false;
          let lastDetectorError = null;
          for (const strategy of detectorStrategies) {
            try {
              aiInitStage = strategy.stage;
              detector = await withTimeout(
                strategy.create(),
                AI_SETTINGS.detectorTimeoutMs,
                'Pose detector creation'
              );
              if (detector) {
                detectorLabel = strategy.label;
                AI_SETTINGS.poseFpsCap = strategy.fpsCap || AI_SETTINGS.poseFpsCap;
                created = true;
                break;
              }
            } catch (detectorError) {
              lastDetectorError = detectorError;
              console.warn(`Detector strategy failed (${strategy.id}):`, detectorError);
            }
          }

          if (!created) {
            throw lastDetectorError || new Error('Unable to initialize pose detector.');
          }

          aiInitStage = 'ready';
          setStatus(`AI Ready (${detectorLabel}, ${AI_SETTINGS.poseFpsCap} FPS cap)`, 'ready');
          playBtn.disabled = false;
          return true;
        } catch (error) {
          console.error('AI initialization failed:', error);
          const reason = (error && error.message) ? ` ${error.message}` : '';
          setStatus(`AI failed (${aiInitStage}).${reason} Click Retry AI Setup.`, 'error');
          playBtn.disabled = true;
          return false;
        } finally {
          if (aiInitStage !== 'ready') {
            aiInitStage = 'idle';
          }
          aiInitInFlight = null;
        }
      })();

      return aiInitInFlight;
    }

    // Compute Angles
    function computeAngles(keypoints) {
      const angles = {};
      
      // Determine dominant side
      const rightScore = (keypoints[KEYPOINT.RIGHT_SHOULDER]?.score || 0) + 
                        (keypoints[KEYPOINT.RIGHT_ELBOW]?.score || 0) +
                        (keypoints[KEYPOINT.RIGHT_WRIST]?.score || 0);
      const leftScore = (keypoints[KEYPOINT.LEFT_SHOULDER]?.score || 0) +
                       (keypoints[KEYPOINT.LEFT_ELBOW]?.score || 0) +
                       (keypoints[KEYPOINT.LEFT_WRIST]?.score || 0);
      
      const isRight = rightScore >= leftScore;
      const shoulder = keypoints[isRight ? KEYPOINT.RIGHT_SHOULDER : KEYPOINT.LEFT_SHOULDER];
      const elbow = keypoints[isRight ? KEYPOINT.RIGHT_ELBOW : KEYPOINT.LEFT_ELBOW];
      const wrist = keypoints[isRight ? KEYPOINT.RIGHT_WRIST : KEYPOINT.LEFT_WRIST];
      const hip = keypoints[isRight ? KEYPOINT.RIGHT_HIP : KEYPOINT.LEFT_HIP];
      const knee = keypoints[isRight ? KEYPOINT.RIGHT_KNEE : KEYPOINT.LEFT_KNEE];
      const ankle = keypoints[isRight ? KEYPOINT.RIGHT_ANKLE : KEYPOINT.LEFT_ANKLE];

      // Elbow angle: shoulder-elbow-wrist
      if (kpOk(shoulder) && kpOk(elbow) && kpOk(wrist)) {
        angles.elbow = calculateAngle(shoulder, elbow, wrist);
      }

      // Shoulder angle: hip-shoulder-elbow
      if (kpOk(hip) && kpOk(shoulder) && kpOk(elbow)) {
        angles.shoulder = Math.max(0, 180 - calculateAngle(hip, shoulder, elbow));
      }

      // Knee angle: hip-knee-ankle
      if (kpOk(hip) && kpOk(knee) && kpOk(ankle)) {
        angles.knee = calculateAngle(hip, knee, ankle);
      }

      // Hip angle: shoulder-hip-knee
      if (kpOk(shoulder) && kpOk(hip) && kpOk(knee)) {
        angles.hip = calculateAngle(shoulder, hip, knee);
      }

      // Trunk angle
      const leftShoulder = keypoints[KEYPOINT.LEFT_SHOULDER];
      const rightShoulder = keypoints[KEYPOINT.RIGHT_SHOULDER];
      const leftHip = keypoints[KEYPOINT.LEFT_HIP];
      const rightHip = keypoints[KEYPOINT.RIGHT_HIP];

      if (kpOk(leftShoulder) && kpOk(rightShoulder) && kpOk(leftHip) && kpOk(rightHip)) {
        const shoulderMid = midpoint(leftShoulder, rightShoulder);
        const hipMid = midpoint(leftHip, rightHip);
        const vertical = { x: hipMid.x, y: hipMid.y - 100 };
        angles.trunk = calculateAngle(shoulderMid, hipMid, vertical);
      }

      // Wrist angle is intentionally omitted here because the 17-keypoint model
      // does not expose hand/finger landmarks, and a fake proxy produced
      // misleading values close to 180 degrees.
      angles.wrist = null;

      return angles;
    }

    function computeDerivedMetrics(keypoints, poseMotion = 0) {
      const metrics = {
        shoulderTilt: null,
        hipTilt: null,
        stanceWidth: null,
        contactHeight: null,
        reach: null,
        balance: null,
        alignmentGap: null,
        footworkLoad: null
      };

      const leftShoulder = keypoints[KEYPOINT.LEFT_SHOULDER];
      const rightShoulder = keypoints[KEYPOINT.RIGHT_SHOULDER];
      const leftHip = keypoints[KEYPOINT.LEFT_HIP];
      const rightHip = keypoints[KEYPOINT.RIGHT_HIP];
      const leftAnkle = keypoints[KEYPOINT.LEFT_ANKLE];
      const rightAnkle = keypoints[KEYPOINT.RIGHT_ANKLE];
      const nose = keypoints[KEYPOINT.NOSE];

      const rightScore = (keypoints[KEYPOINT.RIGHT_SHOULDER]?.score || 0) +
        (keypoints[KEYPOINT.RIGHT_ELBOW]?.score || 0) +
        (keypoints[KEYPOINT.RIGHT_WRIST]?.score || 0);
      const leftScore = (keypoints[KEYPOINT.LEFT_SHOULDER]?.score || 0) +
        (keypoints[KEYPOINT.LEFT_ELBOW]?.score || 0) +
        (keypoints[KEYPOINT.LEFT_WRIST]?.score || 0);
      const isRight = rightScore >= leftScore;
      const shoulder = keypoints[isRight ? KEYPOINT.RIGHT_SHOULDER : KEYPOINT.LEFT_SHOULDER];
      const wrist = keypoints[isRight ? KEYPOINT.RIGHT_WRIST : KEYPOINT.LEFT_WRIST];

      if (kpOk(leftShoulder) && kpOk(rightShoulder)) {
        metrics.shoulderTilt = calculateLineTilt(leftShoulder, rightShoulder);
      }

      if (kpOk(leftHip) && kpOk(rightHip)) {
        metrics.hipTilt = calculateLineTilt(leftHip, rightHip);
      }

      if (kpOk(leftAnkle) && kpOk(rightAnkle) && kpOk(leftShoulder) && kpOk(rightShoulder)) {
        const shoulderWidth = distance(leftShoulder, rightShoulder);
        const ankleWidth = distance(leftAnkle, rightAnkle);
        if (shoulderWidth && ankleWidth) {
          metrics.stanceWidth = roundMetric((ankleWidth / shoulderWidth) * 100);
        }
      }

      if (kpOk(leftAnkle) && kpOk(rightAnkle) && kpOk(leftShoulder) && kpOk(rightShoulder) && kpOk(wrist)) {
        const ankleMid = midpoint(leftAnkle, rightAnkle);
        const shoulderMid = midpoint(leftShoulder, rightShoulder);
        const usableHeight = Math.max(1, ankleMid.y - shoulderMid.y);
        metrics.contactHeight = roundMetric(((ankleMid.y - wrist.y) / usableHeight) * 100);
      }

      if (kpOk(shoulder) && kpOk(wrist) && kpOk(leftShoulder) && kpOk(rightShoulder) && kpOk(leftHip) && kpOk(rightHip)) {
        const shoulderWidth = distance(leftShoulder, rightShoulder);
        const torsoHeight = distance(midpoint(leftShoulder, rightShoulder), midpoint(leftHip, rightHip));
        const scale = Math.max(shoulderWidth || 0, torsoHeight || 0, 1);
        metrics.reach = roundMetric((distance(shoulder, wrist) / scale) * 100);
      }

      if (kpOk(leftAnkle) && kpOk(rightAnkle) && kpOk(leftHip) && kpOk(rightHip)) {
        const ankleMid = midpoint(leftAnkle, rightAnkle);
        const hipMid = midpoint(leftHip, rightHip);
        const stance = Math.max(distance(leftAnkle, rightAnkle) || 0, 1);
        metrics.balance = roundMetric((Math.abs(hipMid.x - ankleMid.x) / stance) * 100);
      }

      if (metrics.shoulderTilt != null && metrics.hipTilt != null) {
        metrics.alignmentGap = roundMetric(Math.abs(metrics.shoulderTilt - metrics.hipTilt));
      }

      if (kpOk(leftAnkle) && kpOk(rightAnkle) && kpOk(nose)) {
        const ankleMid = midpoint(leftAnkle, rightAnkle);
        const stance = Math.max(distance(leftAnkle, rightAnkle) || 0, 1);
        const headOffset = Math.abs(nose.x - ankleMid.x) / stance;
        metrics.footworkLoad = roundMetric(clamp((poseMotion * 8) + (headOffset * 55), 0, 100));
      } else {
        metrics.footworkLoad = roundMetric(clamp(poseMotion * 8, 0, 100));
      }

      return metrics;
    }

    // Draw Pose
    function drawPose(keypoints) {
      const canvas = document.getElementById('poseCanvas');
      if (!canvas || !Array.isArray(keypoints)) return;
      const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
      if (!ctx) return;
      
      ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);

      // Draw skeleton lines
      ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(57, 255, 20, 0.8)';
      ctx.lineWidth = Math.max(2, Math.round(canvas.width / 450));
      
      POSE_CONNECTIONS.forEach(([i, j]) => {
        const a = keypoints[i];
        const b = keypoints[j];
        
        if (kpOk(a, AI_SETTINGS.minKeypointConfidence) && kpOk(b, AI_SETTINGS.minKeypointConfidence)) {
          ctx.beginPath();
          ctx.moveTo(a.x, a.y);
          ctx.lineTo(b.x, b.y);
          ctx.stroke();
        }
      });

      // Draw keypoints
      keypoints.forEach(kp => {
        if (kpOk(kp, AI_SETTINGS.minKeypointConfidence)) {
          ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(57, 255, 20, 0.95)';
          ctx.beginPath();
          ctx.arc(kp.x, kp.y, Math.max(3, Math.round(canvas.width / 420)), 0, 2 * Math.PI);
          ctx.fill();

          ctx.fillStyle = 'white';
          ctx.beginPath();
          ctx.arc(kp.x, kp.y, Math.max(1.5, Math.round(canvas.width / 1000)), 0, 2 * Math.PI);
          ctx.fill();
        }
      });
    }

    // Analysis Loop
    async function analyzeFrame() {
      const video = document.getElementById('videoElement');
      
      if (!isAnalyzing || video.paused || !detector) {
        videoFrameCallbackId = null;
        rafId = null;
        return;
      }

      try {
        syncCanvasToViewport();
        if (!Number.isFinite(video.currentTime) || video.currentTime === lastAnalyzedVideoTime) {
          scheduleAnalyzeFrame(video);
          return;
        }
        lastAnalyzedVideoTime = video.currentTime;

        const now = performance.now();
        const minDelta = 1000 / AI_SETTINGS.poseFpsCap;
        if (lastFrameAt && now - lastFrameAt < minDelta) {
          scheduleAnalyzeFrame(video);
          return;
        }
        lastFrameAt = now;

        const poses = await detector.estimatePoses(video);
        
        if (poses && poses.length > 0) {
          const canvas = document.getElementById('poseCanvas');
          const transform = getVideoFitTransform(video, canvas);
          const rawMetricKeypoints = normalizeKeypointsToMoveNet(
            poses[0].keypoints || [],
            transform.sourceWidth,
            transform.sourceHeight
          );
          const metricKeypoints = stabilizeKeypoints(rawMetricKeypoints);
          const drawKeypoints = projectKeypointsToCanvas(metricKeypoints, transform);
          const validLandmarks = metricKeypoints.filter(kp => kpOk(kp, AI_SETTINGS.minKeypointConfidence)).length;
          const confidence = Math.round(
            (metricKeypoints.reduce((sum, kp) => sum + safeNumber(kp.score ?? kp.confidence ?? kp.visibility, 0), 0) / Math.max(1, metricKeypoints.length)) * 100
          );

          const angles = computeAngles(metricKeypoints);

          // Store data
          for (const k in angles) {
            if (angles[k] != null) {
              pushWithCap(analysisData.angles[k], angles[k]);
            }
          }

          pushWithCap(analysisData.frames, {
            timestamp: video.currentTime,
            landmarks: validLandmarks,
            confidence,
            angles
          });
          pushWithCap(analysisData.landmarks, validLandmarks);
          pushWithCap(analysisData.confidence, confidence);

          // Update UI
          const framesCount = analysisData.frames.length;
          document.getElementById('framesCount').textContent = framesCount;
          document.getElementById('landmarksCount').textContent = validLandmarks;
          document.getElementById('confidenceValue').textContent = confidence + '%';

          // Update angle displays
          document.getElementById('angleShoulder').textContent = angles.shoulder != null ? angles.shoulder + 'Â°' : '-Â°';
          document.getElementById('angleElbow').textContent = angles.elbow != null ? angles.elbow + 'Â°' : '-Â°';
          document.getElementById('angleHip').textContent = angles.hip != null ? angles.hip + 'Â°' : '-Â°';
          document.getElementById('angleKnee').textContent = angles.knee != null ? angles.knee + 'Â°' : '-Â°';
          document.getElementById('angleTrunk').textContent = angles.trunk != null ? angles.trunk + 'Â°' : '-Â°';
          document.getElementById('angleWrist').textContent = angles.wrist != null ? angles.wrist + 'Â°' : '-Â°';

          // Show save button after 30 frames
          if (framesCount >= 30) {
            document.getElementById('saveBtn').style.display = 'inline-block';
            document.getElementById('generateReportBtn').style.display = 'inline-block';
          }

          drawPose(drawKeypoints);
        }
      } catch (error) {
        console.error('Analysis error:', error);
        isAnalyzing = false;
        setStatus('AI processing paused due to an error. Retry AI Setup and continue.', 'error');
      } finally {
        if (isAnalyzing && !video.paused && detector) {
          rafId = requestAnimationFrame(analyzeFrame);
        } else {
          rafId = null;
        }
      }
    }

    analyzeFrame = async function() {
      const video = document.getElementById('videoElement');

      if (!isAnalyzing || !video || video.paused || !detector) {
        videoFrameCallbackId = null;
        rafId = null;
        analysisTimeoutId = null;
        return;
      }

      if (analysisInFlight) {
        scheduleAnalyzeFrame(video);
        return;
      }

      try {
        analysisInFlight = true;
        syncCanvasToViewport();
        if (!Number.isFinite(video.currentTime) || video.currentTime === lastAnalyzedVideoTime) {
          scheduleAnalyzeFrame(video);
          return;
        }
        lastAnalyzedVideoTime = video.currentTime;

        const now = performance.now();
        const minDelta = 1000 / AI_SETTINGS.poseFpsCap;
        if (lastFrameAt && now - lastFrameAt < minDelta) {
          scheduleAnalyzeFrame(video);
          return;
        }
        lastFrameAt = now;

        const detectorInput = getDetectorInput(video);
        const poses = await detector.estimatePoses(detectorInput.source);
        if (poses && poses.length > 0) {
          const canvas = document.getElementById('poseCanvas');
          const transform = getSourceFitTransform(detectorInput.width, detectorInput.height, canvas);
          const rawMetricKeypoints = normalizeKeypointsToMoveNet(
            poses[0].keypoints || [],
            detectorInput.width,
            detectorInput.height
          );
          const poseMotion = computePoseMotion(rawMetricKeypoints);
          const metricKeypoints = stabilizeKeypoints(rawMetricKeypoints);
          const drawKeypoints = projectKeypointsToCanvas(metricKeypoints, transform);
          const validLandmarks = metricKeypoints.filter((kp) => kpOk(kp, AI_SETTINGS.minKeypointConfidence)).length;
          const confidence = Math.round(
            (metricKeypoints.reduce((sum, kp) => sum + safeNumber(kp.score ?? kp.confidence ?? kp.visibility, 0), 0) / Math.max(1, metricKeypoints.length)) * 100
          );
          const angles = computeAngles(metricKeypoints);
          const derivedMetrics = computeDerivedMetrics(metricKeypoints, poseMotion);
          const shouldStoreFrame = validLandmarks >= 10 && (
            analysisData.frames.length < 5 ||
            poseMotion >= AI_SETTINGS.minPoseMotionPx
          );

          if (shouldStoreFrame) {
            for (const k in angles) {
              if (angles[k] != null) {
                pushWithCap(analysisData.angles[k], angles[k]);
              }
            }
            for (const k in derivedMetrics) {
              if (derivedMetrics[k] != null && analysisData.derivedMetrics[k]) {
                pushWithCap(analysisData.derivedMetrics[k], derivedMetrics[k]);
              }
            }

            pushWithCap(analysisData.frames, {
              timestamp: video.currentTime,
              landmarks: validLandmarks,
              confidence,
              poseMotion,
              angles,
              derivedMetrics
            });
            pushWithCap(analysisData.landmarks, validLandmarks);
            pushWithCap(analysisData.confidence, confidence);
          }

          if (!lastUiRefreshAt || now - lastUiRefreshAt >= AI_SETTINGS.uiRefreshMs) {
            lastUiRefreshAt = now;
            document.getElementById('framesCount').textContent = analysisData.frames.length;
            document.getElementById('landmarksCount').textContent = validLandmarks;
            document.getElementById('confidenceValue').textContent = confidence + '%';
          }

          if (!lastAngleUiRefreshAt || now - lastAngleUiRefreshAt >= AI_SETTINGS.angleUiRefreshMs) {
            lastAngleUiRefreshAt = now;
            document.getElementById('angleShoulder').textContent = formatAngle(getSmoothedAngle('shoulder', angles.shoulder));
            document.getElementById('angleElbow').textContent = formatAngle(getSmoothedAngle('elbow', angles.elbow));
            document.getElementById('angleHip').textContent = formatAngle(getSmoothedAngle('hip', angles.hip));
            document.getElementById('angleKnee').textContent = formatAngle(getSmoothedAngle('knee', angles.knee));
            document.getElementById('angleTrunk').textContent = formatAngle(getSmoothedAngle('trunk', angles.trunk));
            document.getElementById('angleWrist').textContent = formatAngle(getSmoothedAngle('wrist', angles.wrist));
          }

          if (analysisData.frames.length >= 30) {
            document.getElementById('saveBtn').style.display = 'inline-block';
            document.getElementById('generateReportBtn').style.display = 'inline-block';
          }

          if (!lastDrawAt || now - lastDrawAt >= AI_SETTINGS.drawRefreshMs) {
            lastDrawAt = now;
            drawPose(drawKeypoints);
          }
        }
      } catch (error) {
        console.error('Analysis error:', error);
        isAnalyzing = false;
        setStatus('AI processing paused due to an error. Retry AI Setup and continue.', 'error');
      } finally {
        analysisInFlight = false;
        if (isAnalyzing && !video.paused && detector) {
          scheduleAnalyzeFrame(video);
        } else {
          videoFrameCallbackId = null;
          rafId = null;
          analysisTimeoutId = null;
        }
      }
    };
