    const PROFILE_SCORE_CURVE = {
      beginner: { tolerance: 1.45, boost: 7, percentileShift: 9 },
      intermediate: { tolerance: 1.28, boost: 5, percentileShift: 5 },
      advanced: { tolerance: 1.12, boost: 3, percentileShift: 2 },
      pro: { tolerance: 1, boost: 1, percentileShift: 0 }
    };

    const LEVEL_EXPECTATIONS = {
      beginner: 0.55,
      intermediate: 0.75,
      advanced: 0.9,
      pro: 1
    };

    const AGE_ADJUSTMENTS = {
      under_13: { power: 0.6, flexibility: 1.15, tolerance: 2.0 },
      '13_17': { power: 0.75, flexibility: 1.1, tolerance: 1.5 },
      '18_24': { power: 1.0, flexibility: 1.05, tolerance: 1.0 },
      '25_34': { power: 0.98, flexibility: 1.0, tolerance: 1.0 },
      '35_44': { power: 0.92, flexibility: 0.95, tolerance: 1.1 },
      '45_54': { power: 0.85, flexibility: 0.9, tolerance: 1.25 },
      '55_plus': { power: 0.75, flexibility: 0.85, tolerance: 1.5 }
    };

    const GENDER_ADJUSTMENTS = {
      male: { power: 1.0, flexibility: 1.0 },
      female: { power: 0.85, flexibility: 1.1 },
      other: { power: 0.92, flexibility: 1.05 },
      unspecified: { power: 1.0, flexibility: 1.0 }
    };

    const POWER_METRICS = new Set(['hip', 'knee', 'trunk', 'contactHeight', 'reach']);
    const FLEX_METRICS = new Set(['shoulder', 'elbow', 'knee', 'hip', 'trunk']);

    const TRACKER_DEFINITIONS = {
      shoulder: 'Measures unit turn and coil depth. It controls power loading and directional control on contact.',
      elbow: 'Tracks arm extension efficiency through the hit. It affects racquet head speed and contact stability.',
      hip: 'Represents lower-body rotation transfer. It is a major driver of kinetic-chain power.',
      knee: 'Captures leg loading and drive. It influences balance, explosiveness, and timing under pressure.',
      trunk: 'Shows torso rotation and sequencing. It links lower-body power into upper-body acceleration.',
      wrist: 'Reflects racquet lag and release timing. It impacts spin potential and directional precision.',
      shoulderTilt: 'Shows whether your shoulders stay level through the strike window instead of leaking posture early.',
      hipTilt: 'Measures pelvic stability and helps flag balance losses during loading and recovery.',
      stanceWidth: 'Tracks base width. Too narrow reduces stability; too wide can slow rotation and recovery.',
      contactHeight: 'Estimates the strike height window relative to your body. It strongly affects shape, depth, and control.',
      reach: 'Represents spacing from your body into contact. Clean spacing supports speed and consistency.',
      balance: 'Measures how centered your body stays over the base. Better balance improves repeatability under pressure.',
      alignmentGap: 'Compares upper-body and lower-body tilt. Lower gaps usually mean cleaner positioning and transfer.',
      footworkLoad: 'Captures lower-body activity and repositioning demand through the clip.'
    };

    const CAPTURE_GUIDE_BY_SHOT = {
      forehand: 'Capture from side or slight rear angle. Keep split-step, load, and follow-through fully visible.',
      backhand: 'Capture from open-side baseline angle. Keep contact zone and shoulder line visible.',
      serve: 'Capture from side-rear view. Include full toss, trophy position, and landing frame.',
      volley: 'Capture from side-net angle. Keep short backswing and split-step timing in frame.',
      slice: 'Capture from side angle with stable horizon. Keep racquet path and shoulder level visible.',
      'drop-shot': 'Capture from side-front angle. Keep grip change, compact prep, and touch release visible.',
      lob: 'Capture from side-rear angle. Keep loading legs, contact elevation, and finish trajectory visible.'
    };

    function refreshSetupScore() {
      const checks = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.setup-check'));
      const checked = checks.filter((input) => input.checked).length;
      const score = checks.length ? Math.round((checked / checks.length) * 100) : 100;
      playerProfile.setupScore = score;
      document.getElementById('setupScore').textContent = score;
      renderCaptureGuidance();
    }

    function getBenchmarkForShot(shotType) {
      return PRO_BENCHMARKS[shotType] || PRO_BENCHMARKS.forehand;
    }

    function renderCaptureGuidance() {
      const target = document.getElementById('captureGuidance');
      if (!target) return;
      const shot = playerProfile.shots[0] || 'forehand';
      const mode = playerProfile.sessionMode || 'stroke-tune-up';
      const score = safeNumber(playerProfile.setupScore, 100);
      const modeCue = mode === 'coach-review'
        ? 'State your top question for your coach and keep one stroke priority only.'
        : mode === 'match-readiness'
          ? 'Use match-tempo reps with no jump cuts so timing errors are visible.'
          : mode === 'injury-safe-rebuild'
            ? 'Use lower-intensity reps and avoid hidden compensations outside the frame.'
            : 'Use controlled reps first, then live tempo reps in the same camera setup.';
      const qualityCue = score >= 90
        ? 'Capture quality is strong for high-confidence tracking.'
        : score >= 70
          ? 'Capture quality is usable; improve framing before final scoring.'
          : 'Capture quality is weak. Fix checklist issues before analyzing to avoid misleading feedback.';
      target.innerHTML = `
        <strong>Pre-capture guidance (${shot.replace('-', ' ')}):</strong><br>
        ${CAPTURE_GUIDE_BY_SHOT[shot] || CAPTURE_GUIDE_BY_SHOT.forehand}<br>
        ${modeCue}<br>
        ${qualityCue}
      `;
    }

    // ============================================================================
    // Scoring Functions
    // ============================================================================
    function getShotScoringModel(shotType) {
      return SHOT_SCORING_MODELS[shotType] || SHOT_SCORING_MODELS.forehand;
    }

    function getProfileContext(profile) {
      return {
        level: normalizeLevel(profile?.level || currentUser?.ustaLevel || 'intermediate'),
        ageMid: parseAgeMidpoint(profile?.age || currentUser?.ageRange || ''),
        gender: String(profile?.gender || currentUser?.gender || 'unspecified').toLowerCase(),
        preferredHand: String(currentUser?.preferredHand || 'right').toLowerCase()
      };
    }

    function getAgeBucket(ageMid) {
      if (ageMid == null || !Number.isFinite(ageMid)) return '25_34';
      if (ageMid < 13) return 'under_13';
      if (ageMid < 18) return '13_17';
      if (ageMid < 25) return '18_24';
      if (ageMid < 35) return '25_34';
      if (ageMid < 45) return '35_44';
      if (ageMid < 55) return '45_54';
      return '55_plus';
    }

    function getGenderBucket(gender) {
      const normalized = String(gender || '').toLowerCase();
      if (normalized === 'female' || normalized === 'woman') return 'female';
      if (normalized === 'male' || normalized === 'man') return 'male';
      if (normalized === 'non-binary' || normalized === 'nonbinary' || normalized === 'other') return 'other';
      return 'unspecified';
    }

    function getProfileAdjustments(profileContext) {
      const ageBucket = getAgeBucket(profileContext?.ageMid);
      const genderBucket = getGenderBucket(profileContext?.gender);
      return {
        ageBucket,
        genderBucket,
        levelExpectation: LEVEL_EXPECTATIONS[profileContext?.level] || LEVEL_EXPECTATIONS.intermediate,
        ageAdjustment: AGE_ADJUSTMENTS[ageBucket] || AGE_ADJUSTMENTS['25_34'],
        genderAdjustment: GENDER_ADJUSTMENTS[genderBucket] || GENDER_ADJUSTMENTS.unspecified
      };
    }

    function getProfileToleranceMultiplier(profile, shotType) {
      const context = getProfileContext(profile);
      const adjustments = getProfileAdjustments(context);
      let multiplier = PROFILE_SCORE_CURVE[context.level]?.tolerance || 1.25;
      multiplier *= adjustments.ageAdjustment.tolerance;

      if (adjustments.genderBucket === 'female') {
        multiplier *= shotType === 'serve' ? 1.06 : 1.03;
      } else if (adjustments.genderBucket === 'other') {
        multiplier *= 1.04;
      }

      return clamp(multiplier, 1, 3.25);
    }

    function getMetricExpectationScale(metricName, profileContext) {
      const adjustments = getProfileAdjustments(profileContext);
      const expectation = adjustments.levelExpectation;
      const powerScale = adjustments.ageAdjustment.power * adjustments.genderAdjustment.power;
      const flexibilityScale = adjustments.ageAdjustment.flexibility * adjustments.genderAdjustment.flexibility;

      if (metricName === 'contactHeight' || metricName === 'reach') {
        return clamp(0.82 + (expectation * 0.22), 0.86, 1.04);
      }

      if (POWER_METRICS.has(metricName)) {
        return clamp(expectation * powerScale, 0.5, 1.02);
      }

      if (FLEX_METRICS.has(metricName)) {
        return clamp(expectation * flexibilityScale, 0.52, 1.08);
      }

      if (metricName === 'stanceWidth') {
        return clamp(0.92 + (expectation * 0.1), 0.95, 1.03);
      }

      if (metricName === 'balance' || metricName === 'alignmentGap') {
        return clamp(1 + ((1 - expectation) * 0.18), 1, 1.12);
      }

      return clamp(0.88 + (expectation * 0.15), 0.92, 1.04);
    }

    function getAdjustedBenchmark(metricName, benchmark, profileContext) {
      if (!benchmark) return null;

      const scale = getMetricExpectationScale(metricName, profileContext);
      const adjusted = { ...benchmark };

      if (adjusted.lowerIsBetter) {
        adjusted.min = safeNumber(benchmark.min);
        adjusted.max = roundMetric(safeNumber(benchmark.max) * clamp(scale, 1, 1.18));
        adjusted.optimal = roundMetric(safeNumber(benchmark.optimal) * clamp(scale, 1, 1.15));
        return adjusted;
      }

      adjusted.min = roundMetric(safeNumber(benchmark.min) * scale);
      adjusted.max = roundMetric(safeNumber(benchmark.max) * scale);
      adjusted.optimal = roundMetric(safeNumber(benchmark.optimal) * scale);
      return adjusted;
    }

    function getExtendedBenchmarks(shotType) {
      const model = getShotScoringModel(shotType);
      return {
        ...(PRO_BENCHMARKS[shotType] || PRO_BENCHMARKS.forehand),
        ...(model.derivedBenchmarks || {})
      };
    }

    function scoreMetricAgainstBenchmark(metricName, currentValue, benchmark, toleranceMultiplier = 1, shotType = 'forehand', profileContext = null) {
      const current = safeNumber(currentValue, null);
      if (current == null || !benchmark) return null;

      const adjustedBenchmark = getAdjustedBenchmark(metricName, benchmark, profileContext);
      const range = Math.max(1, safeNumber(adjustedBenchmark.max) - safeNumber(adjustedBenchmark.min));
      const target = safeNumber(adjustedBenchmark.optimal);
      const deviation = Math.abs(current - target);
      const softWindow = Math.max(4, range * 0.28 * toleranceMultiplier);
      const goodWindow = Math.max(8, range * 0.55 * toleranceMultiplier);
      const fairWindow = Math.max(12, range * 0.95 * toleranceMultiplier);

      let score;
      if (deviation <= softWindow) score = 100 - ((deviation / softWindow) * 8);
      else if (deviation <= goodWindow) score = 92 - (((deviation - softWindow) / Math.max(1, goodWindow - softWindow)) * 14);
      else if (deviation <= fairWindow) score = 78 - (((deviation - goodWindow) / Math.max(1, fairWindow - goodWindow)) * 18);
      else score = 60 - Math.min(22, ((deviation - fairWindow) / Math.max(1, fairWindow)) * 18);

      const roundedScore = clamp(Math.round(score), 38, 100);
      let status = 'needs-work';
      if (deviation <= softWindow) status = 'excellent';
      else if (deviation <= goodWindow) status = 'good';
      else if (deviation <= fairWindow) status = 'workable';

      return {
        metric: metricName,
        current: roundMetric(current),
        target,
        min: adjustedBenchmark.min,
        max: adjustedBenchmark.max,
        delta: roundMetric(current - target),
        deviation: roundMetric(deviation, 1),
        score: roundedScore,
        status,
        category: Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(PRO_BENCHMARKS[shotType] || {}, metricName) ? 'angle' : 'movement'
      };
    }

    function getFrameMetric(frame, key) {
      if (!frame) return null;
      if (frame.angles && Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(frame.angles, key)) return safeNumber(frame.angles[key], null);
      if (frame.derivedMetrics && Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(frame.derivedMetrics, key)) return safeNumber(frame.derivedMetrics[key], null);
      if (Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(frame, key)) return safeNumber(frame[key], null);
      return null;
    }

    function averageMetricMapFromFrames(frames, keys) {
      const summary = {};
      (keys || []).forEach((key) => {
        const values = (frames || []).map((frame) => getFrameMetric(frame, key)).filter((value) => Number.isFinite(value));
        const avg = average(values);
        if (avg != null) {
          summary[key] = Math.round(avg);
        }
      });
      return summary;
    }

    function selectAssessmentFrames(frames, shotType) {
      const list = Array.isArray(frames) ? frames.filter((frame) => frame?.angles) : [];
      if (list.length <= 24) return list;

      const scored = list.map((frame, index) => {
        const poseMotion = safeNumber(frame.poseMotion, 0);
        const reach = safeNumber(frame.derivedMetrics?.reach, 0);
        const contactHeight = safeNumber(frame.derivedMetrics?.contactHeight, 0);
        const footworkLoad = safeNumber(frame.derivedMetrics?.footworkLoad, 0);
        const trunk = safeNumber(frame.angles?.trunk, 0);

        let activation = poseMotion * 1.15 + footworkLoad * 0.25 + trunk * 0.18;
        if (shotType === 'serve' || shotType === 'lob') activation += contactHeight * 0.45 + reach * 0.2;
        else activation += reach * 0.25 + contactHeight * 0.18;

        return { frame, index, activation };
      });

      const takeCount = clamp(Math.round(list.length * 0.38), 18, 72);
      const selectedIndexes = new Set(
        scored.sort((a, b) => b.activation - a.activation).slice(0, takeCount).map((item) => item.index)
      );

      return list.filter((_, index) => selectedIndexes.has(index));
    }

    function calculateConsistencyScore(frames, shotType, profileContext) {
      const benchmarks = getExtendedBenchmarks(shotType);
      const keys = ['shoulder', 'elbow', 'hip', 'knee', 'trunk', 'stanceWidth', 'contactHeight', 'reach', 'balance'];
      const scores = keys.map((key) => {
        const values = (frames || []).map((frame) => getFrameMetric(frame, key)).filter((value) => Number.isFinite(value));
        const std = standardDeviation(values);
        if (std == null || !benchmarks[key]) return null;
        const adjustedBenchmark = getAdjustedBenchmark(key, benchmarks[key], profileContext) || benchmarks[key];
        const range = Math.max(1, safeNumber(adjustedBenchmark.max) - safeNumber(adjustedBenchmark.min));
        return clamp(Math.round(100 - ((std / range) * 120)), 48, 100);
      }).filter((value) => Number.isFinite(value));

      return scores.length ? Math.round(average(scores)) : 70;
    }

    function calculatePerformanceKpis(focusFrames, avgDerivedMetrics, avgLandmarks, avgConfidence, setupScore, shotType, profileContext) {
      const model = getShotScoringModel(shotType);
      const derivedBench = model.derivedBenchmarks || {};
      const avgPoseMotion = average((focusFrames || []).map((frame) => safeNumber(frame.poseMotion, 0))) || 0;
      const timingConsistency = calculateConsistencyScore(focusFrames, shotType, profileContext);
      const movementSpeed = clamp(Math.round(avgPoseMotion * 9), 28, 100);
      const trackingReliability = clamp(Math.round((avgConfidence * 0.58) + ((avgLandmarks / 17) * 42)), 0, 100);
      const contactHeightScore = scoreMetricAgainstBenchmark('contactHeight', avgDerivedMetrics.contactHeight, derivedBench.contactHeight, 1, shotType, profileContext)?.score ?? trackingReliability;
      const spacingScore = scoreMetricAgainstBenchmark('reach', avgDerivedMetrics.reach, derivedBench.reach, 1, shotType, profileContext)?.score ?? 72;
      const baseScore = scoreMetricAgainstBenchmark('stanceWidth', avgDerivedMetrics.stanceWidth, derivedBench.stanceWidth, 1, shotType, profileContext)?.score ?? 72;
      const balanceScore = scoreMetricAgainstBenchmark('balance', avgDerivedMetrics.balance, derivedBench.balance, 1, shotType, profileContext)?.score ?? 72;
      const positioningScore = Math.round(average([baseScore, balanceScore, clamp(100 - safeNumber(avgDerivedMetrics.alignmentGap, 12) * 3, 45, 100)]));
      const readinessIndex = clamp(Math.round((timingConsistency * 0.42) + (trackingReliability * 0.3) + (safeNumber(setupScore, 100) * 0.28)), 0, 100);
      const footworkScore = clamp(Math.round(average([
        baseScore,
        balanceScore,
        clamp(100 - Math.abs(safeNumber(avgDerivedMetrics.footworkLoad, 55) - 58), 45, 98)
      ])), 0, 100);

      return {
        timingConsistency,
        movementSpeed,
        footworkScore,
        positioningScore,
        contactHeightScore,
        spacingScore,
        trackingReliability,
        readinessIndex
      };
    }

    function getProgressContext(shotType, projectedScore) {
      if (!store || !currentUser) {
        return { delta: 0, personalBest: false, recentAverage: null, sameShotCount: 0, scoreBonus: 0, consistencyStreak: false };
      }

      const sameShot = store.getUserAssessments()
        .filter((assessment) => assessment.shotType === shotType)
        .slice(0, 6);
      if (!sameShot.length) {
        return { delta: 0, personalBest: true, recentAverage: null, sameShotCount: 0, scoreBonus: 1, consistencyStreak: false };
      }

      const recentAverage = average(sameShot.slice(0, 3).map((assessment) => safeNumber(assessment.overallScore, 0)));
      const bestPrevious = Math.max(...sameShot.map((assessment) => safeNumber(assessment.overallScore, 0)));
      const delta = recentAverage != null ? Math.round(projectedScore - recentAverage) : 0;
      const personalBest = projectedScore > bestPrevious;
      const streakScores = sameShot.slice(0, 3).map((assessment) => safeNumber(assessment.overallScore, 0));
      const consistencyStreak = streakScores.every((score, index, arr) => index === 0 || score >= arr[index - 1] - 2);
      const scoreBonus = clamp((delta > 0 ? delta * 0.18 : 0) + (personalBest ? 2 : 0) + (consistencyStreak ? 1 : 0), 0, 4);

      return {
        delta,
        personalBest,
        recentAverage: recentAverage != null ? Math.round(recentAverage) : null,
        sameShotCount: sameShot.length,
        consistencyStreak,
        scoreBonus
      };
    }

    function getMilestoneSummary(score, level, progressContext) {
      const thresholds = {
        beginner: [
          { id: 'launch', label: 'Launch Pad', min: 60 },
          { id: 'groove', label: 'Groove Builder', min: 70 },
          { id: 'pressure', label: 'Pressure Ready', min: 78 },
          { id: 'match', label: 'Match Builder', min: 86 }
        ],
        intermediate: [
          { id: 'foundation', label: 'Foundation', min: 62 },
          { id: 'groove', label: 'Groove Builder', min: 72 },
          { id: 'pressure', label: 'Pressure Ready', min: 80 },
          { id: 'match', label: 'Competitive Match', min: 88 }
        ],
        advanced: [
          { id: 'competitive', label: 'Competitive Engine', min: 64 },
          { id: 'pressure', label: 'Pressure Ready', min: 76 },
          { id: 'match', label: 'Match Weapon', min: 84 },
          { id: 'elite', label: 'Elite Window', min: 92 }
        ],
        pro: [
          { id: 'tour', label: 'Tour Standard', min: 68 },
          { id: 'pressure', label: 'Pressure Window', min: 80 },
          { id: 'match', label: 'Match Weapon', min: 88 },
          { id: 'elite', label: 'Elite Window', min: 95 }
        ]
      }[level] || [];

      const current = [...thresholds].reverse().find((item) => score >= item.min) || thresholds[0];
      const next = thresholds.find((item) => item.min > score) || null;
      const gapToNext = next ? Math.max(0, next.min - score) : 0;

      return {
        current: current?.label || 'Foundation',
        next: next?.label || 'Peak Band',
        gapToNext,
        momentum: progressContext.personalBest ? 'Personal best unlocked' : progressContext.delta > 0 ? 'Trending up' : 'Hold and stabilize',
        celebration: progressContext.personalBest || progressContext.delta >= 4
      };
    }

    function getAchievementSummary(score, performanceKpis, progressContext) {
      const unlocks = [];
      if (score >= 95) unlocks.push({ id: 'platinum-technique', icon: 'Diamond', label: 'Platinum Technique', copy: 'Elite execution window unlocked.' });
      else if (score >= 85) unlocks.push({ id: 'gold-technique', icon: 'Gold', label: 'Gold Technique', copy: 'High-performance mechanics for your profile.' });
      else if (score >= 75) unlocks.push({ id: 'silver-technique', icon: 'Silver', label: 'Silver Technique', copy: 'Strong repeatable mechanics are showing up.' });
      else if (score >= 60) unlocks.push({ id: 'bronze-technique', icon: 'Bronze', label: 'Bronze Technique', copy: 'Foundation mechanics are now measurable.' });

      if (safeNumber(performanceKpis?.timingConsistency, 0) >= 82) {
        unlocks.push({ id: 'timing-engine', icon: 'Tempo', label: 'Timing Engine', copy: 'Your strike window is staying repeatable across live frames.' });
      }

      if (safeNumber(performanceKpis?.footworkScore, 0) >= 82) {
        unlocks.push({ id: 'base-control', icon: 'Base', label: 'Base Control', copy: 'Your balance and base width are supporting the shot.' });
      }

      if (progressContext?.personalBest) {
        unlocks.push({ id: 'personal-best', icon: 'Peak', label: 'New Peak', copy: 'This session is ahead of your prior best for the same shot.' });
      } else if (safeNumber(progressContext?.delta, 0) >= 4) {
        unlocks.push({ id: 'uptrend', icon: 'Rise', label: 'Trend Up', copy: 'You are moving clearly above your recent average.' });
      }

      return unlocks.slice(0, 4);
    }

    function calculateScore(avgAngles, avgDerivedMetrics, avgLandmarks, avgConfidence, shotType, profile, focusFrames, setupScore) {
      const profileContext = getProfileContext(profile);
      const adjustments = getProfileAdjustments(profileContext);
      const curve = PROFILE_SCORE_CURVE[profileContext.level] || PROFILE_SCORE_CURVE.intermediate;
      const toleranceMultiplier = getProfileToleranceMultiplier(profile, shotType);
      const model = getShotScoringModel(shotType);
      const angleBenchmarks = getBenchmarkForShot(shotType);
      const derivedBenchmarks = model.derivedBenchmarks || {};
      const weights = model.weights || {};
      const comparisons = [];
      let weightedTotal = 0;
      let weightCount = 0;

      Object.entries(weights).forEach(([metric, weight]) => {
        const current = Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(avgAngles || {}, metric)
          ? avgAngles[metric]
          : avgDerivedMetrics?.[metric];
        const benchmark = angleBenchmarks[metric] || derivedBenchmarks[metric];
        const comparison = scoreMetricAgainstBenchmark(metric, current, benchmark, toleranceMultiplier, shotType, profileContext);
        if (!comparison) return;
        comparisons.push(comparison);
        weightedTotal += comparison.score * weight;
        weightCount += weight;
      });

      const biomechanicsScore = weightCount ? Math.round(weightedTotal / weightCount) : 68;
      const performanceKpis = calculatePerformanceKpis(
        focusFrames,
        avgDerivedMetrics,
        avgLandmarks,
        avgConfidence,
        setupScore,
        shotType,
        profileContext
      );
      const readinessScore = Math.round((performanceKpis.readinessIndex * 0.45) + (performanceKpis.trackingReliability * 0.25) + (safeNumber(setupScore, 100) * 0.3));
      const progressContext = getProgressContext(shotType, biomechanicsScore + curve.boost);
      const levelFloor = { beginner: 66, intermediate: 61, advanced: 58, pro: 55 }[profileContext.level] || 60;
      const rawScore = Math.round(
        (biomechanicsScore * 0.62) +
        (performanceKpis.timingConsistency * 0.14) +
        (performanceKpis.footworkScore * 0.08) +
        (performanceKpis.positioningScore * 0.08) +
        (readinessScore * 0.08)
      );

      const overallScore = clamp(
        Math.round(rawScore + curve.boost + progressContext.scoreBonus + (safeNumber(setupScore, 100) >= 90 ? 1 : 0)),
        levelFloor,
        99
      );
      const milestone = getMilestoneSummary(overallScore, profileContext.level, progressContext);
      const achievements = getAchievementSummary(overallScore, performanceKpis, progressContext);

      return {
        overallScore,
        grade: getGrade(overallScore),
        percentile: getPercentile(overallScore, profileContext.level),
        componentScores: {
          biomechanics: biomechanicsScore,
          timing: performanceKpis.timingConsistency,
          footwork: performanceKpis.footworkScore,
          positioning: performanceKpis.positioningScore,
          readiness: readinessScore
        },
        comparisons: comparisons.sort((a, b) => {
          const severity = { 'needs-work': 4, workable: 3, good: 2, excellent: 1 };
          if (severity[a.status] !== severity[b.status]) {
            return severity[b.status] - severity[a.status];
          }
          return Math.abs(b.delta) - Math.abs(a.delta);
        }),
        performanceKpis,
        progressContext,
        milestone,
        achievements,
        scoringMeta: {
          toleranceMultiplier: roundMetric(toleranceMultiplier, 2),
          level: profileContext.level,
          ageMid: profileContext.ageMid,
          ageBucket: adjustments.ageBucket,
          gender: profileContext.gender,
          genderBucket: adjustments.genderBucket,
          levelExpectation: adjustments.levelExpectation
        }
      };
    }

    function getGrade(score) {
      if (score == null || isNaN(score)) return 'N/A';
      if (score >= 95) return 'A+';
      if (score >= 90) return 'A';
      if (score >= 85) return 'A-';
      if (score >= 80) return 'B+';
      if (score >= 75) return 'B';
      if (score >= 70) return 'B-';
      if (score >= 65) return 'C+';
      if (score >= 60) return 'C';
      if (score >= 55) return 'C-';
      return 'D+';
    }

    function getPercentile(score, level = 'intermediate') {
      if (score == null || isNaN(score)) return 0;
      const distributions = {
        beginner: { mean: 55, stdDev: 12 },
        intermediate: { mean: 70, stdDev: 10 },
        advanced: { mean: 82, stdDev: 8 },
        pro: { mean: 92, stdDev: 5 }
      };
      const dist = distributions[level] || distributions.intermediate;
      const z = (score - dist.mean) / dist.stdDev;
      const percentile = 50 * (1 + Math.tanh(z / 1.7));
      return clamp(Math.round(percentile), 1, 99);
    }

    function formatOrdinal(value) {
      const num = safeNumber(value, 0);
      const mod100 = num % 100;
      if (mod100 >= 11 && mod100 <= 13) return `${num}th`;
      switch (num % 10) {
        case 1: return `${num}st`;
        case 2: return `${num}nd`;
        case 3: return `${num}rd`;
        default: return `${num}th`;
      }
    }

    // ============================================================================
    // Session Building
    // ============================================================================
    function buildSession() {
      console.log('ðŸ”¨ buildSession() called');
      console.log('   Total frames:', analysisData.frames.length);
      
      const shotType = playerProfile.shots[0] || 'forehand';
      const focusFrames = selectAssessmentFrames(analysisData.frames, shotType);
      const avgAngles = averageMetricMapFromFrames(focusFrames, Object.keys(analysisData.angles));
      const avgDerivedMetrics = averageMetricMapFromFrames(focusFrames, Object.keys(analysisData.derivedMetrics));

      const avgLandmarks = analysisData.landmarks.length
        ? Math.round(analysisData.landmarks.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0) / analysisData.landmarks.length)
        : 0;

      const avgConfidence = analysisData.confidence.length
        ? Math.round(analysisData.confidence.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0) / analysisData.confidence.length)
        : 0;

      const bench = getBenchmarkForShot(shotType);
      const scoreResult = calculateScore(
        avgAngles,
        avgDerivedMetrics,
        avgLandmarks,
        avgConfidence,
        shotType,
        playerProfile,
        focusFrames,
        playerProfile.setupScore
      );
      const metricComparisons = scoreResult.comparisons;
      const benchmarkSummary = metricComparisons
        .slice(0, 3)
        .map((item) => `${formatMetricName(item.metric)}: ${item.delta > 0 ? '+' : ''}${item.delta}`)
        .join(' â€¢ ');
      const tailoredDrills = store ? store.buildTailoredDrills({
        shotType,
        metricComparisons,
        level: playerProfile.level,
        sessionGoal: playerProfile.sessionGoal || '',
        sessionMode: playerProfile.sessionMode || 'stroke-tune-up'
      }) : [];
      const tailoredTactics = store ? store.getTacticRecommendations({
        shotType,
        metricComparisons,
        level: playerProfile.level,
        sessionGoal: playerProfile.sessionGoal || '',
        sessionMode: playerProfile.sessionMode || 'stroke-tune-up'
      }) : [];

      return {
        profile: playerProfile,
        summary: {
          framesAnalyzed: analysisData.frames.length,
          focusFramesAnalyzed: focusFrames.length,
          avgLandmarks,
          avgConfidence,
          avgAngles,
          avgDerivedMetrics,
          score: scoreResult.overallScore,
          grade: scoreResult.grade,
          percentile: scoreResult.percentile,
          shotType,
          metricComparisons,
          benchmarkSummary,
          tailoredDrills,
          tailoredTactics,
          componentScores: scoreResult.componentScores,
          performanceKpis: scoreResult.performanceKpis,
          progressContext: scoreResult.progressContext,
          milestone: scoreResult.milestone,
          achievements: scoreResult.achievements,
          scoringMeta: scoreResult.scoringMeta,
          sessionMode: playerProfile.sessionMode,
          sessionGoal: playerProfile.sessionGoal,
          setupScore: playerProfile.setupScore
        },
        timestamp: new Date().toISOString()
      };
    }

    function generateReport(session) {
      const s = session.summary;
      const bench = getBenchmarkForShot(s.shotType);
      const topMetrics = [...(s.metricComparisons || [])].sort((a, b) => a.score - b.score).slice(0, 3);
      const strengths = [...(s.metricComparisons || [])].sort((a, b) => b.score - a.score).slice(0, 2);
      const html = `
        <div class="report-header">
          <div class="smartswing-score">${s.score}</div>
          <div class="grade-badge">Grade ${s.grade}</div>
          <div class="percentile">${formatOrdinal(s.percentile)} percentile within ${s.scoringMeta?.level || session.profile.level} peers | ${session.profile.level} | Age ${session.profile.age} | ${session.profile.gender}</div>
          <div style="font-size: 14px; color: var(--gray); margin-top: 14px;">Analysis Date: ${new Date(session.timestamp).toLocaleDateString()} | Shot: ${s.shotType} | Capture quality: ${s.setupScore || 100}%</div>
          <div style="font-size: 16px; margin-top: 12px; color: var(--electric-cyan); font-weight: 800;">Start here: ${topMetrics[0] ? `${formatMetricName(topMetrics[0].metric)} is the biggest gain opportunity in this clip.` : 'This clip is balanced. Keep building repeatability.'}</div>
        </div>
        <div class="report-section">
          <div class="report-section-title">Quick Read</div>
          <div class="metrics-grid">
            <div class="metric-card"><div class="metric-title">Overall Score</div><div class="metric-value-large">${s.score}%</div><div class="metric-label">Short answer: how strong this motion looks for your current level.</div></div>
            <div class="metric-card"><div class="metric-title">Best Strength</div><div class="metric-value-large" style="font-size:30px;">${strengths[0] ? formatMetricName(strengths[0].metric) : 'Balance'}</div><div class="metric-label">${strengths[0] ? `${strengths[0].score}% and helping stroke stability.` : 'Use the next report to confirm a stable strength.'}</div></div>
            <div class="metric-card"><div class="metric-title">Main Priority</div><div class="metric-value-large" style="font-size:30px;">${topMetrics[0] ? formatMetricName(topMetrics[0].metric) : 'Timing'}</div><div class="metric-label">${topMetrics[0] ? `${topMetrics[0].score}% and most responsible for the current cap on performance.` : 'No major red flag detected.'}</div></div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="report-section"><div class="report-section-title">Biomechanics Analysis</div>${generateBiomechanicsInsights(s.avgAngles, bench, s.shotType, s.metricComparisons)}</div>
        <div class="report-section"><div class="report-section-title">Angles and What They Mean</div>${generateAngleComparisons(s.avgAngles, bench, s.shotType, s.metricComparisons)}</div>
        <div class="report-section"><div class="report-section-title">Performance KPIs</div>${generatePerformanceKpisHtml(s)}</div>
        <div class="report-section"><div class="report-section-title">Movement, Footwork, Positioning, and Height</div>${generateDerivedMetricsHtml(s)}</div>
        <div class="report-section"><div class="report-section-title">Coach-ready Summary</div>${generateCoachReadySummaryHtml(s)}</div>
        <div class="report-section"><div class="report-section-title">Tailored Drill Plan</div>${generateTailoredDrillsHtml(s.tailoredDrills || [])}</div>
        <div class="report-section"><div class="report-section-title">Match Tactics for This Session</div>${generateTacticsHtml(s.tailoredTactics || [])}</div>
        <div class="report-section">
          <div class="report-section-title">Next Steps</div>
          <div style="display:grid; gap:10px;">
            <div class="metric-row"><div class="metric-row-label"><strong>1. Keep the next capture comparable</strong><div style="font-size:12px; color:var(--gray); margin-top:4px;">Same shot, same angle, same distance from camera.</div></div></div>
            <div class="metric-row"><div class="metric-row-label"><strong>2. Run the first drill before anything else</strong><div style="font-size:12px; color:var(--gray); margin-top:4px;">Fix the highest-impact mechanical gap before adding more volume.</div></div></div>
            <div class="metric-row"><div class="metric-row-label"><strong>3. Re-test after the next focused session</strong><div style="font-size:12px; color:var(--gray); margin-top:4px;">SmartSwing will show if the same priority moved in the right direction.</div></div></div>
          </div>
        </div>
      `;
      document.getElementById('reportContent').innerHTML = html;
    }

    function buildExpandableInsight(title, score, summary, details, tone = 'cyan') {
      const borderColor = tone === 'green' ? 'rgba(0, 200, 83, 0.28)' : tone === 'orange' ? 'rgba(255, 109, 0, 0.28)' : 'rgba(0, 229, 255, 0.24)';
      return `
        <details style="padding:16px; margin-bottom:12px; background:rgba(10,22,40,0.58); border:1px solid ${borderColor}; border-radius:14px;">
          <summary style="list-style:none; cursor:pointer; display:flex; justify-content:space-between; gap:12px; align-items:flex-start;">
            <div>
              <div style="font-size:12px; text-transform:uppercase; font-weight:800; letter-spacing:0.06em; color:var(--gray);">Tap to expand</div>
              <div style="font-size:18px; font-weight:800; margin-top:4px;">${title}</div>
              <div style="font-size:14px; color:var(--silver); margin-top:8px;">${summary}</div>
            </div>
            <div style="min-width:72px; text-align:right; font-size:24px; font-weight:800; color:var(--electric-cyan);">${score}%</div>
          </summary>
          <div style="margin-top:14px; font-size:14px; line-height:1.7; color:var(--silver);">${details}</div>
        </details>
      `;
    }

    function generateTailoredDrillsHtml(drills) {
      if (!drills.length) {
        return '<div class="info-box">No high-risk deltas detected. Keep using repeatability and pressure drills to maintain form.</div>';
      }

      const hasLibraryAccess = store && currentUser ? store.canAccessLibrary() : false;

      return drills.slice(0, 3).map((drill, index) => buildExpandableInsight(
        `${index + 1}. ${drill.title}`,
        Math.min(100, 72 + (index * 8)),
        `${drill.prescription || drill.focus || 'Targeted drill prescription'} Expected gain: ${drill.expectedImprovement || 'cleaner repeatability'}.`,
        `<strong>Targets:</strong> ${drill.targets?.join(' | ') || 'stroke repeatability'}<br><br><strong>Why this fits:</strong> ${drill.whyThisFits || 'It matches the biggest weakness detected in this report.'}<br><br><strong>Coaching cue:</strong> ${drill.cue || 'Keep the cue simple and repeatable.'}<br><br>${drill.videoUrl ? (hasLibraryAccess ? `<strong>Video:</strong> <a href="${drill.videoUrl}" target="_blank" rel="noopener" style="color: var(--electric-cyan);">${drill.videoTitle || 'Open drill video'}</a>${drill.channel ? ` (${drill.channel})` : ''}` : '<strong>Upgrade note:</strong> Drill video links are unlocked on Performance and Tournament plans.') : ''}`,
        'green'
      )).join('');
    }

    function generateTacticsHtml(tactics) {
      if (!tactics.length) {
        return '<div class="info-box">No tactical recommendations available for this sample. Run another report with match-ready mode enabled.</div>';
      }

      const hasLibraryAccess = store && currentUser ? store.canAccessLibrary() : false;

      return tactics.slice(0, 3).map((tactic, index) => buildExpandableInsight(
        `${index + 1}. ${tactic.title}`,
        Math.min(100, 74 + (index * 7)),
        `${tactic.message || tactic.summary || 'Tactical pattern for the next session.'}`,
        `<strong>Tactical focus:</strong> ${tactic.tacticalFocus?.join(' | ') || tactic.situation || 'general'}<br><br><strong>Expected impact:</strong> ${tactic.expectedImprovement ? Object.values(tactic.expectedImprovement).slice(0, 2).join(' | ') : 'Cleaner point construction and fewer low-value decisions.'}<br><br>${tactic.videoUrl ? (hasLibraryAccess ? `<strong>Video:</strong> <a href="${tactic.videoUrl}" target="_blank" rel="noopener" style="color: var(--electric-cyan);">${tactic.channel || 'Open tactic video'}</a>` : '<strong>Upgrade note:</strong> Full tactics video links are unlocked on Performance and Tournament plans.') : ''}`,
        'cyan'
      )).join('');
    }

    function generateMilestoneHtml(summary) {
      const milestone = summary.milestone || {};
      const progress = summary.progressContext || {};
      return `
        <div class="metrics-grid">
          <div class="metric-card">
            <div class="metric-title">Current Band</div>
            <div class="metric-value-large" style="font-size:36px;">${milestone.current || 'Foundation'}</div>
            <div class="metric-label">${milestone.momentum || 'Build repeatability'}</div>
          </div>
          <div class="metric-card">
            <div class="metric-title">Next Band</div>
            <div class="metric-value-large" style="font-size:36px;">${milestone.next || 'Peak Band'}</div>
            <div class="metric-label">${milestone.gapToNext || 0} points away</div>
          </div>
          <div class="metric-card">
            <div class="metric-title">Progress Delta</div>
            <div class="metric-value-large" style="font-size:36px;">${progress.delta != null ? `${progress.delta > 0 ? '+' : ''}${progress.delta}` : '0'}</div>
            <div class="metric-label">${progress.personalBest ? 'New personal best pace' : 'Vs recent same-shot average'}</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="info-box">
          <strong>Make progress tangible:</strong> Save this report, complete the first drill block, then re-run the same shot from the same camera angle. SmartSwing will measure whether you are closing the ${milestone.gapToNext || 0}-point gap to <strong>${milestone.next || 'the next band'}</strong>.
        </div>
      `;
    }

    function generateAchievementsHtml(summary) {
      const achievements = summary.achievements || [];
      if (!achievements.length) {
        return '<div class="info-box">No achievement unlocked yet. Save this report, repeat the drill block, and re-test the same shot to trigger your next unlock.</div>';
      }

      return `
        <div class="metrics-grid">
          ${achievements.map((item) => `
            <div class="metric-card">
              <div class="metric-title">${item.icon}</div>
              <div class="metric-value-large" style="font-size:32px;">${item.label}</div>
              <div class="metric-label">${item.copy}</div>
            </div>
          `).join('')}
        </div>
      `;
    }

    function generatePerformanceKpisHtml(summary) {
      const kpis = summary.performanceKpis || {};
      const cards = [
        ['Timing consistency', kpis.timingConsistency, 'Your strike window looks repeatable. Higher is better because it means cleaner contact happens more often.', 'Why it matters: timing is the difference between a clean hit and a rushed hit. What to do: repeat the same feed and keep one timing cue active until the miss pattern calms down.'],
        ['Footwork support', kpis.footworkScore, 'Your lower body is either helping the shot or arriving late. Higher is better because it supports balance and spacing.', 'Why it matters: better feet create better contact before the racket even moves. What to do: use split-step and first-move drills before technical stroke work.'],
        ['Positioning quality', kpis.positioningScore, 'This shows how centered and stable you stay through load, contact, and recovery.', 'Why it matters: better positioning lets you swing without compensating. What to do: rehearse recovery routes and keep the same starting position when re-testing.']
      ];
      return cards.map(([label, value, summaryText, detailText]) => buildExpandableInsight(label, Math.min(100, Math.round(value || 0)), summaryText, detailText, 'cyan')).join('');
    }

    function generateDerivedMetricsHtml(summary) {
      const metrics = summary.avgDerivedMetrics || {};
      const cards = [
        ['Movement', summary.performanceKpis?.movementSpeed, `Movement speed index ${Math.round(summary.performanceKpis?.movementSpeed || 0)}%.`, 'How to read it: this reflects how fast the clip demanded movement. Why it matters: if movement load rises but contact falls apart, the footwork pattern is the real bottleneck.'],
        ['Footwork', summary.performanceKpis?.footworkScore, `Footwork support is ${Math.round(summary.performanceKpis?.footworkScore || 0)}%.`, `Base width: ${metrics.stanceWidth ?? '-'} | Balance offset: ${metrics.balance ?? '-'} | Footwork load: ${metrics.footworkLoad ?? '-'}. Focus on arriving earlier so the base is set before the swing.`],
        ['Positioning', summary.performanceKpis?.positioningScore, `Positioning quality is ${Math.round(summary.performanceKpis?.positioningScore || 0)}%.`, `Reach / spacing: ${metrics.reach ?? '-'} | Alignment gap: ${metrics.alignmentGap ?? '-'}. Why it matters: this determines whether you can swing freely or have to compensate.`],
        ['Contact height', summary.performanceKpis?.contactHeightScore, `Contact height score is ${Math.round(summary.performanceKpis?.contactHeightScore || 0)}%.`, `Contact height index: ${metrics.contactHeight ?? '-'} | Shoulder tilt: ${metrics.shoulderTilt ?? '-'} | Hip tilt: ${metrics.hipTilt ?? '-'}. Use it to judge whether you are meeting the ball in the right strike window.`]
      ];
      return cards.map(([label, score, summaryText, detailText]) => buildExpandableInsight(label, Math.min(100, Math.round(score || 0)), summaryText, detailText, 'orange')).join('');
    }

    function generateTrackerDefinitionsHtml() {
      const ordered = ['shoulder', 'elbow', 'hip', 'knee', 'trunk', 'stanceWidth', 'contactHeight', 'reach', 'balance', 'alignmentGap', 'footworkLoad'];
      return ordered.map((metric) => `
        <div style="padding: 14px; margin-bottom: 10px; background: rgba(10, 22, 40, 0.6); border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08); border-radius: 10px;">
          <div style="font-weight: 800; margin-bottom: 6px;">${formatMetricName(metric)}</div>
          <div style="font-size: 14px; color: var(--silver); line-height: 1.6;">${TRACKER_DEFINITIONS[metric]}</div>
        </div>
      `).join('');
    }

    function generateFairnessExplanationHtml(summary) {
      const meta = summary.scoringMeta || {};
      const progress = summary.progressContext || {};
      return `
        <div class="info-box">
          <strong>Why this score is fairer:</strong><br>
          1. SmartSwing starts from elite biomechanics, then shifts the target window to fit your <strong>${meta.level || 'intermediate'}</strong> level expectation.<br>
          2. Age bucket <strong>${meta.ageBucket || '25_34'}</strong>${meta.ageMid ? ` (${meta.ageMid})` : ''} and gender context <strong>${meta.genderBucket || meta.gender || 'unspecified'}</strong> adjust power and flexibility expectations before scoring.<br>
          3. The final score blends biomechanics, timing consistency, footwork, positioning, readiness, and momentum instead of punishing one angle in isolation.<br>
          4. Progress is rewarded: ${progress.personalBest ? 'this sample is pacing above your previous best for this shot.' : progress.delta > 0 ? `you are ${progress.delta} points above your recent same-shot average.` : 'the model is asking for stability before pushing the next score jump.'}
        </div>
      `;
    }

    function generateCoachReadySummaryHtml(summary) {
      const ranked = [...(summary.metricComparisons || [])]
        .sort((a, b) => Math.abs(b.delta) - Math.abs(a.delta))
        .slice(0, 3);
      const urgency = summary.performanceKpis?.readinessIndex < 65 ? 'High' : summary.performanceKpis?.readinessIndex < 80 ? 'Medium' : 'Low';
      const nextSessionFocus = ranked[0]
        ? `${formatMetricName(ranked[0].metric)} correction and contact timing`
        : `${summary.shotType} repeatability under pressure`;
      const accountability = (summary.setupScore || 100) < 80
        ? 'Capture quality dropped below 80/100. Re-record with corrected setup before coach review.'
        : 'Capture quality is reliable enough for coach progression checks.';

      const intro = `<div class="metric-card" style="margin-bottom:12px;"><div class="metric-title">Coach snapshot</div><div class="metric-label">Urgency: ${urgency} | Session mode: ${summary.sessionMode || 'stroke-tune-up'} | Player goal: ${summary.sessionGoal || 'General improvement'} | Next coach focus: ${nextSessionFocus}</div><div class="metric-label" style="margin-top:10px;">${accountability}</div></div>`;
      const priorities = ranked.length ? ranked.map((item, index) => buildExpandableInsight(`Priority ${index + 1}: ${formatMetricName(item.metric)}`, Math.min(100, Math.round(item.score || 0)), `${item.delta > 0 ? 'Above' : 'Below'} target by ${Math.abs(item.delta || 0)} degrees.`, `Why this matters: ${TRACKER_DEFINITIONS[item.metric] || 'This metric drives stroke quality.'}<br><br><strong>How to interpret:</strong> This priority is large enough to change consistency and ball quality, not just aesthetics.<br><br><strong>What to do next:</strong> Use the first drill recommendation, then re-check the same shot from the same camera angle before the next coach review.`, 'green')).join('') : '<div class="metric-card"><div class="metric-label">No high-risk deltas detected in this session.</div></div>';
      return `${intro}${priorities}`;
    }

    function generateExecutionPlanHtml(summary) {
      const ranked = [...(summary.metricComparisons || [])]
        .sort((a, b) => Math.abs(b.delta) - Math.abs(a.delta))
        .slice(0, 2);
      const primary = formatMetricName(ranked[0]?.metric || 'timing');
      const secondary = formatMetricName(ranked[1]?.metric || 'consistency');
      const focusDrill = summary.tailoredDrills?.[0]?.title || `${summary.shotType} precision drill`;
      const supportDrill = summary.tailoredDrills?.[1]?.title || `${summary.shotType} repeatability block`;

      const plan = [
        {
          day: 'Day 1',
          objective: `Baseline reset on ${primary}`,
          action: `Run 3 controlled sets focused on ${primary}. Execute: ${focusDrill}.`,
          checkpoint: 'Re-record 1 short clip and confirm cleaner movement pattern.'
        },
        {
          day: 'Day 3',
          objective: `Add ${secondary} under movement`,
          action: `Run footwork + stroke block, then 2 pressure sets. Execute: ${supportDrill}.`,
          checkpoint: 'Compare confidence and angle deltas against Day 1 clip.'
        },
        {
          day: 'Day 5',
          objective: 'Transfer to match-like tempo',
          action: `Run point-start drills at game speed. Keep one technical cue active: ${primary}.`,
          checkpoint: 'Log misses caused by mechanics vs decision errors.'
        },
        {
          day: 'Day 7',
          objective: 'Verification and coach handoff',
          action: 'Run full analyzer session and save report.',
          checkpoint: 'Use coach summary to define next week priority.'
        }
      ];

      return `
        <div style="display:grid; gap:10px;">
          ${plan.map((item) => `
            <div style="padding:14px; border-radius:12px; border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1); background: rgba(10,22,40,0.56);">
              <div style="font-size:12px; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.06em; color:var(--electric-cyan); font-weight:800;">${item.day}</div>
              <div style="font-size:16px; font-weight:800; margin-top:4px;">${item.objective}</div>
              <div style="font-size:14px; margin-top:6px;"><strong>Action:</strong> ${item.action}</div>
              <div style="font-size:14px; margin-top:6px;"><strong>Checkpoint:</strong> ${item.checkpoint}</div>
            </div>
          `).join('')}
        </div>
      `;
    }

    function generateAngleComparisons(avgAngles, bench, shotType) {
      if (!avgAngles || Object.keys(avgAngles).length === 0) {
        return '<p>No angle data available. Please ensure your full body is visible in the video.</p>';
      }

      let html = '';
      
      const angleOrder = ['shoulder', 'elbow', 'hip', 'knee', 'trunk', 'wrist'];
      
      for (const angleName of angleOrder) {
        if (avgAngles[angleName] == null) continue;
        
        const yourAngle = avgAngles[angleName];
        const optimal = bench[angleName]?.optimal;
        const minBench = bench[angleName]?.min;
        const maxBench = bench[angleName]?.max;
        
        if (!optimal) continue;
        
        const diff = yourAngle - optimal;
        const absDiff = Math.abs(diff);
        
        let status, statusColor, statusIcon;
        if (absDiff <= 5) {
          status = 'Excellent';
          statusColor = 'var(--neon-green)';
          statusIcon = 'âœ“';
        } else if (absDiff <= 10) {
          status = 'Good';
          statusColor = 'var(--electric-cyan)';
          statusIcon = 'â—‹';
        } else {
          status = 'Needs Work';
          statusColor = 'var(--warning)';
          statusIcon = 'â–³';
        }
        
        html += `
          <div class="metric-row">
            <div class="metric-row-label">
              <strong>${angleName.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + angleName.slice(1)}</strong>
              <div style="font-size: 12px; color: var(--gray); margin-top: 4px;">
                Pro range: ${minBench}Â° - ${maxBench}Â° (optimal: ${optimal}Â°)
              </div>
            </div>
            <div class="metric-row-value" style="text-align: right;">
              <div style="font-size: 24px; font-weight: 800;">${yourAngle}Â°</div>
              <div style="font-size: 14px; color: ${statusColor}; margin-top: 4px;">
                ${statusIcon} ${status}
                ${diff !== 0 ? `<span style="font-size: 12px; margin-left: 8px;">(${diff > 0 ? '+' : ''}${diff}Â°)</span>` : ''}
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        `;
      }
      
      return html || '<p>Insufficient angle data for comparison.</p>';
    }

    function generateAngleComparisons(avgAngles, bench, shotType, metricComparisons = []) {
      if (!avgAngles || Object.keys(avgAngles).length === 0) {
        return '<p>No angle data available. Please ensure your full body is visible in the video.</p>';
      }

      const angleOrder = ['shoulder', 'elbow', 'hip', 'knee', 'trunk'];
      const cards = angleOrder
        .filter((metric) => avgAngles[metric] != null && bench[metric]?.optimal != null)
        .map((metric) => {
          const comparison = metricComparisons.find((item) => item.metric === metric) || null;
          const current = avgAngles[metric];
          const optimal = comparison?.target ?? bench[metric].optimal;
          const minRange = comparison?.min ?? bench[metric].min;
          const maxRange = comparison?.max ?? bench[metric].max;
          const diff = comparison ? comparison.delta : current - optimal;
          const score = Math.min(100, Math.max(40, Math.round(comparison?.score ?? (100 - Math.abs(diff)))));
          const status = comparison?.status || 'workable';
          const fitLabel = status === 'excellent'
            ? 'inside the strongest part of the target window'
            : status === 'good'
              ? 'close to the target window'
              : status === 'needs-work'
                ? 'far enough from target to affect ball quality'
                : 'playable, but still leaving points on the table';
          const direction = diff > 0 ? 'above' : diff < 0 ? 'below' : 'on';

          return buildExpandableInsight(
            `${formatMetricName(metric)}`,
            score,
            `${current} deg. Personalized target window ${minRange} to ${maxRange} deg. This sits ${direction} the center target and is ${fitLabel}.`,
            `<strong>What it means:</strong> ${TRACKER_DEFINITIONS[metric] || 'This angle affects how the stroke transfers force and stays repeatable.'}<br><br><strong>How to interpret it:</strong> Your average was <strong>${current} deg</strong>, while your current target is <strong>${optimal} deg</strong>. That is a difference of <strong>${diff > 0 ? '+' : ''}${diff} deg</strong>.<br><br><strong>Why it matters:</strong> The farther this drifts from the target window, the more likely you are to compensate with timing, balance, or contact quality.<br><br><strong>Best next move:</strong> Use the first drill recommendation attached to this report and re-test the same shot from the same camera angle.`,
            'cyan'
          );
        });

      return cards.join('') || '<p>Insufficient angle data for comparison.</p>';
    }

    function generateBiomechanicsInsights(avgAngles, bench, shotType, metricComparisons = []) {
      const ranked = (metricComparisons && metricComparisons.length
        ? metricComparisons
        : ['shoulder', 'elbow', 'hip', 'knee', 'trunk']
          .filter((metric) => avgAngles[metric] != null && bench[metric]?.optimal != null)
          .map((metric) => {
            const delta = Math.round(avgAngles[metric] - bench[metric].optimal);
            return {
              metric,
              delta,
              score: Math.max(45, 100 - Math.abs(delta)),
              status: Math.abs(delta) <= 5 ? 'excellent' : Math.abs(delta) <= 10 ? 'good' : 'needs-work'
            };
          }))
        .sort((a, b) => {
          const severityA = a.status === 'needs-work' ? 3 : a.status === 'workable' ? 2 : a.status === 'good' ? 1 : 0;
          const severityB = b.status === 'needs-work' ? 3 : b.status === 'workable' ? 2 : b.status === 'good' ? 1 : 0;
          if (severityA !== severityB) return severityB - severityA;
          return Math.abs(b.delta || 0) - Math.abs(a.delta || 0);
        })
        .slice(0, 3);

      if (!ranked.length) {
        return buildExpandableInsight(
          'Biomechanics snapshot',
          78,
          'The current clip shows enough structure to coach from, but more frames from the same setup will make the priorities sharper.',
          'Why this matters: biomechanics feedback becomes more useful when the camera angle, body visibility, and shot repetition stay consistent across sessions.',
          'green'
        );
      }

      return ranked.map((item, index) => {
        const current = avgAngles[item.metric];
        const optimal = bench[item.metric]?.optimal;
        const trendCopy = item.delta > 0
          ? `${formatMetricName(item.metric)} is running ahead of target, which can make the stroke leak early or lose shape.`
          : item.delta < 0
            ? `${formatMetricName(item.metric)} is coming in below target, which can hold back power and spacing.`
            : `${formatMetricName(item.metric)} is right on target and is supporting the stroke well.`;
        return buildExpandableInsight(
          `Priority ${index + 1}: ${formatMetricName(item.metric)}`,
          Math.min(100, Math.round(item.score || 0)),
          `${trendCopy} Current average ${current ?? '-'} deg versus target ${optimal ?? '-'} deg.`,
          `<strong>Why this matters:</strong> ${TRACKER_DEFINITIONS[item.metric] || 'This metric influences how the stroke transfers force and stays repeatable.'}<br><br><strong>How to interpret it:</strong> In this ${shotType} sample, the deviation was <strong>${item.delta > 0 ? '+' : ''}${item.delta || 0} deg</strong>. That size is large enough to change contact quality, not just the look of the swing.<br><br><strong>What to do:</strong> Fix this before chasing speed or score. Start with the top drill recommendation, then re-test the same shot and compare the next report side by side.`,
          'green'
        );
      }).join('');
    }

    function generateBiomechanicsInsightsLegacy(avgAngles, bench, shotType) {
      const insights = [];
      
      // Shoulder analysis
      if (avgAngles.shoulder != null && bench.shoulder) {
        const diff = avgAngles.shoulder - bench.shoulder.optimal;
        if (Math.abs(diff) <= 5) {
          insights.push({
            title: 'Shoulder Rotation',
            icon: 'âœ“',
            color: 'var(--success)',
            text: `Your shoulder rotation (${avgAngles.shoulder}Â°) is optimal for ${shotType}. This indicates good unit turn and preparation.`
          });
        } else if (diff > 10) {
          insights.push({
            title: 'Shoulder Over-Rotation',
            icon: 'âš ',
            color: 'var(--warning)',
            text: `Your shoulder is rotating ${diff}Â° beyond optimal. This may cause inconsistency and loss of control.`
          });
        } else if (diff < -10) {
          insights.push({
            title: 'Limited Shoulder Turn',
            icon: 'âš ',
            color: 'var(--warning)',
            text: `Your shoulder rotation is ${Math.abs(diff)}Â° below optimal. Increasing your turn will generate more power.`
          });
        }
      }
      
      // Elbow analysis
      if (avgAngles.elbow != null && bench.elbow) {
        const diff = avgAngles.elbow - bench.elbow.optimal;
        if (Math.abs(diff) <= 5) {
          insights.push({
            title: 'Elbow Position',
            icon: 'âœ“',
            color: 'var(--success)',
            text: `Excellent arm extension at contact (${avgAngles.elbow}Â°). This promotes racquet head speed and control.`
          });
        } else if (diff < -10) {
          insights.push({
            title: 'Elbow Too Bent',
            icon: 'âš ',
            color: 'var(--warning)',
            text: `Your elbow is ${Math.abs(diff)}Â° more bent than optimal. Work on extending through contact for more power.`
          });
        }
      }
      
      // Knee analysis
      if (avgAngles.knee != null && bench.knee) {
        const diff = avgAngles.knee - bench.knee.optimal;
        if (Math.abs(diff) <= 5) {
          insights.push({
            title: 'Leg Drive',
            icon: 'âœ“',
            color: 'var(--success)',
            text: `Good knee flexion (${avgAngles.knee}Â°) for explosive leg drive. This generates power from the ground up.`
          });
        } else if (diff > 15) {
          insights.push({
            title: 'Legs Too Straight',
            icon: 'âš ',
            color: 'var(--warning)',
            text: `Your knees are too straight (${avgAngles.knee}Â°). Add more bend for explosive power and better balance.`
          });
        } else if (diff < -15) {
          insights.push({
            title: 'Excessive Knee Bend',
            icon: 'âš ',
            color: 'var(--warning)',
            text: `Your knees are overly bent. Practice driving upward through the ball for more power transfer.`
          });
        }
      }
      
      // Trunk analysis
      if (avgAngles.trunk != null && bench.trunk) {
        const diff = avgAngles.trunk - bench.trunk.optimal;
        if (Math.abs(diff) <= 5) {
          insights.push({
            title: 'Core Rotation',
            icon: 'âœ“',
            color: 'var(--success)',
            text: `Excellent trunk rotation (${avgAngles.trunk}Â°). Your core is generating good rotational power.`
          });
        }
      }
      
      if (insights.length === 0) {
        insights.push({
          title: 'Biomechanics Analysis',
          icon: 'ðŸ“Š',
          color: 'var(--electric-cyan)',
          text: 'Your technique shows a mix of strengths and areas for improvement. Focus on the angles marked as "Needs Work" for best results.'
        });
      }
      
      return insights.map(insight => `
        <div style="padding: 16px; margin-bottom: 12px; background: rgba(57, 255, 20, 0.05); border-left: 3px solid ${insight.color}; border-radius: 8px;">
          <div style="font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 8px; color: ${insight.color};">
            ${insight.icon} ${insight.title}
          </div>
          <div style="font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.6; color: var(--silver);">
            ${insight.text}
          </div>
        </div>
      `).join('');
    }

    function generateRecommendations(avgAngles, bench, shotType) {
      const recommendations = [];
      
      for (const angleName in avgAngles) {
        if (!bench[angleName]) continue;
        
        const value = avgAngles[angleName];
        const optimal = bench[angleName].optimal;
        const diff = value - optimal;
        
        if (Math.abs(diff) > 10) {
          let drill = '';
          
          switch(angleName) {
            case 'shoulder':
              drill = diff > 0 ? 
                'Practice compact unit turns. Drill: Shadow swings focusing on controlled rotation, use mirror to check position.' :
                'Increase shoulder turn. Drill: Medicine ball rotations, practice full coiling with resistance bands.';
              break;
            case 'elbow':
              drill = diff > 0 ?
                'Control arm extension. Drill: Wall drills focusing on contact point, avoid over-reaching.' :
                'Extend through contact. Drill: Practice hitting against a wall, focus on arm extension at impact point.';
              break;
            case 'hip':
              drill = diff > 0 ?
                'Reduce excessive hip rotation. Drill: Split-step drills, practice stable base with controlled rotation.' :
                'Increase hip rotation. Drill: Medicine ball twists, explosive hip rotation exercises.';
              break;
            case 'knee':
              drill = diff > 0 ?
                'Add more knee bend. Drill: Squat position practice, explosive leg drive exercises, box jumps.' :
                'Drive upward through legs. Drill: Vertical jump practice, explosive push-off drills.';
              break;
            case 'trunk':
              drill = diff > 0 ?
                'Control trunk rotation. Drill: Core stability exercises, practice smooth rotation without over-twisting.' :
                'Increase core rotation. Drill: Russian twists, medicine ball slams, torso rotation exercises.';
              break;
            case 'wrist':
              drill = 'Practice wrist lag drills. Focus on maintaining proper wrist position through contact.';
              break;
          }
          
          if (drill) {
            recommendations.push({
              angle: angleName.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + angleName.slice(1),
              current: value,
              optimal: optimal,
              diff: diff,
              drill: drill
            });
          }
        }
      }
      
      if (recommendations.length === 0) {
        return `
          <div class="info-box" style="background: rgba(57, 255, 20, 0.1); border-left-color: var(--neon-green);">
            <strong>Excellent Biomechanics</strong><br>
            All your angles are within 10deg of professional benchmarks. 
            Focus on consistency and building muscle memory through repetition.<br><br>
            <strong>Maintain your form with:</strong><br>
            - Regular practice sessions<br>
            - Video analysis every 2-3 weeks<br>
            - Strength and conditioning work<br>
            - Match play to test under pressure
          </div>
        `;
      }
      
      // Sort by impact (largest deviation first)
      recommendations.sort((a, b) => Math.abs(b.diff) - Math.abs(a.diff));
      
      let html = '<div style="font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.8; margin-bottom: 16px;"><strong>Priority Focus Areas (sorted by impact):</strong></div>';
      
      recommendations.slice(0, 3).forEach((rec, idx) => {
        html += `
          <div style="padding: 16px; margin-bottom: 12px; background: rgba(10, 22, 40, 0.6); border: 1px solid rgba(57, 255, 20, 0.15); border-radius: 12px;">
            <div style="font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 8px; color: var(--neon-green);">
              ${idx + 1}. ${rec.angle}: ${rec.current}deg (Target: ${rec.optimal}deg, Deviation: ${rec.diff > 0 ? '+' : ''}${rec.diff}deg)
            </div>
            <div style="font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.6;">
              <strong>Recommended Drill:</strong> ${rec.drill}
            </div>
          </div>
        `;
      });
      
      if (recommendations.length > 3) {
        html += `<div style="font-size: 12px; color: var(--gray); margin-top: 12px;">+ ${recommendations.length - 3} more areas identified. Focus on the top 3 first for best results.</div>`;
      }
      
      return html;
    }

    // UI Event Handlers
    document.querySelectorAll('.setup-check').forEach(input => {
      input.addEventListener('change', refreshSetupScore);
    });

    document.getElementById('sessionMode').addEventListener('change', (event) => {
      playerProfile.sessionMode = event.target.value;
      renderCaptureGuidance();
    });

    document.getElementById('sessionGoal').addEventListener('input', (event) => {
      playerProfile.sessionGoal = event.target.value;
    });

    refreshSetupScore();
    refreshPlanStrip();
    applyActionPermissions();

    document.querySelectorAll('.selection-card').forEach(card => {
      card.addEventListener('click', () => {
        const field = card.dataset.field;
        const value = card.dataset.value;

        if (field === 'shot') {
          card.classList.toggle('selected');
          const index = playerProfile.shots.indexOf(value);
          if (index === -1) {
            playerProfile.shots.push(value);
          } else {
            playerProfile.shots.splice(index, 1);
          }
          renderCaptureGuidance();
        } else {
          document.querySelectorAll(`[data-field="${field}"]`).forEach(c => c.classList.remove('selected'));
          card.classList.add('selected');
          playerProfile[field] = value;
        }
      });
    });

    function setStep(step) {
      currentStep = step;
      
      document.querySelectorAll('.wizard-step').forEach(el => {
        const stepNum = parseInt(el.dataset.step);
        el.classList.remove('active', 'completed');
        if (stepNum === step) el.classList.add('active');
        if (stepNum < step) el.classList.add('completed');
        
        const circle = el.querySelector('.step-circle');
        circle.textContent = stepNum < step ? 'OK' : stepNum;
      });

      document.querySelectorAll('.step-content').forEach(el => {
        el.classList.toggle('active', parseInt(el.dataset.step) === step);
      });
    }

    document.getElementById('nextBtn1').addEventListener('click', () => {
      if (!playerProfile.gender || !playerProfile.age || !playerProfile.level) {
        alert('Please complete all selections');
        return;
      }
      setStep(2);
    });

    document.getElementById('backBtn1').addEventListener('click', () => setStep(1));

    document.getElementById('nextBtn2').addEventListener('click', () => {
      if (playerProfile.shots.length === 0) {
        alert('Please select at least one shot type');
        return;
      }
      setStep(3);
    });

    document.getElementById('backBtn2').addEventListener('click', () => setStep(2));

    const uploadZone = document.getElementById('uploadZone');
    const videoInput = document.getElementById('videoInput');
    const nextBtn3 = document.getElementById('nextBtn3');

    uploadZone.addEventListener('click', () => videoInput.click());

    videoInput.addEventListener('change', (e) => {
      const file = e.target.files[0];
      if (file) {
        playerProfile.videoFile = file;
        document.getElementById('fileName').textContent = `OK ${file.name}`;
        nextBtn3.disabled = false;
      }
    });

    document.getElementById('nextBtn3').addEventListener('click', async () => {
      if (playerProfile.setupScore < 70) {
        const proceed = window.confirm('Setup score is below 70/100. Continue anyway? Low capture quality can reduce feedback accuracy.');
        if (!proceed) return;
      }
      setStep(4);
      await startAnalysis();
    });

    document.getElementById('backBtn3').addEventListener('click', () => setStep(3));
    document.getElementById('demoReportBtn').addEventListener('click', runDemoReport);

    function applyDemoProfileFromParams(params) {
      const normalizedShot = String(params.get('shot') || '').trim().toLowerCase();
      const supportedShots = ['forehand', 'backhand', 'serve', 'volley', 'slice', 'drop-shot', 'lob'];
      if (supportedShots.includes(normalizedShot)) {
        playerProfile.shots = [normalizedShot];
      }

      const level = String(params.get('level') || '').trim().toLowerCase();
      if (['beginner', 'intermediate', 'advanced', 'pro'].includes(level)) {
        playerProfile.level = level;
      }

      const gender = String(params.get('gender') || '').trim().toLowerCase();
      if (gender) playerProfile.gender = gender;

      const age = String(params.get('age') || '').trim();
      if (age) playerProfile.age = age;

      const goal = String(params.get('goal') || '').trim();
      if (goal) playerProfile.sessionGoal = goal;

      const mode = String(params.get('mode') || '').trim();
      if (mode) playerProfile.sessionMode = mode;
    }

    function runDemoReport() {
      if (!playerProfile.gender) playerProfile.gender = 'male';
      if (!playerProfile.age) playerProfile.age = '21-25';
      if (!playerProfile.level) playerProfile.level = 'intermediate';
      if (!playerProfile.shots.length) playerProfile.shots = ['forehand'];
      if (!playerProfile.sessionGoal) playerProfile.sessionGoal = 'Improve consistency under pressure.';
      applyDemoProfileFromParams(new URLSearchParams(window.location.search));

      const shotType = playerProfile.shots[0] || 'forehand';
      const bench = getBenchmarkForShot(shotType);
      const model = getShotScoringModel(shotType);
      const metrics = Object.keys(analysisData.angles);
      const derivedMetricKeys = Object.keys(analysisData.derivedMetrics);

      analysisData.landmarks = Array.from({ length: 90 }, () => 16 + Math.round(Math.random()));
      analysisData.confidence = Array.from({ length: 90 }, () => 87 + Math.round(Math.random() * 9));

      metrics.forEach((metric) => {
        const benchmark = bench[metric]?.optimal ?? 150;
        const drift = metric === 'knee' ? -12 : metric === 'shoulder' ? 9 : metric === 'hip' ? 13 : 4;
        analysisData.angles[metric] = Array.from({ length: 90 }, (_, i) => {
          const wave = Math.sin(i / 9) * 2;
          return Math.round(benchmark + drift + wave);
        });
      });

      derivedMetricKeys.forEach((metric) => {
        const benchmark = model.derivedBenchmarks?.[metric]?.optimal ?? 72;
        const drift = metric === 'balance' ? 3 : metric === 'footworkLoad' ? -4 : 5;
        analysisData.derivedMetrics[metric] = Array.from({ length: 90 }, (_, i) => {
          const wave = Math.cos(i / 8) * 3;
          return Math.round(benchmark + drift + wave);
        });
      });

      analysisData.frames = Array.from({ length: 90 }, (_, index) => {
        const angles = {};
        const derivedMetrics = {};
        metrics.forEach((metric) => {
          angles[metric] = analysisData.angles[metric][index];
        });
        derivedMetricKeys.forEach((metric) => {
          derivedMetrics[metric] = analysisData.derivedMetrics[metric][index];
        });

        return {
          timestamp: index / 30,
          landmarks: analysisData.landmarks[index],
          confidence: analysisData.confidence[index],
          poseMotion: 6 + Math.sin(index / 5) * 2,
          angles,
          derivedMetrics
        };
      });

      document.getElementById('framesCount').textContent = String(analysisData.frames.length);
      document.getElementById('landmarksCount').textContent = String(Math.round(analysisData.landmarks.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0) / analysisData.landmarks.length));
      document.getElementById('confidenceValue').textContent = `${Math.round(analysisData.confidence.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0) / analysisData.confidence.length)}%`;

      const angleMap = [
        ['shoulder', 'angleShoulder'],
        ['elbow', 'angleElbow'],
        ['hip', 'angleHip'],
        ['knee', 'angleKnee'],
        ['trunk', 'angleTrunk'],
        ['wrist', 'angleWrist']
      ];

      angleMap.forEach(([metric, id]) => {
        const values = analysisData.angles[metric] || [];
        const avg = values.length ? Math.round(values.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0) / values.length) : 0;
        document.getElementById(id).textContent = formatAngle(avg);
      });

      const session = buildSession();
      const persisted = persistSession(session);
      if (persisted && store?.uploadSessionArtifacts && playerProfile.videoFile) {
        store.uploadSessionArtifacts(persisted.id, {
          videoFile: playerProfile.videoFile
        }).catch(() => {});
      }
      generateReport(session);
      setStep(5);
    }

    async function startAnalysis() {
      const video = document.getElementById('videoElement');
      const canvas = document.getElementById('poseCanvas');
      const playBtn = document.getElementById('playBtn');
      const pauseBtn = document.getElementById('pauseBtn');
      const file = playerProfile.videoFile;

      // Reset
      analysisData.frames = [];
      for (const k in analysisData.angles) {
        analysisData.angles[k] = [];
      }
      for (const k in analysisData.derivedMetrics) {
        analysisData.derivedMetrics[k] = [];
      }
      analysisData.landmarks = [];
      analysisData.confidence = [];
      lastPersistedSignature = null;
      lastStableKeypoints = [];
      lastMetricKeypoints = [];
      lastUiRefreshAt = 0;
      lastAngleUiRefreshAt = 0;
      lastDrawAt = 0;
      clearAnalyzerLoop(video);
      playBtn.disabled = true;
      pauseBtn.style.display = 'none';
      playBtn.style.display = 'inline-block';

      if (!file) {
        setStatus('No video selected. Upload a clip to start analysis.', 'error');
        playBtn.disabled = true;
        return;
      }

      let metadataResolved = false;
      const metadataReady = new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
        const timeout = setTimeout(() => {
          video.removeEventListener('loadedmetadata', onLoadedMetadata);
          video.removeEventListener('error', onError);
          reject(new Error('Video metadata timeout.'));
        }, AI_SETTINGS.metadataTimeoutMs);

        const onLoadedMetadata = () => {
          metadataResolved = true;
          clearTimeout(timeout);
          video.removeEventListener('error', onError);
          resolve();
        };
        const onError = () => {
          clearTimeout(timeout);
          video.removeEventListener('loadedmetadata', onLoadedMetadata);
          reject(new Error('Video metadata unavailable.'));
        };
        video.addEventListener('loadedmetadata', onLoadedMetadata, { once: true });
        video.addEventListener('error', onError, { once: true });
      });

      setStatus('Initializing AI core...', 'loading');
      const aiInitPromise = initPoseEngine();

      if (activeVideoUrl) {
        URL.revokeObjectURL(activeVideoUrl);
      }
      activeVideoUrl = URL.createObjectURL(file);
      video.src = activeVideoUrl;
      video.load();

      try {
        if (!metadataResolved && video.readyState >= 1) {
          metadataResolved = true;
        } else {
          await metadataReady;
        }
      } catch {
        setStatus('Video failed to load. Re-upload a supported MP4/MOV clip.', 'error');
        playBtn.disabled = true;
        return;
      }

      syncCanvasToViewport();
      lastFrameAt = 0;
      lastAnalyzedVideoTime = -1;

      const aiReady = await aiInitPromise;
      if (!aiReady) {
        setStatus('AI failed to initialize. Use Retry AI Setup and try again.', 'error');
        playBtn.disabled = true;
      }
    }

    document.getElementById('playBtn').addEventListener('click', async () => {
      const video = document.getElementById('videoElement');
      
      if (!detector) {
        alert('AI not ready yet. Click "Retry AI Setup" and try again.');
        return;
      }

      try {
        await video.play();
      } catch (error) {
        setStatus('Unable to play video. Re-upload clip and try again.', 'error');
        return;
      }
      isAnalyzing = true;
      lastFrameAt = 0;
      lastAnalyzedVideoTime = -1;
      lastUiRefreshAt = 0;
      lastAngleUiRefreshAt = 0;
      lastDrawAt = 0;
      lastMetricKeypoints = [];
      
      document.getElementById('playBtn').style.display = 'none';
      document.getElementById('pauseBtn').style.display = 'inline-block';
      clearAnalyzerLoop(video);
      
      analyzeFrame();
    });
