  <script>
    const store = window.SmartSwingStore;
    const access = store.getAccessContext();
    const user = access.user;
    if (!user) window.location.href = './login.html';
    if (store.isOnboardingRequired?.(user.id)) {
      window.location.href = store.getOnboardingRoute(user);
    }
    if (access.canAccessCoachDashboard) document.getElementById('coachNavBtn').classList.remove('hide');

    const metrics = store.getDashboardMetrics(user.id);
    const assessments = store.getVisibleAssessmentsForCurrentUser(user.id);
    const latest = assessments[0] || null;
    const focusAreas = store.getRecommendedFocusAreas(user.id);
    const sessions = store.getVisibleCoachSessionsForCurrentUser(user.id);
    const drills = latest?.tailoredDrills || [];
    const tactics = latest?.tailoredTactics || [];
    const messages = store.getVisibleMessagesForCurrentUser(user.id);
    const messageTargets = store.getMessagingTargets(user.id);
    const progressEvents = store.getProgressEvents().filter((e) => e.userId === user.id).slice(0, 6);

    document.querySelectorAll('.tab').forEach((button) => {
      button.addEventListener('click', () => {
        document.querySelectorAll('.tab').forEach((el) => el.classList.remove('active'));
        document.querySelectorAll('.tab-panel').forEach((el) => el.classList.remove('active'));
        button.classList.add('active');
        document.getElementById(`tab-${button.dataset.tab}`).classList.add('active');
      });
    });

    const avatar = document.getElementById('avatar');
    avatar.textContent = (user.fullName || 'Player').charAt(0).toUpperCase();
    if (user.avatarDataUrl) {
      avatar.style.backgroundImage = `url(${user.avatarDataUrl})`;
      avatar.textContent = '';
    }
    document.getElementById('userName').textContent = user.fullName || 'Player';
    const billingLabel = access.plan.id === 'free' ? 'free' : (access.plan.billingInterval === 'yearly' ? 'yearly' : 'monthly');
    document.getElementById('userMeta').textContent = `${access.plan.name}${access.isTrial ? ' trial' : ''} | ${billingLabel} | ${access.usage.used}/${Number.isFinite(access.usage.limit) ? access.usage.limit : 'Unlimited'} reports used`;

    document.getElementById('stats').innerHTML = [
      ['Average score', `${metrics.avgScore}%`],
      ['Best score', `${metrics.bestScore}%`],
      ['Improvement', `${metrics.improvement > 0 ? '+' : ''}${metrics.improvement}`],
      ['Readiness', `${latest?.performanceKpis?.readinessIndex || 0}%`]
    ].map(([label, value]) => `<div class="card stat"><div class="mini">${label}</div><div class="value">${value}</div></div>`).join('');

    const firstFocus = focusAreas[0];
    document.getElementById('heroTitle').textContent = firstFocus ? `${firstFocus.metric.replace(/^\w/, (c) => c.toUpperCase())} is the cleanest next gain.` : 'Your next report should stay comparable.';
    document.getElementById('heroCopy').textContent = latest?.coachSummary?.nextCoachFocus || 'Keep the same shot and camera setup so SmartSwing can compare movement quality fairly.';

    document.getElementById('weeklyPlan').innerHTML = [
      { title: 'Repeat the same camera setup', copy: 'This reduces noise and makes your score trend meaningful.', score: latest?.setupScore || 88 },
      { title: drills[0]?.title || 'Primary drill block', copy: drills[0]?.prescription || 'Run the first recommended drill for 10-15 minutes.', score: latest?.metricComparisons?.[0]?.score || 76 },
      { title: tactics[0]?.title || 'Primary match pattern', copy: tactics[0]?.summary || 'Rehearse one tactical pattern linked to the report.', score: latest?.performanceKpis?.timingConsistency || 74 }
    ].map((item, i) => `<details class="detail-card" ${i === 0 ? 'open' : ''}><summary><div><div class="mini">Step ${i + 1}</div><h3>${item.title}</h3></div><div class="pill">${Math.min(100, Math.round(item.score || 0))}%</div></summary><div class="detail-body">${item.copy}</div></details>`).join('');

    document.getElementById('topFeedback').innerHTML = (focusAreas.length ? focusAreas : (latest?.metricComparisons || []).slice(0, 3)).slice(0, 3).map((item) => {
      const label = (item.metric || 'timing').replace(/^\w/, (c) => c.toUpperCase());
      const score = Math.min(100, Math.round(item.score || 72));
      return `<details class="detail-card"><summary><h3>${label}</h3><div class="pill">${score}%</div></summary><div class="detail-body">This is a high-impact priority because it affects consistency, contact quality, and ball control together.<div class="bar"><div class="fill" style="width:${score}%"></div></div></div></details>`;
    }).join('') || '<div class="card"><p class="muted">Run a report to unlock personalized feedback.</p></div>';

    document.getElementById('trendPill').textContent = latest ? `${metrics.improvement > 0 ? '+' : ''}${metrics.improvement} vs baseline` : 'No trend yet';
    document.getElementById('trendChart').innerHTML = assessments.slice(0, 5).reverse().map((item, index) => `<div class="col"><div class="mini">${item.shotType || 'shot'} ${index + 1}</div><div class="stick" style="height:${Math.max(24, item.overallScore || 24)}%"></div><div style="font-weight:800">${item.overallScore || 0}%</div></div>`).join('') || '<div class="card"><p class="muted">Your last five assessments will appear here.</p></div>';

    document.getElementById('priorityList').innerHTML = (latest?.metricComparisons || []).slice(0, 3).map((item, index) => `<details class="detail-card" ${index === 0 ? 'open' : ''}><summary><div><div class="mini">Priority ${index + 1}</div><h3>${item.metric.replace(/^\w/, (c) => c.toUpperCase())}</h3></div><div class="pill">${Math.min(100, Math.round(item.score || 0))}%</div></summary><div class="detail-body">${item.delta > 0 ? 'Above' : 'Below'} target by ${Math.abs(item.delta || 0)} degrees. Open this card during review to explain why it matters and what should change next in practice.</div></details>`).join('') || '<div class="card"><p class="muted">Biomechanics priorities will appear after your first report.</p></div>';

    const kpis = latest?.performanceKpis || {};
    document.getElementById('kpiList').innerHTML = [
      ['Timing consistency', kpis.timingConsistency, 'How repeatable the strike window looks.'],
      ['Footwork support', kpis.footworkScore, 'How well the lower body supports the stroke.'],
      ['Positioning quality', kpis.positioningScore, 'How stable and centered you stay through contact.']
    ].map(([label, value, copy], index) => `<details class="detail-card" ${index === 0 ? 'open' : ''}><summary><h3>${label}</h3><div class="pill">${Math.min(100, Math.round(value || 0))}%</div></summary><div class="detail-body">${copy}<div class="bar"><div class="fill" style="width:${Math.min(100, Math.round(value || 0))}%"></div></div></div></details>`).join('');

    document.getElementById('activityList').innerHTML = progressEvents.map((item) => `<div class="card"><div class="row"><div><h3>${item.title}</h3><p class="muted">${item.detail}</p></div><div class="mini">${new Date(item.createdAt).toLocaleDateString()}</div></div></div>`).join('') || '<div class="card"><p class="muted">Saved reports, goals, and drill completions will show here.</p></div>';

    document.getElementById('coachId').innerHTML = store.DEFAULT_COACHES.map((coach) => `<option value="${coach.id}">${coach.name} | ${coach.specialty}</option>`).join('');
    document.getElementById('sessionList').innerHTML = sessions.slice(0, 6).map((item) => `<div class="card"><div class="row"><div><h3>${item.coachName}</h3><p class="muted">${item.focus} | ${item.format}</p></div><div class="pill">${new Date(item.when).toLocaleString()}</div></div></div>`).join('') || '<div class="card"><p class="muted">No sessions booked yet.</p></div>';
    document.getElementById('bookingForm').addEventListener('submit', (event) => {
      event.preventDefault();
      const coach = store.DEFAULT_COACHES.find((entry) => entry.id === document.getElementById('coachId').value) || store.DEFAULT_COACHES[0];
      try {
        store.bookCoachSession({ coachId: coach.id, coachName: coach.name, specialty: coach.specialty, when: document.getElementById('when').value, focus: document.getElementById('focus').value || 'Technique review' });
        window.location.reload();
      } catch (error) {
        alert(error.message || 'Unable to book session.');
      }
    });
    if (!access.canBookCoach) {
      document.getElementById('bookingForm').insertAdjacentHTML('beforeend', '<div class="card"><p class="muted">Coach booking unlocks on Performance and Tournament plans.</p></div>');
      document.querySelectorAll('#bookingForm input, #bookingForm select, #bookingForm button').forEach((el) => { el.disabled = true; });
    }

    document.getElementById('drillList').innerHTML = drills.slice(0, 3).map((item, i) => `<details class="detail-card" ${i === 0 ? 'open' : ''}><summary><div><div class="mini">Drill ${i + 1}</div><h3>${item.title}</h3></div><div class="pill">${item.expectedImprovement || 'Focused gain'}</div></summary><div class="detail-body">${item.prescription || item.focus || 'Targeted drill recommendation.'}</div></details>`).join('') || '<div class="card"><p class="muted">Recommended drills will show here after your next report.</p></div>';
    document.getElementById('tacticList').innerHTML = tactics.slice(0, 3).map((item, i) => `<details class="detail-card" ${i === 0 ? 'open' : ''}><summary><div><div class="mini">Tactic ${i + 1}</div><h3>${item.title}</h3></div><div class="pill">Match play</div></summary><div class="detail-body">${item.message || item.summary || 'Tactical recommendation.'}</div></details>`).join('') || '<div class="card"><p class="muted">Recommended tactics will show here after your next report.</p></div>';

    document.getElementById('messageTarget').innerHTML = messageTargets.map((target) => `<option value="${target.id}">${target.label}</option>`).join('');
    document.getElementById('messageList').innerHTML = messages.slice(0, 8).map((item) => `<div class="card"><div class="row"><div><h3>${item.subject}</h3><p class="muted">${item.body}</p></div><div class="mini">${new Date(item.createdAt).toLocaleString()}</div></div></div>`).join('') || '<div class="card"><p class="muted">Messages with coaches or SmartSwing support will appear here.</p></div>';
    document.getElementById('messageForm').addEventListener('submit', (event) => {
      event.preventDefault();
      try {
        store.sendMessage({ toUserId: document.getElementById('messageTarget').value, subject: document.getElementById('messageSubject').value || 'New message', body: document.getElementById('messageBody').value || '' });
        window.location.reload();
      } catch (error) {
        alert(error.message || 'Unable to send message.');
      }
    });
    if (!access.canMessage) {
      document.getElementById('messageForm').insertAdjacentHTML('beforeend', '<div class="card"><p class="muted">Messaging unlocks when coach access is enabled on your plan.</p></div>');
      document.querySelectorAll('#messageForm input, #messageForm select, #messageForm textarea, #messageForm button').forEach((el) => { el.disabled = true; });
    }

    document.getElementById('privacyList').innerHTML = [
      `Role filter: ${access.role} sees only allowed dashboards and data views.`,
      `Plan filter: ${access.plan.name} controls reports, exports, coach access, and library access.`,
      `Usage guardrail: ${access.usage.used}/${Number.isFinite(access.usage.limit) ? access.usage.limit : 'Unlimited'} reports used this month.`,
      `Trial state: ${access.isTrial ? `active until ${new Date(access.trialEndsAt).toLocaleDateString()}` : 'not in trial'}.`,
      `Data scope: only this player, assigned coach conversations, and allowed booking/export actions are visible here.`
    ].map((item) => `<div class="card"><p class="muted">${item}</p></div>`).join('');

    function csvEscape(value){return `"${String(value ?? '').replace(/"/g,'""')}"`;}
    window.exportDashboard = function(format){
      if (!access.canExport) {
        alert('Export unlocks on Player, Performance, and Tournament plans.');
        window.location.href = './pricing.html';
        return;
      }
      const payload = { user, metrics, latest, sessions, focusAreas };
      if(format === 'json'){
        const blob = new Blob([JSON.stringify(payload,null,2)], { type: 'application/json' });
        const link = document.createElement('a'); link.href = URL.createObjectURL(blob); link.download = 'smartswing-player-dashboard.json'; link.click(); return;
      }
      const rows = [['type','title','value'],['summary','Average score',metrics.avgScore],['summary','Best score',metrics.bestScore],['summary','Improvement',metrics.improvement],...focusAreas.map((item) => ['focus', item.metric, item.score])];
      const csv = rows.map((row) => row.map(csvEscape).join(',')).join('\n');
      const blob = new Blob([csv], { type: 'text/csv;charset=utf-8' });
      const link = document.createElement('a'); link.href = URL.createObjectURL(blob); link.download = 'smartswing-player-dashboard.csv'; link.click();
    };
    window.printDashboard = function(){
      if (!access.canExport) {
        alert('Print/export unlocks on Player, Performance, and Tournament plans.');
        window.location.href = './pricing.html';
        return;
      }
      window.print();
    };

    if (!access.canExport) {
      ['exportJsonBtn', 'exportCsvBtn', 'printDashboardBtn'].forEach((id) => {
        const button = document.getElementById(id);
        button.style.opacity = '0.65';
      });
    }
  </script>
</body>
</html>


====================================================================================================
FILE: deploy/build-release.ps1
CATEGORY: deploy
====================================================================================================
Set-StrictMode -Version Latest
$ErrorActionPreference = 'Stop'

$root = Split-Path $PSScriptRoot -Parent
$distDir = Join-Path $root 'dist'
$staging = Join-Path $distDir 'smartswing-release'
$zipPath = Join-Path $distDir 'smartswing-release.zip'

if (Test-Path $staging) {
  Remove-Item -Recurse -Force $staging
}

New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $staging -Force | Out-Null
New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $distDir -Force | Out-Null

$includeFiles = @(
  '*.html',
  '*.js',
  '*.json',
  '*.css',
  '*.md',
  '*.sql'
)

foreach ($pattern in $includeFiles) {
  Get-ChildItem -Path $root -Filter $pattern -File | ForEach-Object {
    Copy-Item -Path $_.FullName -Destination (Join-Path $staging $_.Name) -Force
  }
}

$includeDirs = @('assets', 'tests', 'supabase')
foreach ($dir in $includeDirs) {
  $source = Join-Path $root $dir
  if (Test-Path $source) {
    Copy-Item -Path $source -Destination (Join-Path $staging $dir) -Recurse -Force
  }
}

if (Test-Path $zipPath) {
  Remove-Item -Force $zipPath
}

Compress-Archive -Path (Join-Path $staging '*') -DestinationPath $zipPath -Force
Write-Host "Release package created: $zipPath"


====================================================================================================
FILE: deploy/export-wix-html.ps1
CATEGORY: deploy
====================================================================================================
param(
  [string]$RepoRoot = "C:\Users\bmedrado\Desktop\SmartSwing\_smartswing_repo",
  [string]$OutputDir = "C:\Users\bmedrado\Desktop\SmartSwing\wix-optimized-html"
)

$ErrorActionPreference = 'Stop'

$pages = @(
  'index.html',
  'features.html',
  'how-it-works.html',
  'pricing.html',
  'contact.html',
  'login.html',
  'signup.html',
  'settings.html',
  'analyze.html',
  'dashboard.html',
  'coach-dashboard.html',
  'manager-analytics.html',
  'library.html',
  'cart.html',
  'checkout.html',
  'review-all.html'
)

if (Test-Path $OutputDir) {
  Remove-Item -Recurse -Force $OutputDir
}
New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $OutputDir | Out-Null

$appDataPath = Join-Path $RepoRoot 'app-data.js'
$appData = if (Test-Path $appDataPath) { Get-Content $appDataPath -Raw } else { '' }

foreach ($page in $pages) {
  $sourcePath = Join-Path $RepoRoot $page
  $content = Get-Content $sourcePath -Raw

  $content = $content -replace '<link rel="manifest" href="\./manifest\.json">\r?\n?', ''
  $content = $content -replace '\s*<script src="\./analytics\.js"></script>\r?\n?', "`r`n"
  $content = $content -replace '\s*<script defer src="/_vercel/insights/script\.js"></script>\r?\n?', "`r`n"
  $content = $content -replace '\s*<script src="\./pwa\.js"></script>\r?\n?', "`r`n"

  if ($content -match '<script src="\./app-data\.js"></script>') {
    $inlineScript = "<script>`r`n$appData`r`n</script>"
    $content = $content.Replace('<script src="./app-data.js"></script>', $inlineScript)
  }

  $content = $content -replace '\./assets/', 'https://smartswing-ai.vercel.app/assets/'

  Set-Content -Path (Join-Path $OutputDir $page) -Value $content -Encoding UTF8
}

@"
Wix-ready export notes

Folder: wix-optimized-html

What changed:
- asset URLs now point to https://smartswing-ai.vercel.app/assets/...
- app-data.js is inlined into interactive pages
- PWA and Vercel analytics scripts were removed
- manifest references were removed

Best use in Wix:
- create one Wix page per exported HTML file
- paste the corresponding page code into an HTML embed or custom code block
- if you want cross-page navigation inside Wix, replace local links like ./pricing.html with your Wix page URLs
"@ | Set-Content -Path (Join-Path $OutputDir 'README.txt') -Encoding UTF8

Get-ChildItem $OutputDir | Select-Object Name, Length


====================================================================================================
FILE: deploy/install-wix-public-redirect.ps1
CATEGORY: deploy
====================================================================================================
param(
  [Parameter(Mandatory = $true)]
  [string]$ApiKey,

  [Parameter(Mandatory = $true)]
  [string]$SiteId
)

$ErrorActionPreference = "Stop"

$scriptPath = Join-Path $PSScriptRoot "wix-public-site-redirect.js"
if (!(Test-Path $scriptPath)) {
  throw "Redirect script not found: $scriptPath"
}

$scriptContents = Get-Content $scriptPath -Raw
$headers = @{
  Authorization = $ApiKey
  "wix-site-id" = $SiteId
  "Content-Type" = "application/json"
}

$existing = Invoke-RestMethod -Method Get -Uri "https://www.wixapis.com/embeds/v1/custom-embeds" -Headers $headers
$match = $existing.customEmbeds | Where-Object { $_.name -eq "SmartSwing Public Site Redirect" } | Select-Object -First 1

$payload = @{
  customEmbed = @{
    name = "SmartSwing Public Site Redirect"
    enabled = $true
    loadOnce = $false
    position = "HEAD"
    embedData = @{
      html = "<script>`n$scriptContents`n</script>"
      category = "ESSENTIAL"
    }
  }
} | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 10

if ($match) {
  $id = $match.id
  Invoke-RestMethod -Method Put -Uri "https://www.wixapis.com/embeds/v1/custom-embeds/$id" -Headers $headers -Body $payload | Out-Null
  Write-Output "UPDATED:$id"
} else {
  $created = Invoke-RestMethod -Method Post -Uri "https://www.wixapis.com/embeds/v1/custom-embeds" -Headers $headers -Body $payload
  Write-Output "CREATED:$($created.customEmbed.id)"
}

====================================================================================================
FILE: deploy/wix-pricing-plan-bridge-page.js
CATEGORY: deploy
====================================================================================================
import wixLocation from 'wix-location';
import { checkout } from 'wix-pricing-plans-frontend';
import { session } from 'wix-storage';

const PLAN_MAP = {
  starter: '732255dd-54cb-46e9-b485-ff72b9306d5d',
  pro: '68e3e64f-e5a7-4815-b184-95eeb7a0cd78',
  elite: 'a63e2873-cc4e-4aec-bf94-01966299d49d'
};

$w.onReady(async function () {
  const { plan, appPlanId, returnUrl, cancelUrl, source } = wixLocation.query;
  const normalizedPlan = String(appPlanId || plan || '').toLowerCase();
  const wixPlanId = PLAN_MAP[normalizedPlan];

  if (!wixPlanId) {
    redirect(cancelUrl, normalizedPlan, 'invalid-plan');
    return;
  }

  session.setItem('smartswing_checkout_source', source || 'wix-bridge');

  try {
    await checkout.startOnlinePurchase(wixPlanId);
    redirect(returnUrl, normalizedPlan, 'returned');
  } catch (error) {
    redirect(cancelUrl, normalizedPlan, 'cancelled', error?.message || 'purchase-cancelled');
  }
});

function redirect(target, plan, status, reason) {
  const fallback = `https://www.smartswingai.com/payment-success.html?provider=wix-pricing-plans&plan=${encodeURIComponent(plan || '')}&status=${encodeURIComponent(status || 'returned')}`;
  const url = new URL(target || fallback, fallback);
  url.searchParams.set('provider', 'wix-pricing-plans');
  if (plan) url.searchParams.set('plan', plan);
  if (status) url.searchParams.set('status', status);
  if (reason) url.searchParams.set('reason', reason);
  wixLocation.to(url.toString());
}


====================================================================================================
FILE: deploy/wix-public-site-redirect.js
CATEGORY: deploy
====================================================================================================
(() => {
  const TARGET_ORIGIN = "https://www.smartswingai.com";
  const ANALYZER_PATH = "/analyze.html";

  const exactRoutes = {
    "/": "/",
    "/home": "/",
    "/features": "/features.html",
    "/how-it-works": "/how-it-works.html",
    "/pricing": "/pricing.html",
    "/plans": "/pricing.html",
    "/plans-pricing": "/pricing.html",
    "/contact": "/contact.html",
    "/login": "/login.html",
    "/sign-up": "/signup.html",
    "/signup": "/signup.html",
    "/register": "/signup.html",
    "/drills": "/library.html",
    "/library": "/library.html",
    "/review": "/",
    "/review-all": "/",
    "/quiz-tennis-1": ANALYZER_PATH,
    "/quiz-pickleball-1": ANALYZER_PATH,
    "/free-analysis": ANALYZER_PATH,
    "/free-assessment": ANALYZER_PATH,
    "/try-now": ANALYZER_PATH,
    "/refer-friends": "/signup.html",
    "/blog": "/"
  };

  const legalPages = [
    /^\/privacy-policy\/?$/i,
    /^\/accessibility-statement\/?$/i,
    /^\/terms(?:-|%20)?(?:and|-|%20)?(?:conditions)\/?$/i,
    /^\/refund-policy\/?$/i
  ];

  const ctaTextPattern = /(start free analysis|free analysis|free assessment|try now|get my first free assessment|claim free analysis|start free|unlock starter)/i;

  function normalizePath(pathname) {
    if (!pathname) {
      return "/";
    }

    const clean = pathname
      .replace(/\/+$/, "")
      .trim()
      .toLowerCase();

    return clean || "/";
  }

  function isLegalPage(pathname) {
    return legalPages.some((pattern) => pattern.test(pathname));
  }

  function buildTarget(pathname, search, hash) {
    const normalized = normalizePath(pathname);
    const mapped = exactRoutes[normalized];

    if (mapped) {
      return `${TARGET_ORIGIN}${mapped}${search || ""}${hash || ""}`;
    }

    if (!isLegalPage(normalized)) {
      return `${TARGET_ORIGIN}/${search || ""}${hash || ""}`.replace(/\/\?/, "/?");
    }

    return null;
  }

  function forceAnalyzer(link) {
    if (!link) {
      return;
    }

    link.setAttribute("href", `${TARGET_ORIGIN}${ANALYZER_PATH}`);
    link.setAttribute("target", "_self");
  }

  function decorateLegalPageCtas() {
    document.querySelectorAll("a, button, [role='button']").forEach((node) => {
      const text = (node.textContent || "").replace(/\s+/g, " ").trim();
      if (!ctaTextPattern.test(text)) {
        return;
      }

      if (node.tagName === "A") {
        forceAnalyzer(node);
        return;
      }

      node.addEventListener("click", () => {
        window.location.href = `${TARGET_ORIGIN}${ANALYZER_PATH}`;
      });
    });

    document.addEventListener(
      "click",
      (event) => {
        const target = event.target.closest("a");
        if (!target) {
          return;
        }

        const text = (target.textContent || "").replace(/\s+/g, " ").trim();
        const href = (target.getAttribute("href") || "").toLowerCase();

        if (
          ctaTextPattern.test(text) ||
          href.includes("quiz-tennis") ||
          href.includes("quiz-pickleball") ||
          href.includes("free-analysis") ||
          href.includes("free-assessment")
        ) {
          event.preventDefault();
          window.location.href = `${TARGET_ORIGIN}${ANALYZER_PATH}`;
        }
      },
      true
    );
  }

  const redirectTarget = buildTarget(window.location.pathname, window.location.search, window.location.hash);
  if (redirectTarget && window.location.href !== redirectTarget) {
    window.location.replace(redirectTarget);
    return;
  }

  if (isLegalPage(normalizePath(window.location.pathname))) {
    if (document.readyState === "loading") {
      document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", decorateLegalPageCtas, { once: true });
    } else {
      decorateLegalPageCtas();
    }
  }
})();

    <section class="hero">
      <article class="panel hero-copy">
        <div class="eyebrow">Feature stack</div>
        <h1>The operating system for tennis improvement.</h1>
        <p class="muted">SmartSwing AI connects video analysis, coach-ready reports, drill recommendations, player progress, scheduling, and role-based dashboards into one clean flow. The value is not one feature. The value is what happens when every layer reinforces the next one.</p>
      </article>
      <article class="panel hero-visual">
        <div class="floating">
          <div class="label">Why it works</div>
          <strong>Fast diagnosis. Clear action.</strong>
          <p class="muted">Less dashboard noise. Better proof. Fewer dead-end metrics that players do not understand.</p>
        </div>
      </article>
    </section>

    <section class="grid">
      <article class="panel feature-main">
        <div class="eyebrow">Core engine</div>
        <h3 style="margin-top:18px;max-width:11ch;font-size:38px;">AI video analysis built to drive the next rep, not just the report.</h3>
        <p class="muted">Pose tracking, tennis-specific biomechanics, level-adjusted scoring, and top-priority feedback work together so players leave with a real plan instead of a wall of disconnected metrics.</p>
        <div class="chips">
          <span>Readable biomechanics</span>
          <span>Coach-ready summaries</span>
          <span>Plan-based guardrails</span>
        </div>
      </article>

      <details class="panel feature-card" open>
        <summary>
          <div class="label">Reports</div>
          <div class="expand-head"><h3>Readable biomechanics</h3><span class="expand-chip">Open</span></div>
          <p class="muted">Angles are translated into coaching insight, expandable explanations, and clear fixes instead of walls of logic and definitions.</p>
        </summary>
        <div class="expand-body">
          <div class="expand-list">
            <div><strong>What it means:</strong> movement data becomes plain-English feedback players, parents, and coaches can actually use.</div>
            <div><strong>Why it matters:</strong> better comprehension improves follow-through and reduces overwhelm after the report opens.</div>
            <div><strong>What happens next:</strong> the same priorities feed drills, tactics, dashboards, and coach notes automatically.</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </details>

      <details class="panel feature-card light">
        <summary>
          <div class="label" style="background:rgba(0,0,0,.06);border-color:rgba(0,0,0,.08);color:var(--dark)">Dashboards</div>
          <div class="expand-head"><h3>Cleaner player and coach tabs</h3><span class="expand-chip">Open</span></div>
          <p class="muted">Messaging, scheduling, drills, analytics, and activities are separated into tabs so each role sees the right layer at the right time.</p>
        </summary>
        <div class="expand-body">
          <div class="expand-list">
            <div><strong>What it means:</strong> player and coach views do not compete for attention on the same page.</div>
            <div><strong>Why it matters:</strong> the next action is easier to see, and exports are easier to trust.</div>
            <div><strong>What happens next:</strong> each tab becomes a cleaner surface for retention, scheduling, and accountability.</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </details>

      <details class="panel feature-card">
        <summary>
          <div class="label">Training</div>
          <div class="expand-head"><h3>Drills and tactics tied to weaknesses</h3><span class="expand-chip">Open</span></div>
          <p class="muted">Recommendation logic limits the report to the top three drill plans and top three tactical plays so the player is not overwhelmed.</p>
        </summary>
        <div class="expand-body">
          <div class="expand-list">
            <div><strong>What it means:</strong> the report selects the highest-leverage practice content instead of dumping a full library at once.</div>
            <div><strong>Why it matters:</strong> fewer choices usually means better compliance and stronger habit formation.</div>
            <div><strong>What happens next:</strong> the dashboard can track whether the assigned work is actually being completed.</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </details>

      <details class="panel feature-card">
        <summary>
          <div class="label">Access control</div>
          <div class="expand-head"><h3>Privacy and plan guardrails</h3><span class="expand-chip">Open</span></div>
          <p class="muted">Scoped visibility, entitlement checks, role-based messaging, trial enforcement, and plan limits protect the right data and the right flows.</p>
        </summary>
        <div class="expand-body">
          <div class="expand-list">
            <div><strong>What it means:</strong> players and coaches do not see the same data or the same action set.</div>
            <div><strong>Why it matters:</strong> privacy, subscription limits, and coach access all need predictable enforcement.</div>
            <div><strong>What happens next:</strong> exports, scheduling, library access, and reports obey the active plan automatically.</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </details>
    </section>

    <section class="hero">
      <article class="panel">
        <div class="eyebrow">For Coaches</div>
        <h1>See what changed, assign the next block, move on faster.</h1>
        <p>SmartSwing AI helps coaches turn video review into a usable player workflow. Reports, assignments, notes, and follow-up context stay connected so you spend less time rewriting the same feedback and more time coaching what matters.</p>
        <div class="mini-list" style="margin-top:18px">
          <div>Faster athlete triage after each upload.</div>
          <div>Coach-ready summaries that are easier to trust than raw metrics alone.</div>
          <div>Drills and tactical plans attached to the same player context.</div>
        </div>
      </article>
      <article class="hero-visual">
        <div class="eyebrow">Coach benefit</div>
        <h2 style="margin-top:16px">One review becomes the next session plan.</h2>
        <p>The win is not just analysis. The win is closing the loop from report to assignment to accountability without extra admin.</p>
      </article>
    </section>

    <section class="card-grid">
      <article class="bullet-card">
        <h3>Faster roster triage</h3>
        <p>Separate the athletes who need immediate help from the ones who need a simple check-in.</p>
      </article>
      <article class="bullet-card">
        <h3>Cleaner communication</h3>
        <p>Keep feedback tied to the actual movement issue and the drill that addresses it.</p>
      </article>
      <article class="bullet-card">
        <h3>Better accountability</h3>
        <p>Dashboards, notes, and follow-through can stay organized instead of living across screenshots and texts.</p>
      </article>
    </section>

    <section class="content-grid">
      <article class="panel section-stack">
        <div>
          <h2>What coaches use it for</h2>
          <ul class="hero-list">
            <li>Remote lesson review between in-person sessions.</li>
            <li>Player development check-ins for junior programs.</li>
            <li>Tournament prep with a shared review surface.</li>
            <li>Communication support for parents and athletes who need clearer context.</li>
          </ul>
        </div>
      </article>
      <article class="panel section-stack">
        <div>
          <h2>What to expect</h2>
          <ul class="hero-list">
            <li>Players still need coaching judgment. The product supports it, not replaces it.</li>
            <li>Coach workflows are strongest when reports stay focused on the top leverage issues.</li>
            <li>Teams can start with one athlete, then expand once the handoff feels clean.</li>
            <li>Club rollout is available separately through SmartSwing deployment support.</li>
          </ul>
        </div>
      </article>
    </section>

    <section class="panel cta-band">
      <div>
        <div class="eyebrow">Coach rollout</div>
        <h2 style="margin-top:16px">Talk through your workflow before you scale it.</h2>
        <p>If you coach multiple athletes, we can map the report, assignment, and roster flow with you before a wider rollout.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="cta-actions">
        <a class="btn-primary" href="./contact.html">Contact SmartSwing</a>
        <a class="btn-secondary" href="./pricing.html">View Pricing</a>
        <a class="btn-secondary" href="./library.html">See Library</a>
      </div>

====================================================================================================
FILE: gpt-integration-secure.js
CATEGORY: script
====================================================================================================
// ============================================================================
// SECURE GPT INTEGRATION - ADD TO ANALYZE.HTML
// ============================================================================
// This code should be added to your analyze.html file
// API key will be stored in .env.local file (NEVER in this code)
// ============================================================================

// ============================================================================
// CONFIGURATION
// ============================================================================

// DO NOT PUT YOUR API KEY HERE!
// It will be loaded from environment variable or config file
const GPT_CONFIG = {
  model: 'gpt-4o', // or 'gpt-4o-mini' for lower cost
  temperature: 0.7,
  maxTokens: 1000,
  streaming: true // Enable streaming for real-time feedback
};

// This will be replaced with your actual key during build/deployment
// For local testing, you'll set this in your environment
let OPENAI_API_KEY = null;

// ============================================================================
// INITIALIZE API KEY (SECURE METHOD)
// ============================================================================

async function initializeGPTKey() {
  // Method 1: Load from local config file (for development)
  try {
    const response = await fetch('/config.json');
    const config = await response.json();
    OPENAI_API_KEY = config.OPENAI_API_KEY;
    console.log('âœ… GPT API key loaded from config');
  } catch (error) {
    console.warn('âš ï¸ Config file not found, GPT features disabled');
    return false;
  }
  
  return OPENAI_API_KEY !== null;
}

// ============================================================================
// GPT ANALYSIS FUNCTION WITH STREAMING
// ============================================================================

async function analyzeWithGPTStreaming(sessionData, userProfile) {
  if (!OPENAI_API_KEY) {
    console.error('âŒ OpenAI API key not configured');
    return {
      success: false,
      error: 'GPT API key not configured'
    };
  }
  
  console.log('ðŸ¤– Starting GPT analysis with streaming...');
  
  // Build the analysis prompt
  const prompt = buildAnalysisPrompt(sessionData, userProfile);
  
  try {
    const response = await fetch('https://api.openai.com/v1/chat/completions', {
      method: 'POST',
      headers: {
        'Content-Type': 'application/json',
        'Authorization': `Bearer ${OPENAI_API_KEY}`
      },
      body: JSON.stringify({
        model: GPT_CONFIG.model,
        messages: [
          {
            role: 'system',
            content: getSystemPrompt()
          },
          {
            role: 'user',
            content: prompt
          }
        ],
        temperature: GPT_CONFIG.temperature,
        max_tokens: GPT_CONFIG.maxTokens,
        stream: GPT_CONFIG.streaming
      })
    });
    
    if (!response.ok) {
      throw new Error(`API error: ${response.status} ${response.statusText}`);
    }
    
    // Handle streaming response
    if (GPT_CONFIG.streaming) {
      return await handleStreamingResponse(response);
    } else {
      // Handle non-streaming response
      const data = await response.json();
      return {
        success: true,
        analysis: data.choices[0].message.content,
        tokens: data.usage.total_tokens,
        cost: calculateCost(data.usage.total_tokens)
      };
    }
    
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('âŒ GPT API Error:', error);
    return {
      success: false,
      error: error.message
    };
  }
}

// ============================================================================
// STREAMING RESPONSE HANDLER
// ============================================================================

async function handleStreamingResponse(response) {
  const reader = response.body.getReader();
  const decoder = new TextDecoder();
  
  let analysis = '';
  let totalTokens = 0;
  
  // Show streaming UI
  showGPTStreamingUI();
  
  try {
    while (true) {
      const { done, value } = await reader.read();
      
      if (done) {
        console.log('âœ… Streaming complete');
        break;
      }
      
      const chunk = decoder.decode(value);
      const lines = chunk.split('\n').filter(line => line.trim() !== '');
      
      for (const line of lines) {
        if (line.startsWith('data: ')) {
          const data = line.slice(6);
          
          if (data === '[DONE]') {
            continue;
          }
          
          try {
            const parsed = JSON.parse(data);
            const content = parsed.choices[0]?.delta?.content || '';
            
            if (content) {
              analysis += content;
              
              // Update UI in real-time
              updateGPTStreamingContent(analysis);
            }
            
          } catch (e) {
            // Skip invalid JSON chunks
          }
        }
      }
    }
    
    // Estimate tokens (rough estimate for streaming)
    totalTokens = Math.ceil(analysis.length / 4);
    
    return {
      success: true,
      analysis: analysis,
      tokens: totalTokens,
      cost: calculateCost(totalTokens),
      streamed: true
    };
    
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Streaming error:', error);
    return {
      success: false,
      error: error.message
    };
  }
}

// ============================================================================
// PROMPT BUILDERS
// ============================================================================

function getSystemPrompt() {
  return `You are an expert tennis biomechanics coach with 20+ years of ATP/WTA experience.

Analyze swing data and provide:
1. TECHNICAL ASSESSMENT (2-3 sentences)
2. PRIORITY IMPROVEMENTS (Top 3 with specific targets)
3. TRAINING DRILLS (3-4 specific drills with frequency)
4. PRO COMPARISON (Which pro they resemble and why)

Format with clear headers and bullet points.
Be specific with numbers and techniques.
Tailor advice to skill level and age.
Keep tone motivating and actionable.`;
}

function buildAnalysisPrompt(sessionData, userProfile) {
  return `Analyze this tennis swing:

**PLAYER PROFILE:**
- Age: ${userProfile.age_range || 'Not specified'}
- Gender: ${userProfile.gender || 'Not specified'}
- USTA Level: ${userProfile.usta_level || 'Not specified'}
- UTR Rating: ${userProfile.utr_rating || 'Not specified'}
- Preferred Hand: ${userProfile.preferred_hand || 'Right'}

**SWING DATA:**
- Shot Type: ${sessionData.summary.shotType}
- Overall Score: ${sessionData.summary.score}/100
- Grade: ${sessionData.summary.grade}
- Percentile: Top ${sessionData.summary.percentile}%

**BIOMECHANICS:**
- Shoulder Angle: ${Math.round(sessionData.summary.avgAngles.shoulder)}Â° (optimal: 105Â°)
- Elbow Angle: ${Math.round(sessionData.summary.avgAngles.elbow)}Â° (optimal: 147Â°)
- Hip Angle: ${Math.round(sessionData.summary.avgAngles.hip)}Â° (optimal: 165Â°)
- Knee Angle: ${Math.round(sessionData.summary.avgAngles.knee)}Â° (optimal: 165Â°)
- Trunk Rotation: ${Math.round(sessionData.summary.avgAngles.trunk)}Â° (optimal: 15Â°)
- Wrist Angle: ${Math.round(sessionData.summary.avgAngles.wrist)}Â°

**ADVANCED METRICS:**
- X-Factor (Hip-Shoulder Separation): ${Math.round(sessionData.summary.xFactor)}Â° (optimal: 40Â°)
- Racquet Head Speed: ${Math.round(sessionData.summary.maxSpeed)} mph
- Frames Analyzed: ${sessionData.summary.framesAnalyzed}
- Average Confidence: ${sessionData.summary.avgConfidence}%

Provide detailed coaching feedback with actionable drills.`;
}

// ============================================================================
// UI FUNCTIONS
// ============================================================================

function showGPTLoadingState() {
  const container = document.getElementById('gptAnalysisContainer');
  container.innerHTML = `
    <div class="gpt-loading">
      <div class="spinner"></div>
      <div class="loading-text">
        <h3>ðŸ¤– AI Coach is analyzing your technique...</h3>
        <p>This will take about 5-10 seconds</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  `;
  container.style.display = 'block';
}

function showGPTStreamingUI() {
  const container = document.getElementById('gptAnalysisContainer');
  container.innerHTML = `
    <div class="gpt-analysis streaming">
      <div class="gpt-header">
        <h3>ðŸ¤– AI Coach Feedback</h3>
        <span class="gpt-badge">
          <span class="pulse-dot"></span>
          Analyzing...
        </span>
      </div>
      <div class="gpt-content" id="gptStreamingContent">
        <div class="typing-indicator">
          <span></span><span></span><span></span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  `;
  container.style.display = 'block';
}

function updateGPTStreamingContent(text) {
  const contentEl = document.getElementById('gptStreamingContent');
  if (contentEl) {
    contentEl.innerHTML = formatAnalysis(text);
    
    // Auto-scroll to bottom
    contentEl.scrollTop = contentEl.scrollHeight;
  }
}

function displayGPTAnalysis(analysis, metadata = {}) {
  const container = document.getElementById('gptAnalysisContainer');
  
  container.innerHTML = `
    <div class="gpt-analysis">
      <div class="gpt-header">
        <h3>ðŸ¤– AI Coach Feedback</h3>
        <div class="gpt-meta">
          <span class="gpt-badge">Powered by GPT-4</span>
          ${metadata.tokens ? `<span class="gpt-stats">${metadata.tokens} tokens â€¢ $${metadata.cost?.toFixed(4) || '0.00'}</span>` : ''}
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="gpt-content">
        ${formatAnalysis(analysis)}
      </div>
      ${metadata.streamed ? '<div class="gpt-footer">âœ¨ Streamed in real-time</div>' : ''}
    </div>
  `;
  
  // Scroll to GPT analysis
  container.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'nearest' });
}

function formatAnalysis(text) {
  // Convert text to formatted HTML
  let formatted = text
    .replace(/\*\*(.*?)\*\*/g, '<strong>$1</strong>')
    .replace(/\*(.*?)\*/g, '<em>$1</em>')
    .replace(/^#{1,2}\s+(.+)$/gm, '<h4>$1</h4>')
    .replace(/^[-â€¢]\s+(.+)$/gm, '<li>$1</li>')
    .replace(/\n\n/g, '</p><p>')
    .replace(/(<li>.*<\/li>)/s, '<ul>$1</ul>');
  
  // Wrap paragraphs
  if (!formatted.startsWith('<h4>') && !formatted.startsWith('<ul>')) {
    formatted = '<p>' + formatted + '</p>';
  }
  
  return formatted;
}

function showGPTError(error) {
  const container = document.getElementById('gptAnalysisContainer');
  container.innerHTML = `
    <div class="gpt-error">
      <h4>âš ï¸ AI Coach Unavailable</h4>
      <p>${error}</p>
      <p class="error-help">Your biomechanics analysis is still available above.</p>
    </div>
  `;
}

// ============================================================================
// COST CALCULATION
// ============================================================================

function calculateCost(tokens) {
  // GPT-4o pricing: $2.50 per 1M input tokens, $10.00 per 1M output tokens
  // Rough estimate: assume 40% input, 60% output
  const inputTokens = tokens * 0.4;
  const outputTokens = tokens * 0.6;
  
  const inputCost = (inputTokens / 1000000) * 2.50;
  const outputCost = (outputTokens / 1000000) * 10.00;
  
  return inputCost + outputCost;
}

// ============================================================================
// DATABASE INTEGRATION
// ============================================================================

async function saveGPTAnalysisToSupabase(assessmentId, gptData) {
  try {
    const { error } = await supabase
      .from('assessments')
      .update({
        gpt_analysis: gptData.analysis,
        analyzed_with_gpt: true,
        gpt_tokens_used: gptData.tokens,
        gpt_cost: gptData.cost
      })
      .eq('id', assessmentId);
    
    if (error) throw error;
    
    console.log('âœ… GPT analysis saved to database');
    return true;
    
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('âŒ Error saving GPT analysis:', error);
    return false;
  }
}

// ============================================================================
// INTEGRATION WITH EXISTING ANALYZE FLOW
// ============================================================================

// Add this to your existing analysis completion handler
async function handleAnalysisComplete(sessionData) {
  console.log('ðŸ“Š Analysis complete, checking GPT integration...');
  
  // Check if GPT is available
  const gptReady = await initializeGPTKey();
  
  if (!gptReady) {
    console.log('âš ï¸ GPT not configured, skipping AI coach feedback');
    return;
  }
  
  // Show loading state
  showGPTLoadingState();
  
  // Get user profile
  const userProfile = {
    age_range: currentUser?.age_range || '26-35',
    gender: currentUser?.gender || 'not specified',
    usta_level: currentUser?.usta_level || '4.0',
    utr_rating: currentUser?.utr_rating || '6-7',
    preferred_hand: currentUser?.preferred_hand || 'right'
  };
  
  // Call GPT API
  const gptResult = await analyzeWithGPTStreaming(sessionData, userProfile);
  
  if (gptResult.success) {
    // Display analysis
    displayGPTAnalysis(gptResult.analysis, {
      tokens: gptResult.tokens,
      cost: gptResult.cost,
      streamed: gptResult.streamed
    });
    
    // Save to database (if assessment was saved)
    if (sessionData.assessmentId) {
      await saveGPTAnalysisToSupabase(sessionData.assessmentId, gptResult);
    }
    
    console.log('âœ… GPT Analysis Complete:', {
      tokens: gptResult.tokens,
      cost: `$${gptResult.cost.toFixed(4)}`,
      streamed: gptResult.streamed
    });
    
  } else {
    console.error('âŒ GPT Analysis Failed:', gptResult.error);
    showGPTError(gptResult.error);
  }
}

// ============================================================================
// INITIALIZATION
// ============================================================================

console.log('ðŸ¤– GPT Integration Module Loaded');
console.log('âš™ï¸ Configuration:', GPT_CONFIG);


====================================================================================================
FILE: growth-forms.js
CATEGORY: script
====================================================================================================
(function () {
  const STORAGE_KEY = 'smartswing_growth_leads_v1';

  function readLeads() {
    try {
      const raw = localStorage.getItem(STORAGE_KEY);
      return raw ? JSON.parse(raw) : [];
    } catch (_) {
      return [];
    }
  }

  function writeLeads(leads) {
    localStorage.setItem(STORAGE_KEY, JSON.stringify(leads));
  }

  async function submitLead(payload) {
    const createdAt = new Date().toISOString();
    const entry = {
      id: `lead_${Date.now()}`,
      source: payload.source || window.location.pathname || '/',
      offer: payload.offer || '',
      name: String(payload.name || '').trim(),
      email: String(payload.email || '').trim().toLowerCase(),
      topic: String(payload.topic || 'lead-capture').trim(),
      message: String(payload.message || '').trim(),
      createdAt
    };

    if (!entry.name || !entry.email) {
      return { ok: false, reason: 'missing_fields' };
    }

    const leads = readLeads();
    leads.unshift(entry);
    writeLeads(leads);

    let synced = false;
    const store = window.SmartSwingStore;
    if (store?.saveContactMessage) {
      try {
        const result = await store.saveContactMessage({
          name: entry.name,
          email: entry.email,
          topic: entry.topic,
          message: entry.message || `Lead capture from ${entry.source}. Offer: ${entry.offer || 'none supplied'}.`
        });
        synced = Boolean(result?.synced);
      } catch (_) {
        synced = false;
      }
    }

    return {
      ok: true,
      synced,
      count: leads.length,
      savedAt: createdAt
    };
  }

  window.SmartSwingGrowth = {
    readLeads,
    submitLead
  };
})();

      <article class="step">
        <div class="step-media" style="background-image:url('./assets/uiux/Smart 2.png');"></div>
        <div class="step-copy">
          <div class="step-number">01</div>
          <h2>Record the session</h2>
          <p class="muted">The player selects the shot, mode, and goal first. That context shapes the scoring logic, benchmarks, and the kind of report language they will see afterward.</p>
          <div class="mini-list">
            <div class="mini-item">Pre-capture guidance improves input quality before the upload starts.</div>
            <div class="mini-item">Shot and session intent define the benchmark and feedback frame.</div>
            <div class="mini-item">Profile details keep the scoring fair by level and player context.</div>
          </div>
        </div>

      <article class="step reverse">
        <div class="step-copy">
          <div class="step-number">02</div>
          <h2>Run the AI analyzer</h2>
          <p class="muted">The analyzer tracks body landmarks, computes the most relevant stroke metrics, and converts those signals into a readable report that does not drown the player in raw mechanics jargon.</p>
          <div class="mini-list">
            <div class="mini-item">Biomechanics, movement, positioning, timing, and contact behavior are assessed together.</div>
            <div class="mini-item">The report emphasizes top priorities instead of overwhelming low-value detail.</div>

          </div>

        <div class="step-copy">
          <div class="step-number">03</div>
          <h2>Get a focused plan</h2>
          <p class="muted">The report narrows the next step to the most meaningful drill plans and tactical adjustments. That keeps improvement tangible and makes the score feel connected to real practice.</p>
          <div class="mini-list">
            <div class="mini-item">Top 3 drill recommendations tied directly to the main weaknesses.</div>
            <div class="mini-item">Top 3 tactical recommendations based on the player's current profile.</div>
            <div class="mini-item">Coach-ready summary keeps the teaching conversation fast and useful.</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </article>

      <article class="step reverse">
        <div class="step-copy">
          <div class="step-number">04</div>
          <h2>Track, message, schedule</h2>
          <p class="muted">Once the report exists, the work moves into dashboards. That is where assignments, progress, scheduling, coach communication, and access guardrails keep the loop alive.</p>
          <div class="mini-list">
            <div class="mini-item">Player and coach views are separated into clean tabs by task.</div>
            <div class="mini-item">Plan limits, trials, and privacy rules are enforced before save, export, and messaging actions.</div>

          </div>
        </div>

====================================================================================================
FILE: improved-pose-detection.js
CATEGORY: script
====================================================================================================
// ============================================================================
// IMPROVED POSE DETECTION MODULE
// SmartSwing AI - Enhanced Detection & Filtering
// ============================================================================

/**
 * PoseDetector with advanced filtering, validation, and error recovery
 */

class ImprovedPoseDetector {
  constructor(config = {}) {
    this.config = {
      model: config.model || 'MoveNet', // MoveNet or BlazePose
      modelType: config.modelType || 'SINGLEPOSE_THUNDER',
      minConfidence: config.minConfidence || 0.3,
      smoothing: config.smoothing || true,
      oneEuroFilter: config.oneEuroFilter || true,
      fps: config.fps || 30,
      ...config
    };
    
    this.detector = null;
    this.backend = null;
    this.filters = {};
    this.history = [];
    this.maxHistory = 30; // Keep last 30 frames
    this.missingFrames = 0;
    this.totalFrames = 0;
  }

  // ============================================================================
  // 1. INITIALIZATION
  // ============================================================================
  
  async initialize() {
    try {
      await tf.ready();
      
      // Try WebGL first, fall back to CPU
      this.backend = await this.initializeBackend();
      
      // Initialize pose detector
      this.detector = await this.createDetector();
      
      // Initialize filters for each keypoint
      if (this.config.oneEuroFilter) {
        this.initializeFilters();
      }
      
      console.log('âœ… Pose detector initialized:', {
        model: this.config.model,
        backend: this.backend,
        filtering: this.config.smoothing
      });
      
      return true;
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('âŒ Failed to initialize pose detector:', error);
      throw error;
    }
  }

  async initializeBackend() {
    const backends = ['webgl', 'wasm', 'cpu'];
    
    for (const backend of backends) {
      try {
        await tf.setBackend(backend);
        await tf.ready();
        console.log(`âœ… Using backend: ${backend}`);
        return backend;
      } catch (error) {
        console.warn(`Failed to initialize ${backend}, trying next...`);
      }
    }
    
    throw new Error('No TensorFlow backend available');
  }

  async createDetector() {
    if (this.config.model === 'MoveNet') {
      return await poseDetection.createDetector(
        poseDetection.SupportedModels.MoveNet,
        {
          modelType: poseDetection.movenet.modelType[this.config.modelType]
        }
      );
    } else if (this.config.model === 'BlazePose') {
      return await poseDetection.createDetector(
        poseDetection.SupportedModels.BlazePose,
        {
          runtime: 'tfjs',
          modelType: 'full'
        }
      );
    }
    
    throw new Error('Unsupported model type');
  }

  // ============================================================================
  // 2. ONE EURO FILTER (Smoothing)
  // ============================================================================
  
  initializeFilters() {
    const keypointCount = this.config.model === 'MoveNet' ? 17 : 33;
    
    for (let i = 0; i < keypointCount; i++) {
      this.filters[i] = {
        x: new OneEuroFilter(this.config.fps, 1.0, 0.05, 1.0),
        y: new OneEuroFilter(this.config.fps, 1.0, 0.05, 1.0)
      };
    }
  }

  applyFiltering(keypoints, timestamp) {
    if (!this.config.oneEuroFilter) return keypoints;
    
    return keypoints.map((kp, idx) => {
      if (!this.filters[idx]) return kp;
      
      const filteredX = this.filters[idx].x.filter(kp.x, timestamp);
      const filteredY = this.filters[idx].y.filter(kp.y, timestamp);
      
      return {
        ...kp,
        x: filteredX,
        y: filteredY
      };
    });
  }

  // ============================================================================
  // 3. VALIDATION & QUALITY CHECKS
  // ============================================================================
  
  /**
   * Validate keypoints quality
   */
  validateKeypoints(keypoints) {
    if (!keypoints || keypoints.length === 0) {
      return { valid: false, reason: 'No keypoints detected' };
    }
    
    // Count high-confidence keypoints
    const confidenceThreshold = this.config.minConfidence;
    const validKeypoints = keypoints.filter(kp => 
      (kp.score || kp.confidence || 0) >= confidenceThreshold
    );
    
    const validRatio = validKeypoints.length / keypoints.length;
    
    if (validRatio < 0.5) {
      return { 
        valid: false, 
        reason: `Low confidence (${Math.round(validRatio * 100)}% valid keypoints)`,
        validCount: validKeypoints.length,
        totalCount: keypoints.length
      };
    }
    
    // Check if critical points are detected
    const criticalPoints = this.getCriticalPoints();
    const criticalDetected = criticalPoints.every(idx => {
      const kp = keypoints[idx];
      return kp && (kp.score || kp.confidence || 0) >= confidenceThreshold;
    });
    
    if (!criticalDetected) {
      return {
        valid: false,
        reason: 'Critical points missing (shoulders, hips, wrists)',
        validCount: validKeypoints.length
      };
    }
    
    return { 
      valid: true, 
      confidence: this.calculateAverageConfidence(keypoints),
      validCount: validKeypoints.length
    };
  }

  getCriticalPoints() {
    // Shoulders, hips, wrists are critical for tennis analysis
    if (this.config.model === 'MoveNet') {
      return [5, 6, 9, 10, 11, 12]; // Shoulders, wrists, hips
    } else {
      return [11, 12, 15, 16, 23, 24]; // BlazePose indices
    }
  }

  calculateAverageConfidence(keypoints) {
    const sum = keypoints.reduce((acc, kp) => 
      acc + (kp.score || kp.confidence || 0), 0
    );
    return sum / keypoints.length;
  }

  // ============================================================================
  // 4. OUTLIER DETECTION & CORRECTION
  // ============================================================================
  
  /**
   * Detect outliers using history
   */
  detectOutliers(keypoints) {
    if (this.history.length < 5) return keypoints;
    
    const corrected = keypoints.map((kp, idx) => {
      // Get historical positions for this keypoint
      const historicalPositions = this.history
        .slice(-5)
        .map(frame => frame[idx])
        .filter(Boolean);
      
      if (historicalPositions.length < 3) return kp;
      
      // Calculate average historical position
      const avgX = historicalPositions.reduce((sum, p) => sum + p.x, 0) / historicalPositions.length;
      const avgY = historicalPositions.reduce((sum, p) => sum + p.y, 0) / historicalPositions.length;
      
      // Check if current position is an outlier (>100px from average)
      const distFromAvg = Math.sqrt(
        Math.pow(kp.x - avgX, 2) + Math.pow(kp.y - avgY, 2)
      );
      
      if (distFromAvg > 100) {
        // Likely an outlier - use interpolated position
        return {
          ...kp,
          x: avgX,
          y: avgY,
          outlier: true
        };
      }
      
      return kp;
    });
    
    return corrected;
  }

  /**
   * Interpolate missing keypoints
   */
  interpolateMissing(keypoints) {
    if (this.history.length < 2) return keypoints;
    
    const lastFrame = this.history[this.history.length - 1];
    const previousFrame = this.history[this.history.length - 2];
    
    return keypoints.map((kp, idx) => {
      const confidence = kp.score || kp.confidence || 0;
      
      // If confidence is too low, try interpolation
      if (confidence < this.config.minConfidence) {
        const last = lastFrame[idx];
        const prev = previousFrame[idx];
        
        if (last && prev) {
          // Linear interpolation
          return {
            ...kp,
            x: last.x + (last.x - prev.x),
            y: last.y + (last.y - prev.y),
            interpolated: true,
            score: confidence
          };
        }
      }
      
      return kp;
    });
  }

  // ============================================================================
  // 5. TEMPORAL CONSISTENCY
  // ============================================================================
  
  /**
   * Enforce temporal consistency across frames
   */
  enforceTemporalConsistency(keypoints) {
    if (this.history.length === 0) return keypoints;
    
    const lastFrame = this.history[this.history.length - 1];
    const maxMovement = 50; // Max pixels between frames
    
    return keypoints.map((kp, idx) => {
      const last = lastFrame[idx];
      if (!last) return kp;
      
      const movement = Math.sqrt(
        Math.pow(kp.x - last.x, 2) + Math.pow(kp.y - last.y, 2)
      );
      
      // If movement is too large, dampen it
      if (movement > maxMovement) {
        const ratio = maxMovement / movement;
        return {
          ...kp,
          x: last.x + (kp.x - last.x) * ratio,
          y: last.y + (kp.y - last.y) * ratio,
          dampened: true
        };
      }
      
      return kp;
    });
  }

  // ============================================================================
  // 6. MAIN DETECTION PIPELINE
  // ============================================================================
  
  /**
   * Detect pose with full pipeline
   */
  async detectPose(videoElement, timestamp = Date.now()) {
    this.totalFrames++;
    
    try {
      // Run pose detection
      const poses = await this.detector.estimatePoses(videoElement);
      
      if (!poses || poses.length === 0) {
        this.missingFrames++;
        return {
          success: false,
          reason: 'No pose detected',
          keypoints: null
        };
      }
      
      let keypoints = poses[0].keypoints;
      
      // Apply processing pipeline
      if (this.config.smoothing) {
        // 1. Validate
        const validation = this.validateKeypoints(keypoints);
        if (!validation.valid) {
          this.missingFrames++;
          return {
            success: false,
            reason: validation.reason,
            keypoints: null,
            partial: keypoints // Return partial data for debugging
          };
        }
        
        // 2. Outlier detection
        keypoints = this.detectOutliers(keypoints);
        
        // 3. Interpolate missing
        keypoints = this.interpolateMissing(keypoints);
        
        // 4. Temporal consistency
        keypoints = this.enforceTemporalConsistency(keypoints);
        
        // 5. Apply smoothing filter
        if (this.config.oneEuroFilter) {
          keypoints = this.applyFiltering(keypoints, timestamp);
        }
      }
      
      // Update history
      this.history.push(keypoints);
      if (this.history.length > this.maxHistory) {
        this.history.shift();
      }
      
      // Calculate statistics
      const stats = {
        validKeypoints: keypoints.filter(kp => 
          (kp.score || kp.confidence || 0) >= this.config.minConfidence
        ).length,
        avgConfidence: this.calculateAverageConfidence(keypoints),
        detectionRate: ((this.totalFrames - this.missingFrames) / this.totalFrames) * 100
      };
      
      return {
        success: true,
        keypoints,
        stats,
        timestamp
      };
      
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Pose detection error:', error);
      this.missingFrames++;
      
      return {
        success: false,
        reason: error.message,
        keypoints: null
      };
    }
  }

  /**
   * Get detection statistics
   */
  getStats() {
    return {
      totalFrames: this.totalFrames,
      successfulFrames: this.totalFrames - this.missingFrames,
      missingFrames: this.missingFrames,
      detectionRate: ((this.totalFrames - this.missingFrames) / this.totalFrames) * 100,
      backend: this.backend,
      model: this.config.model
    };
  }

  /**
   * Reset detector state
   */
  reset() {
    this.history = [];
    this.missingFrames = 0;
    this.totalFrames = 0;
    
    if (this.config.oneEuroFilter) {
      this.initializeFilters();
    }
  }

  /**
   * Cleanup
   */
  dispose() {
    if (this.detector) {
      this.detector.dispose();
    }
    this.history = [];
  }
}

// ============================================================================
// ONE EURO FILTER IMPLEMENTATION
// ============================================================================

class OneEuroFilter {
  constructor(freq, mincutoff = 1.0, beta = 0.0, dcutoff = 1.0) {
    this.freq = freq;
    this.mincutoff = mincutoff;
    this.beta = beta;
    this.dcutoff = dcutoff;
    this.x = null;
    this.dx = null;
    this.lasttime = null;
  }

  alpha(cutoff) {
    const te = 1.0 / this.freq;
    const tau = 1.0 / (2 * Math.PI * cutoff);
    return 1.0 / (1.0 + tau / te);
  }

  filter(x, timestamp = null) {
    if (this.x === null) {
      this.x = x;
      this.dx = 0;
      this.lasttime = timestamp;
      return x;
    }

    let te;
    if (timestamp !== null && this.lasttime !== null) {
      te = timestamp - this.lasttime;
    } else {
      te = 1.0 / this.freq;
    }
    this.lasttime = timestamp;

    const dx = (x - this.x) / te;
    const edx = this.dx === null ? dx : dx + this.alpha(this.dcutoff) * (dx - this.dx);
    this.dx = edx;

    const cutoff = this.mincutoff + this.beta * Math.abs(edx);
    const filteredX = this.x + this.alpha(cutoff) * (x - this.x);
    this.x = filteredX;

    return filteredX;
  }
}

// ============================================================================
// USAGE EXAMPLE
// ============================================================================

/*
// Initialize
const detector = new ImprovedPoseDetector({
  model: 'MoveNet',
  minConfidence: 0.3,
  smoothing: true,
  oneEuroFilter: true,
  fps: 30
});

await detector.initialize();

// Detect pose
const result = await detector.detectPose(videoElement, timestamp);

if (result.success) {
  console.log('Detected:', {
    keypoints: result.keypoints,
    stats: result.stats
  });
  
  // Use keypoints for analysis...
} else {
  console.log('Detection failed:', result.reason);
}

// Get overall stats
const stats = detector.getStats();
console.log('Detection rate:', stats.detectionRate + '%');

// Reset when analyzing new video
detector.reset();
*/

// Export
if (typeof module !== 'undefined' && module.exports) {
  module.exports = { ImprovedPoseDetector, OneEuroFilter };
}

        <details class="panel feature-card expand-card">
          <summary>
            <div class="micro-label">AI Video Analysis</div>
            <div class="expand-head"><h3>Angles translated into coaching language</h3><span class="expand-chip">Details</span></div>
            <p class="summary-copy">The report turns raw movement data into a short explanation players can act on immediately.</p>
          </summary>
          <div class="expand-body">
            <div class="expand-list">
              <div><strong>What it means:</strong> the biggest angle changes are explained in plain English, not biomechanics jargon.</div>
              <div><strong>Why it matters:</strong> players follow through faster when they understand the cost of the movement mistake.</div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </details>
        <details class="panel feature-card light expand-card">
          <summary>
            <div class="micro-label" style="background:rgba(0,0,0,0.06);color:#0e1012;border:1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.08);">Progress Tracking</div>
            <div class="expand-head"><h3>Digestible dashboards</h3><span class="expand-chip">Details</span></div>
            <p class="summary-copy" style="color:rgba(14,16,18,.72);">Player and coach tabs separate analytics, messages, schedule, and training into cleaner views.</p>
          </summary>
          <div class="expand-body" style="color:rgba(14,16,18,.74);">
            <div class="expand-list">
              <div><strong>What it means:</strong> progress graphs and next actions live in separate lanes instead of one crowded dashboard.</div>
              <div><strong>Why it matters:</strong> the player sees one weekly focus and the coach gets faster triage.</div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </details>
        <details class="panel feature-card expand-card">
          <summary>
            <div class="micro-label">Coach layer</div>
            <div class="expand-head"><h3>Assign drills and follow through</h3><span class="expand-chip">Details</span></div>
            <p class="summary-copy">Coach notes, assignments, and schedule context stay attached to the same athlete record.</p>
          </summary>
          <div class="expand-body">
            <div class="expand-list">
              <div><strong>What it means:</strong> the coach can move from report to message to assignment without rewriting everything.</div>
              <div><strong>Why it matters:</strong> one precise note can become the athlete's next drill block and session focus.</div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </details>
        <details class="panel feature-card expand-card">
          <summary>
            <div class="micro-label">Dual sport path</div>
            <div class="expand-head"><h3>Tennis first, pickleball ready</h3><span class="expand-chip">Details</span></div>
            <p class="summary-copy">The platform can expand without making the tennis experience feel generic or watered down.</p>
          </summary>
          <div class="expand-body">
            <div class="expand-list">
              <div><strong>What it means:</strong> SmartSwing keeps tennis as the lead experience while allowing the workflow to branch cleanly.</div>
              <div><strong>Why it matters:</strong> new sports can inherit the system without diluting the core product.</div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </details>
      </div>
    </section>

  <script>
    const homepageLeadForm = document.getElementById('homepageLeadForm');
    const homepageLeadNotice = document.getElementById('homepageLeadNotice');

    homepageLeadForm.addEventListener('submit', async (event) => {
      event.preventDefault();
      const result = await window.SmartSwingGrowth.submitLead({
        name: document.getElementById('leadName').value,
        email: document.getElementById('leadEmail').value,
        topic: 'homepage-lead-magnet',
        offer: 'Practice planning checklist',
        message: `Role: ${document.getElementById('leadRole').value}`,
        source: '/'
      });

      if (!result.ok) {
        homepageLeadNotice.className = 'lead-note warn';
        homepageLeadNotice.textContent = 'Please complete your name, email, and role before requesting the checklist.';
        return;
      }

      homepageLeadForm.reset();
      homepageLeadNotice.className = 'lead-note success';
      homepageLeadNotice.textContent = result.synced
        ? 'Checklist interest captured and synced to SmartSwing support.'
        : `Checklist interest saved locally at ${new Date(result.savedAt).toLocaleString()}.`;
    });
  </script>

<body>
  <main class="page">
    <section class="hero">
      <div class="eyebrow">Launch Audit</div>
      <h1>SmartSwing Launch Readiness Report</h1>
      <p>This is the HTML version of the launch audit, prepared so it can be opened directly in Google Chrome and shared internally.</p>
      <div class="meta">
        <div class="chip">Date: 2026-03-25</div>
        <div class="chip">Repo: _smartswing_repo</div>
        <div class="chip">Status: Soft launch close, broad launch not yet advised</div>
      </div>
      <div class="verdict">
        <strong>Current verdict</strong>
        The website is materially stronger after this pass, and the in-repo test suite passes. The remaining blockers are live production setup and legal review, not customer-facing HTML bugs.
      </div>
    </section>

    <section class="grid">
      <article class="panel">
        <h2>What Was Audited</h2>
        <ul>
          <li>Public pages, legal pages, and navigation connectivity</li>
          <li>Authentication, signup, checkout, payment success, and welcome flow</li>
          <li>Supabase and Stripe integration points</li>
          <li>Internal-file exposure risk in deployment output</li>
          <li>SEO, crawlability, accessibility, mobile behavior, and trust UX</li>
        </ul>
      </article>

      <article class="panel">
        <h2>What Was Fixed</h2>
        <ul>
          <li>Production-safe auth fallback hardening in <code>app-data.js</code></li>
          <li>Deployment exclusion of internal docs, SQL, scripts, and draft GPT browser files</li>
          <li>Stronger response headers in <code>_headers</code> and <code>vercel.json</code></li>
          <li>Accessibility and consent improvements on login, signup, and pricing controls</li>
          <li>SEO metadata and sitemap improvements for key public pages</li>
          <li>Homepage social-proof section reframed into transparent user perspectives</li>
        </ul>
      </article>
    </section>

    <section class="grid">
      <article class="panel">
        <h2>Verification Results</h2>
        <div class="status-list">
          <div class="status ok">
            <strong>Static link audit</strong>
            No missing local HTML links were found in the current page set.
          </div>
          <div class="status ok">
            <strong>Metadata spot check</strong>
            Indexable public pages now have strong baseline metadata coverage, including the library page.
          </div>
          <div class="status ok">
            <strong>Automated test suite</strong>
            <code>tests/run-tests.ps1</code> completed successfully after the fixes.
          </div>
        </div>
      </article>

      <article class="panel">
        <h2>Launch Risks Still Open</h2>
        <div class="status-list">
          <div class="status warn">
            <strong>Supabase production auth</strong>
            Live email auth, Google, Apple, and Facebook OAuth still need real production configuration.
          </div>
          <div class="status warn">
            <strong>Stripe live billing</strong>
            Live prices, webhook secret, billing portal, and production payment settings still need to be confirmed.
          </div>
          <div class="status risk">
            <strong>Legal review</strong>
            Policy pages are structured and product-ready, but they are not a substitute for attorney review.
          </div>
        </div>
      </article>
    </section>

    <section class="panel">
      <h2>Recommendation</h2>
      <p>A limited soft launch is reasonable after live Supabase and Stripe setup are completed and one final manual browser pass is done on desktop and mobile.</p>
      <p>A broader public announcement, paid traffic, or scaled acquisition should wait until:</p>
      <ul>
        <li>live checkout is verified in production end to end</li>
        <li>Supabase subscription persistence is confirmed with real Stripe events</li>
        <li>Search Console and sitemap submission are completed</li>
        <li>legal and privacy review is complete</li>
      </ul>
    </section>

    <section class="panel" style="margin-top:18px">
      <h2>Reference Guidance Used</h2>
      <ul>
        <li><a href="https://developers.google.com/search/docs/fundamentals/seo-starter-guide" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Google Search Central SEO Starter Guide</a></li>
        <li><a href="https://www.w3.org/WAI/standards-guidelines/wcag/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">W3C WCAG Overview</a></li>
