    <section class="grid">
      <article class="panel">
        <h2>What Is Already Strong</h2>
        <div class="bullet-list">
          <div class="bullet">
            <strong>Connected customer journey</strong>
            Landing page, pricing, signup, login, cart, checkout, payment success, and welcome onboarding are connected.
          </div>
          <div class="bullet">
            <strong>Professional checkout direction</strong>
            The payment flow uses a Stripe-hosted subscription path instead of a fake client-side checkout.
          </div>
          <div class="bullet">
            <strong>Compliance structure exists</strong>
            Privacy, terms, accessibility, cookie, California privacy, copyright, brand, about, and contact pages are in place.
          </div>
          <div class="bullet">
            <strong>Launch hygiene improved</strong>
            Internal artifacts are excluded from deployment, and production-safe auth behavior is hardened.
          </div>
        </div>
      </article>

      <article class="panel">
        <h2>What Still Needs To Be Done</h2>
        <div class="bullet-list">
          <div class="bullet">
            <strong>Supabase live configuration</strong>
            Real production auth, OAuth providers, and redirect settings still need to be connected.
          </div>
          <div class="bullet">
            <strong>Stripe live configuration</strong>
            Real live prices, webhook secret, billing portal, and production account settings still need to be confirmed.
          </div>
          <div class="bullet">
            <strong>Legal review</strong>
            Policy pages should be reviewed by counsel before broader public rollout.
          </div>
          <div class="bullet">
            <strong>Final manual browser QA</strong>
            One last pass should be done on real desktop and mobile devices before launch.
          </div>
        </div>
      </article>
    </section>

    <section class="grid">
      <article class="panel">
        <h2>Recommended Launch Sequence</h2>
        <div class="timeline">
          <div class="step">
            <strong>Step 1: Finish live setup</strong>
            Connect production Supabase and Stripe values and verify real account creation and payment events.
          </div>
          <div class="step">
            <strong>Step 2: Run a controlled soft launch</strong>
            Invite a limited group of players, coaches, or trusted testers and collect feedback before spending on traffic.
          </div>
          <div class="step">
            <strong>Step 3: Tighten based on behavior</strong>
            Use real friction points from sign-up, plan selection, onboarding, and checkout to refine the experience.
          </div>
          <div class="step">
            <strong>Step 4: Expand once production is proven</strong>
            Start broader promotion only after live billing, persistence, and support processes are confirmed.
          </div>
        </div>
      </article>

      <article class="panel">
        <h2>Practical Recommendation</h2>
        <p>If the goal is to start getting feedback quickly, do not wait for perfect. Finish live auth and billing setup, do one final device check, and then begin with a limited early-access group.</p>
        <p>If the goal is a wider public launch or paid acquisition, more caution is warranted. That should wait until the live production environment is fully verified and legal review is complete.</p>
        <div class="bullet-list" style="margin-top:16px">
          <div class="bullet">
            <strong>Good next move</strong>
            Launch to a small invited audience and learn from real users.
          </div>
          <div class="bullet">
            <strong>Not yet advised</strong>
            Broad announcement, paid ads, or scaled public acquisition before live setup is fully confirmed.
          </div>
        </div>
      </article>
    </section>

  <script>
    const store = window.SmartSwingStore;
    const user = store.getCurrentUser();
    const plan = store.getCurrentPlan();
    const hasLibrary = store.canAccessLibrary();

    function renderPlanSummary() {
      const usage = user ? store.canGenerateReport(user.id) : { used: 0, limit: 1 };
      const usageText = Number.isFinite(usage.limit) ? `${usage.used}/${usage.limit}` : `${usage.used}/Unlimited`;
      document.getElementById('planSummary').textContent =
        `Active plan: ${plan.name}. Monthly reports used: ${usageText}. ${hasLibrary ? 'External library links are unlocked.' : 'You can browse titles now. Upgrade to Performance or Tournament Pro to unlock protected drill and tactical video links.'}`;
    }

    function renderLibrary() {
      const level = document.getElementById('levelFilter').value;
      const shot = document.getElementById('shotFilter').value;
      const context = document.getElementById('contextFilter').value;

      const drills = store.getDrillLibrary({ level, shotType: shot }).slice(0, 40);
      const tactics = store.getTacticLibrary({ level, situation: context }).slice(0, 40);

      const drillList = document.getElementById('drillList');
      if (!drills.length) {
        drillList.innerHTML = '<div class="muted">No drills match your current filters.</div>';
      } else {
        drillList.innerHTML = drills.map((drill, index) => `
          <details class="card" ${index === 0 ? 'open' : ''}>
            <summary>
              <div class="title">${drill.title}</div>
              <div class="meta">${drill.channel} | ${drill.skillLevel} | ${drill.strokeType} | ${drill.duration || ''}</div>
              <div class="muted">${drill.focus}</div>
            </summary>
            <div class="detail-body">
              ${drill.targets?.length ? `<div class="muted" style="margin-top:8px;"><strong>Targets:</strong> ${drill.targets.slice(0, 3).join(' | ')}</div>` : ''}
              ${drill.expectedImprovement && Object.keys(drill.expectedImprovement).length ? `<div class="muted" style="margin-top:8px;"><strong>Expected gain:</strong> ${Object.values(drill.expectedImprovement).slice(0, 2).join(' | ')}</div>` : ''}
              ${hasLibrary ? `<div style="margin-top:10px;"><a href="${drill.videoUrl}" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Open video</a></div>` : '<div class="lock">Upgrade required to open external drill video links.</div>'}
            </div>
          </details>
        `).join('');
      }

      const tacticList = document.getElementById('tacticList');
      if (!tactics.length) {
        tacticList.innerHTML = '<div class="muted">No tactics match your current filters.</div>';
      } else {
        tacticList.innerHTML = tactics.map((tactic, index) => `
          <details class="card" ${index === 0 ? 'open' : ''}>
            <summary>
              <div class="title">${tactic.title}</div>
              <div class="meta">${tactic.channel} | ${tactic.skillLevel} | ${tactic.situation}</div>
              <div class="muted">${tactic.summary}</div>
            </summary>
            <div class="detail-body">
              ${tactic.tacticalFocus?.length ? `<div class="muted" style="margin-top:8px;"><strong>Focus:</strong> ${tactic.tacticalFocus.slice(0, 3).join(' | ')}</div>` : ''}
              ${tactic.expectedImprovement ? `<div class="muted" style="margin-top:8px;"><strong>Expected impact:</strong> ${Object.values(tactic.expectedImprovement).slice(0, 2).join(' | ')}</div>` : ''}
              ${hasLibrary ? `<div style="margin-top:10px;"><a href="${tactic.videoUrl}" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Open tactical video</a></div>` : '<div class="lock">Upgrade required to open tactical video links.</div>'}
            </div>
          </details>
        `).join('');
      }
    }

    document.getElementById('levelFilter').addEventListener('change', renderLibrary);
    document.getElementById('shotFilter').addEventListener('change', renderLibrary);
    document.getElementById('contextFilter').addEventListener('change', renderLibrary);

    renderPlanSummary();
    renderLibrary();
  </script>
</body>
</html>

  <!-- Vercel Web Analytics -->
  <script src="./analytics.js"></script>
</head>
<body>
  <div class="shell">
    <a class="logo" href="./index.html">SmartSwing AI</a>
    <div class="card">
      <h1>Sign In</h1>
      <p class="subtext">Access saved swing reports, KPI tracking, coach sessions, and your latest biomechanics recommendations.</p>

      <div class="mode-switch">
        <a class="active" href="./login.html">Sign in</a>
        <a data-preserve-intent href="./signup.html">Create account</a>
      </div>

      <div id="alertBox" class="alert" role="status" aria-live="polite"></div>

      <div class="demo-box">
        <strong>Faster access options</strong>
        Use Google, Meta, or Apple when available, or sign in with email and password. If you are new to SmartSwing, create your account first and browser autofill can help complete your profile faster.
      </div>

      <div id="authStatus" class="alert" role="status" aria-live="polite"></div>

      <form autocomplete="on" onsubmit="handleLogin(event)">
        <div class="field">
          <label for="email">Email</label>
          <input id="email" name="email" type="email" inputmode="email" spellcheck="false" autocomplete="email username" placeholder="you@example.com" required>
        </div>
        <div class="field">
          <label for="password">Password</label>
          <input id="password" name="password" type="password" autocomplete="current-password" placeholder="Enter your password" required>
        </div>
        <button id="loginBtn" class="btn btn-primary" type="submit">Sign In</button>
      </form>

      <div class="oauth-grid">
        <button class="btn btn-secondary oauth-btn" data-oauth-provider="google" type="button" onclick="loginWithProvider('google')">Google</button>
        <button class="btn btn-secondary oauth-btn" data-oauth-provider="facebook" type="button" onclick="loginWithProvider('facebook')">Meta</button>
        <button class="btn btn-secondary oauth-btn" data-oauth-provider="apple" type="button" onclick="loginWithProvider('apple')">Apple</button>
      </div>

      <a class="btn btn-secondary" data-preserve-intent href="./signup.html">Create account</a>

      <div class="links">
        Don't have an account? <a data-preserve-intent href="./signup.html">Create one</a>
      </div>
      <div class="links" style="margin-top:10px">
        By continuing, you agree to the <a href="./user-agreement.html">User Agreement</a> and <a href="./privacy-policy.html">Privacy Policy</a>.
      </div>
    </div>
    <a class="back-link" href="./index.html">Back to homepage</a>
  </div>

  <script src="./public-app-config.js"></script>
  <script src="/api/runtime-config.js"></script>
  <script src="./app-data.js"></script>
  <script src="./site-experience.js"></script>
  <script src="./pwa.js"></script>
  <script>
    const store = window.SmartSwingStore;
    const ALLOWED_PLANS = new Set(['free', 'starter', 'pro', 'elite']);

    async function initOAuthButtons() {
      const authConfig = window.SMARTSWING_AUTH_CONFIG || {};
      const results = await Promise.all(Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('[data-oauth-provider]')).map(async (button) => {
        const provider = button.dataset.oauthProvider;
        const envEnabled = provider === 'google'
          ? authConfig.googleEnabled
          : provider === 'apple'
            ? authConfig.appleEnabled
            : authConfig.facebookEnabled;
        if (!envEnabled) {
          button.disabled = true;
          button.title = `${provider} sign-in is not enabled yet.`;
          button.style.opacity = '0.55';
          button.style.cursor = 'not-allowed';
          return { provider, enabled: false, reason: `${provider} sign-in is not enabled yet.` };
        }
        if (!store.isSupabaseConfigured || !store.isSupabaseConfigured() || !store.getOAuthProviderAvailability) {
          return { provider, enabled: true, reason: '' };
        }
        const availability = await store.getOAuthProviderAvailability(provider);
        if (availability.available) {
          button.disabled = false;
          button.title = '';
          button.style.opacity = '';
          button.style.cursor = '';
          return { provider, enabled: true, reason: '' };
        }
        button.disabled = true;
        button.title = availability.reason || `${provider} sign-in is unavailable right now.`;
        button.style.opacity = '0.55';
        button.style.cursor = 'not-allowed';
        return { provider, enabled: false, reason: button.title };
      }));
      return results;
    }

    function getDesiredCheckoutIntent() {
      const params = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);
      const requestedPlan = String(params.get('plan') || '').toLowerCase();
      if (ALLOWED_PLANS.has(requestedPlan)) {
        return {
          planId: requestedPlan,
          billingInterval: params.get('interval') || 'monthly'
        };
      }
      return store.getCheckoutIntent ? store.getCheckoutIntent() : null;
    }

    function syncIntentLinks() {
      const intent = getDesiredCheckoutIntent();
      if (!intent?.planId) return;
      document.querySelectorAll('[data-preserve-intent]').forEach((link) => {
        const url = new URL(link.getAttribute('href'), window.location.href);
        url.searchParams.set('plan', intent.planId);
        if (intent.planId !== 'free') {
          url.searchParams.set('interval', intent.billingInterval || 'monthly');
        }
        link.setAttribute('href', `${url.pathname.split('/').pop()}${url.search}`);
      });
    }

    function getSignedInDestination(user) {
      const intent = getDesiredCheckoutIntent();
      if (intent?.planId) {
        if (store.setCheckoutIntent) {
          store.setCheckoutIntent(intent);
        }
        const destination = store.getCheckoutIntentDestination ? store.getCheckoutIntentDestination(intent) : '';
        if (destination) return destination;
      }
      return store.getPostAuthDestinationForUser(user || store.getCurrentUser());
    }

    function showAlert(message, type = 'error') {
      const alertBox = document.getElementById('alertBox');
      alertBox.textContent = message;
      alertBox.className = `alert alert-${type}`;
      alertBox.style.display = 'block';
    }

    function showAuthStatus(message, type = 'info') {
      const authStatus = document.getElementById('authStatus');
      authStatus.textContent = message;
      authStatus.className = `alert alert-${type}`;
      authStatus.style.display = 'block';
    }

    function setLoginAvailability(enabled, message = '') {
      const loginBtn = document.getElementById('loginBtn');
      loginBtn.disabled = !enabled;
      loginBtn.dataset.locked = enabled ? '0' : '1';
      loginBtn.title = enabled ? '' : message;
    }

    async function handleLogin(event) {
      event.preventDefault();
      const email = document.getElementById('email').value;
      const password = document.getElementById('password').value;
      const loginBtn = document.getElementById('loginBtn');

      if (loginBtn.dataset.locked === '1') {
        showAlert(loginBtn.title || 'Sign-in is currently unavailable on this deployment.');
        return;
      }

      loginBtn.disabled = true;
      loginBtn.textContent = 'Signing in...';

      try {
        await store.signIn(email, password);
        showAlert('Login successful. Redirecting...', 'success');
        setTimeout(() => {
          window.location.href = getSignedInDestination();
        }, 600);
      } catch (error) {
        showAlert(error.message || 'Login failed.');
        loginBtn.disabled = false;
        loginBtn.textContent = 'Sign In';
      }
    }

    async function loginWithProvider(provider) {
      try {
        await store.signInWithOAuthProvider(provider);
      } catch (error) {
        showAlert(error.message || `${provider} OAuth is not configured. Use email/password or create an account first.`);
      }
    }

    async function bootstrapAuth() {
      const currentUser = store.getCurrentUser();
      if (currentUser) {
        window.location.href = getSignedInDestination(currentUser);
        return;
      }

      let oauthStatuses = [];
      if (store.isSupabaseConfigured()) {
        oauthStatuses = await initOAuthButtons();
        try {
          const restored = await store.restoreSupabaseSession();
          if (restored) {
            window.location.href = getSignedInDestination(restored);
            return;
          }
        } catch (error) {
          showAlert(error.message || 'Unable to restore an existing session.');
        }
        const enabledProviders = oauthStatuses.filter((entry) => entry.enabled);
        if (!enabledProviders.length) {
          showAuthStatus('Social sign-in is unavailable because the Supabase OAuth providers are not enabled yet. Email/password login still works.', 'info');
        }
      } else {
        const authAvailability = store.getAuthAvailability ? store.getAuthAvailability() : {
          supabaseConfigured: false,
          localDataMode: false,
          emailPasswordAvailable: false
        };
        document.querySelectorAll('.oauth-btn').forEach((button) => {
          button.disabled = true;
          button.style.opacity = '0.55';
          button.style.cursor = 'not-allowed';
        });
        if (authAvailability.emailPasswordAvailable) {
          setLoginAvailability(true);
          showAuthStatus('Social sign-in is disabled in this preview because the Supabase public configuration is missing. Email/password login still works locally.', 'info');
        } else {
          const message = 'Live sign-in is unavailable on this deployment until the Supabase public URL and anon key are published.';
          setLoginAvailability(false, message);
          showAuthStatus(`${message} Social sign-in is also disabled.`, 'error');
        }
      }
    }

    const params = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);
    const message = params.get('message');
    const type = params.get('type');
    const requestedPlan = String(params.get('plan') || '').toLowerCase();
    if (ALLOWED_PLANS.has(requestedPlan)) {
      store.setCheckoutIntent({
        planId: requestedPlan,
        billingInterval: params.get('interval') || 'monthly',
        source: 'login-page'
      });
    }
    if (message) {
      showAlert(decodeURIComponent(message), type || 'success');
    }

    syncIntentLinks();
    bootstrapAuth();
  </script>
</body>
</html>

  <script>
    if (window.SmartSwingStore?.getPendingExternalCheckout) {
      const pending = window.SmartSwingStore.getPendingExternalCheckout();
      if (pending?.planId) {
        const interval = pending.billingInterval || 'monthly';
        document.querySelector('.btn-primary').href = `./checkout.html?plan=${encodeURIComponent(pending.planId)}${pending.planId !== 'free' ? `&interval=${encodeURIComponent(interval)}` : ''}`;
      }
    }
    if (window.SmartSwingStore?.clearPendingExternalCheckout) {
      window.SmartSwingStore.clearPendingExternalCheckout();
    }
  </script>

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
  <title>SmartSwing AI | Payment Status</title>
  <meta name="robots" content="noindex,nofollow">
  <link rel="manifest" href="./manifest.json">
  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
  <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=DM+Sans:wght@400;500;700;800&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
  <style>
    :root{--bg:#0a0a0a;--panel:rgba(28,28,30,.92);--line:rgba(255,255,255,.1);--text:#f5f5f7;--muted:#eef3f7;--volt:#39ff14;--accent:#ffd84d;--danger:#ff7a7a;--dark:#0e1012}
    *{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0}
    body{font-family:"DM Sans",sans-serif;color:var(--text);background:radial-gradient(circle at top left, rgba(57,255,20,.08), transparent 22%),linear-gradient(180deg,#050505 0%,#0a0a0a 50%,#101010 100%);min-height:100vh}
    .page{width:min(920px,calc(100% - 32px));margin:0 auto;padding:28px 0 72px}
    .top{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;gap:12px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-bottom:20px}
    .brand{text-decoration:none;font-size:26px;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:-.05em;color:var(--volt)}
    .brand span{color:var(--volt)}
    .panel{background:var(--panel);border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:28px;padding:28px}
    .eyebrow{display:inline-flex;border-radius:999px;padding:8px 12px;font-size:12px;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:.08em;text-transform:uppercase;background:rgba(255,216,77,.12);color:var(--accent);border:1px solid rgba(255,216,77,.22)}
    h1{font-size:clamp(38px,6vw,62px);line-height:.95;letter-spacing:-.06em;margin:16px 0 14px;max-width:12ch}
    p{line-height:1.7}
    .muted{color:var(--muted)}
    .stack{display:grid;gap:14px;margin-top:18px}
    .card{border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:18px;padding:16px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.03)}

    .ok{color:var(--volt)}

<body>
  <div class="page">
    <header class="top">
      <a class="brand" href="./index.html">Smart<span>Swing</span> AI</a>
      <a class="btn" href="./pricing.html">Back to pricing</a>
    </header>

    <section class="panel">
      <div class="eyebrow">Payment status</div>
      <h1 id="title">Checking your checkout status</h1>
      <p class="muted" id="summary">Reviewing the latest handoff from secure billing and verifying it before any paid entitlements unlock.</p>
      <div class="stack" id="details"></div>
      <div class="actions">
        <a class="btn-primary" id="primaryAction" href="./dashboard.html">Open dashboard</a>
        <a class="btn" href="./checkout.html">Return to checkout</a>
        <a class="btn" href="./contact.html">Contact support</a>
      </div>
    </section>
  </div>

  <script src="./public-app-config.js"></script>
  <script src="/api/runtime-config.js"></script>
  <script src="./app-data.js"></script>
  <script>
    const store = window.SmartSwingStore;
    const params = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);
    const provider = params.get('provider') || 'unknown';
    const status = params.get('status') || 'returned';
    const requestedPlanId = params.get('plan') || '';
    const sessionId = params.get('session_id') || '';
    const pending = store.getPendingExternalCheckout();
    const currentUser = store.getCurrentUser();
    const currentPlan = currentUser ? store.getCurrentPlan(currentUser.id) : null;
    const requestedPlan = requestedPlanId ? store.getPlanDefinition(requestedPlanId) : null;
    const details = [];
    const primaryAction = document.getElementById('primaryAction');

    function setPrimaryDestination(href, label) {
      primaryAction.href = href;
      primaryAction.textContent = label;
    }

    function pushCard(title, body, tone) {
      details.push(`<div class="card"><strong class="${tone || ''}">${title}</strong>${body}</div>`);
    }

    function render() {
      document.getElementById('details').innerHTML = details.join('');
    }

    const titleEl = document.getElementById('title');
    const summaryEl = document.getElementById('summary');

    async function main() {
      if (status === 'setup-required') {
        titleEl.textContent = 'Stripe checkout still needs server configuration';
        summaryEl.textContent = 'The app is wired for Stripe, but one or more Stripe keys or price ids are still missing in the server environment.';
        pushCard('What is missing', 'Add STRIPE_SECRET_KEY, STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET, and the Stripe price ids in Vercel before sending customers into paid checkout.', 'warn');
        pushCard('What is safe today', 'Free access, plan guardrails, report limits, and dashboard access still work. Paid activation is intentionally blocked rather than faked.', 'ok');
        render();
        return;
      }

      if (provider !== 'stripe' || !sessionId) {
        if (currentUser && requestedPlan && currentPlan && currentPlan.id === requestedPlan.id) {
          titleEl.textContent = `${requestedPlan.name} is active`;
          summaryEl.textContent = 'Your account already reflects the requested plan. You can continue into the dashboard immediately.';
          pushCard('Current plan', `${currentPlan.name}${currentPlan.isTrial ? ' trial' : ''} is active on this account.`, 'ok');
          if (store.isOnboardingRequired?.(currentUser.id)) {
            setPrimaryDestination(store.getOnboardingRoute(currentUser), 'Complete welcome quiz');
          }
        } else {
          titleEl.textContent = 'Checkout returned, but verification data is incomplete';
          summaryEl.textContent = 'The app expected a Stripe session id but did not receive one, so it will not activate paid access from the URL alone.';
          pushCard('Why this matters', 'Paid access is only unlocked after the Stripe checkout session is verified server-side.', 'warn');
          if (requestedPlan) {
            pushCard('Requested plan', `${requestedPlan.name} was the requested upgrade target.`, '');
          }
        }
        pushCard('Billing provider', provider, '');
        render();
        return;
      }

      try {
        const verification = await store.verifyStripeCheckoutSession(sessionId);
        if (!verification.verified) {
          titleEl.textContent = 'Stripe checkout returned, but payment is not complete yet';
          summaryEl.textContent = 'The checkout session exists, but Stripe has not marked it complete and billable yet.';
          pushCard('Stripe status', `Session status: ${verification.status || 'unknown'} | Payment status: ${verification.paymentStatus || 'unknown'}.`, 'warn');
          render();
          return;
        }

        if (currentUser && verification.smartSwingUserId && verification.smartSwingUserId === currentUser.id) {
          const updatedUser = store.applyBillingActivation(currentUser.id, verification);
          store.clearPendingExternalCheckout();
          titleEl.textContent = `${store.getPlanDefinition(verification.planId).name} is active`;
          summaryEl.textContent = 'Stripe payment was verified and the new plan is now active on this account.';
          pushCard('Plan unlocked', `${store.getPlanDefinition(verification.planId).name} is active with subscription status ${verification.subscriptionStatus || 'active'}.`, 'ok');
          if (verification.billingPeriodEnd) {
            pushCard('Current billing period', `Paid access is active through ${new Date(verification.billingPeriodEnd).toLocaleString()}.`, '');
          }
          if (verification.profileSynced) {
            pushCard('Cloud sync', 'Supabase profile status was updated from the verified Stripe session.', 'ok');
          } else {
            pushCard('Cloud sync', 'Local access was updated immediately. If Supabase service-role credentials are added later, webhook sync will keep remote billing state aligned too.', 'warn');
          }
          pushCard('Account', `${updatedUser.email}`, '');
          const onboardingRoute = store.getOnboardingRoute?.(updatedUser);
          if (onboardingRoute) {
            setPrimaryDestination(onboardingRoute, 'Complete welcome quiz');
            setTimeout(() => {
              window.location.href = onboardingRoute;
            }, 1200);
          }
        } else {
          titleEl.textContent = 'Stripe payment verified';
          summaryEl.textContent = 'The payment is valid, but the current browser session does not match the billing session user, so no local plan change was applied here.';
          pushCard('Verified plan', `${store.getPlanDefinition(verification.planId).name} was confirmed by Stripe.`, 'ok');
          pushCard('What to do next', 'Sign into the same SmartSwing account used for checkout and reload this page if the dashboard does not reflect the upgrade yet.', 'warn');
        }

        pushCard('Billing provider', 'Stripe Checkout', '');
        render();
      } catch (error) {
        titleEl.textContent = 'Stripe verification could not complete';
        summaryEl.textContent = 'The app could not confirm the checkout result yet. No paid access was granted from the URL alone.';
        pushCard('Verification error', error.message || 'Unknown Stripe verification error.', 'error');
        if (pending?.planId) {
          const pendingPlan = store.getPlanDefinition(pending.planId);
          pushCard('Pending handoff', `${pendingPlan.name} checkout was started from ${pending.source || 'the app'} at ${new Date(pending.startedAt || Date.now()).toLocaleString()}.`, '');
        }
        render();
      }
    }

    main();
  </script>
</body>
</html>

  <script>
    const form = document.getElementById('pickleballWaitlist');
    const notice = document.getElementById('pickleballNotice');

    form.addEventListener('submit', async (event) => {
      event.preventDefault();
      const result = await window.SmartSwingGrowth.submitLead({
        name: document.getElementById('pickleballName').value,
        email: document.getElementById('pickleballEmail').value,
        topic: 'pickleball-early-access',
        offer: 'Pickleball early access',
        message: `Interest: ${document.getElementById('pickleballInterest').value}`,
        source: '/pickleball.html'
      });

      if (!result.ok) {
        notice.className = 'notice warn';
        notice.textContent = 'Please complete your name and email before joining the waitlist.';
        return;
      }

      form.reset();
      notice.className = 'notice success';
      notice.textContent = result.synced
        ? 'Pickleball interest captured and synced to SmartSwing support.'
        : `Pickleball interest saved locally at ${new Date(result.savedAt).toLocaleString()}.`;
    });
  </script>
</body>

      <article class="qa">
        <h3>What counts as one review?</h3>
        <p class="muted" style="margin-top:10px">Each generated report counts as one review. Opening the analyzer alone does not consume a credit.</p>
      </article>
      <article class="qa">
        <h3>Can I switch plans anytime?</h3>
        <p class="muted" style="margin-top:10px">Yes. Monthly plans can be canceled anytime. Yearly plans can also be canceled anytime and remain active through the end of the paid annual term.</p>
      </article>
      <article class="qa">
        <h3>Why can't Starter save reports?</h3>
        <p class="muted" style="margin-top:10px">Starter is designed to create the first success moment. Save, print, and export unlock on paid plans.</p>
      </article>
      <article class="qa">
        <h3>Where do drills and tactics unlock?</h3>
        <p class="muted" style="margin-top:10px">Pro and Tournament Pro unlock the full drill and tactics library inside reports and the library page.</p>
      </article>
    </section>

    <footer class="footer">
      <div class="footer-col">
        <strong>SmartSwing AI</strong>
        <div>Web-first tennis intelligence priced to reduce wasted practice and improve lesson carryover.</div>
        <div style="font-size:13px;color:var(--muted)">&copy; 2026 SmartSwing AI</div>

  <script src="/api/runtime-config.js"></script>
  <script src="./app-data.js"></script>
  <script src="./site-experience.js"></script>
  <script src="./pwa.js"></script>
  <script>
    const store = window.SmartSwingStore;
    const BILLING_COPY = {
      monthly: 'Cancel anytime.',
      yearly: 'Cancel anytime | billed yearly | save 15%'
    };
    const PLAN_NOTES = {
      starter: 'For regular players who want steady feedback without unlimited usage.',
      pro: 'The ideal plan for players who want analysis to become a real habit.',
      elite: 'For players who want human review and tournament preparation built into the system.'
    };
    const launchDeadline = new Date('2026-03-31T23:59:59-04:00');
    const intervalFromQuery = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search).get('interval');
    let activeBillingInterval = store.normalizeBillingInterval(intervalFromQuery || 'monthly');

    function renderLaunchWindow() {
      const titleEl = document.getElementById('launchPricingTitle');
      const textEl = document.getElementById('launchPricingText');
      if (!titleEl || !textEl) return;

      const now = new Date();
      const diffMs = launchDeadline.getTime() - now.getTime();
      const diffDays = Math.ceil(diffMs / 86400000);

      if (diffDays > 1) {
        titleEl.textContent = 'Launch pricing window is active.';
        textEl.textContent = `${diffDays} days remain until March 31, 2026. Current public pricing may change after that date.`;
        return;
      }

      if (diffDays === 1) {
        titleEl.textContent = 'Launch pricing window is almost over.';
        textEl.textContent = '1 day remains until March 31, 2026. Current public pricing may change after that date.';
        return;
      }

      titleEl.textContent = 'Current launch pricing is still live.';
      textEl.textContent = 'The original March 31, 2026 window has passed. Keep this section updated if pricing changes again so the message stays trustworthy.';
    }

    function renderRoiCalculator() {
      const slider = document.getElementById('lessonSpendRange');
      if (!slider) return;
      const lessonSpend = Number(slider.value || 0);
      const smartSwingMonthly = store.getPlanPrice('pro', 'monthly').amount;
      const smartSwingAnnual = store.getPlanPrice('pro', 'yearly').amount;
      const hourlyLessonsCovered = lessonSpend / 150;
      const monthlySavings = Math.max(lessonSpend - smartSwingMonthly, 0);

      document.getElementById('lessonSpendValue').textContent = `$${lessonSpend.toFixed(0)}`;
      document.getElementById('smartSwingAnnualValue').textContent = `$${smartSwingAnnual.toFixed(2)} per year | $${smartSwingMonthly.toFixed(2)} per month`;
      document.getElementById('monthlySavingsValue').textContent = `$${monthlySavings.toFixed(2)} per month`;
      document.getElementById('lessonEquivalentValue').textContent = `About ${hourlyLessonsCovered.toFixed(1)} one-hour private lessons at $150 each`;
    }

    function renderStatus() {
      const user = store.getCurrentUser();
      const el = document.getElementById('planStatus');
      if (!user) {
        el.innerHTML = '<strong>No active session</strong>Create or sign into an account to activate a plan and sync review usage.';
        return;
      }
      const plan = store.getCurrentPlan();
      const usage = store.canGenerateReport();
      const usageText = Number.isFinite(usage.limit) ? `${usage.used}/${usage.limit}` : `${usage.used}/Unlimited`;
      const intervalLabel = plan.billingInterval === 'yearly' ? 'yearly billing' : 'monthly billing';
      el.innerHTML = `<strong>${user.email}</strong>Current plan: ${plan.name} | ${intervalLabel}. Reports used this month: ${usageText}.`;
    }

    function renderBillingInterval(interval) {
      activeBillingInterval = store.normalizeBillingInterval(interval || 'monthly');
      document.querySelectorAll('[data-billing-toggle]').forEach((button) => {
        button.classList.toggle('active', button.dataset.billingToggle === activeBillingInterval);
        button.setAttribute('aria-pressed', button.dataset.billingToggle === activeBillingInterval ? 'true' : 'false');
      });

      ['starter', 'pro', 'elite'].forEach((planId) => {
        const price = store.getPlanPrice(planId, activeBillingInterval);
        const amountEl = document.querySelector(`[data-plan-price="${planId}"]`);
        const intervalEl = document.querySelector(`[data-plan-interval="${planId}"]`);
        const noteEl = document.querySelector(`[data-plan-note="${planId}"]`);
        const buttonEl = document.querySelector(`[data-plan-button="${planId}"]`);
        const copyEl = document.querySelector(`[data-plan-billing-copy="${planId}"]`);
        if (amountEl) amountEl.textContent = `$${price.amount.toFixed(2)}`;
        if (intervalEl) intervalEl.textContent = activeBillingInterval === 'yearly' ? '/ year' : '/ month';
        if (noteEl) {
          noteEl.textContent = activeBillingInterval === 'yearly'
            ? `${store.getPlanDefinition(planId).name} billed yearly at 15% off. Monthly equivalent: $${price.monthlyEquivalent.toFixed(2)}.`
            : PLAN_NOTES[planId];
        }
        if (buttonEl) {
          buttonEl.href = `./signup.html?plan=${encodeURIComponent(planId)}&interval=${encodeURIComponent(activeBillingInterval)}`;
          buttonEl.dataset.billingInterval = activeBillingInterval;
        }
        if (copyEl) {
          copyEl.textContent = BILLING_COPY[activeBillingInterval];
        }
      });
    }

    document.querySelectorAll('[data-billing-toggle]').forEach((button) => {
      button.addEventListener('click', () => renderBillingInterval(button.dataset.billingToggle));
    });

    document.getElementById('lessonSpendRange')?.addEventListener('input', renderRoiCalculator);

    renderStatus();
    renderBillingInterval(activeBillingInterval);
    renderLaunchWindow();
    renderRoiCalculator();
  </script>
</body>
</html>

// Preferred production path: serve public values through `api/runtime-config.js`
// using environment variables. This file is still useful as a static fallback for
// preview builds that do not expose runtime environment config.
window.SMARTSWING_SUPABASE_CONFIG = {
  url: 'https://YOUR_PROJECT.supabase.co',
  anonKey: 'YOUR_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY'
};

window.SMARTSWING_AUTH_CONFIG = {
  googleEnabled: true,
  appleEnabled: true,
  facebookEnabled: true
};

window.SMARTSWING_PAYMENT_CONFIG = {
  activeProvider: 'stripe',
  stripe: {
    apiBasePath: '/api',
    portalApiPath: '/api/create-billing-portal-session'
  }
};

  anonKey: ''

====================================================================================================
FILE: pwa.js
CATEGORY: script
====================================================================================================
(function () {
  if (!('serviceWorker' in navigator)) return;

  var reloaded = false;

  window.addEventListener('load', function () {
    navigator.serviceWorker.register('./sw.js').then(function (registration) {
      registration.update().catch(function () {});

      if (registration.waiting) {
        registration.waiting.postMessage({ type: 'SKIP_WAITING' });
      }

      registration.addEventListener('updatefound', function () {
        var worker = registration.installing;
        if (!worker) return;

        worker.addEventListener('statechange', function () {
          if (worker.state === 'installed' && navigator.serviceWorker.controller) {
            worker.postMessage({ type: 'SKIP_WAITING' });
          }
        });
      });
    }).catch(function (error) {
      console.warn('SmartSwing service worker registration failed:', error);
    });
  });

  navigator.serviceWorker.addEventListener('controllerchange', function () {
    if (reloaded) return;
    reloaded = true;
    window.location.reload();
  });
})();

  <script>
    const form = document.getElementById('referralForm');
    const notice = document.getElementById('referralNotice');

    form.addEventListener('submit', async (event) => {
      event.preventDefault();
      const result = await window.SmartSwingGrowth.submitLead({
        name: document.getElementById('referralName').value,
        email: document.getElementById('referralEmail').value,
        topic: 'referral-program',
        offer: 'Referral program interest',
        message: `Role: ${document.getElementById('referralRole').value}\n${document.getElementById('referralMessage').value}`,
        source: '/refer-friends.html'
      });

      if (!result.ok) {
        notice.className = 'notice warn';
        notice.textContent = 'Please complete your name and email before requesting referral access.';
        return;
      }

      form.reset();
      notice.className = 'notice success';
      notice.textContent = result.synced
        ? 'Referral-program interest captured and synced to SmartSwing support.'
        : `Referral-program interest saved locally at ${new Date(result.savedAt).toLocaleString()}.`;
    });
  </script>

<!DOCTYPE html>

  <meta name="robots" content="index,follow">
  <link rel="canonical" href="https://www.smartswingai.com/refund-policy.html">
  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">

  <main class="page">
    <header class="topbar">
      <a class="brand" href="./index.html">Smart<span>Swing</span> AI</a>
      <nav class="nav">
        <a class="btn" href="./pricing.html">Pricing</a>
        <a class="btn" href="./privacy-policy.html">Privacy Policy</a>
        <a class="btn" href="./user-agreement.html">User Agreement</a>
        <a class="btn-primary" href="./contact.html">Contact Support</a>
      </nav>
    </header>

    <section class="hero">
      <article class="panel">
        <div class="eyebrow">Refund Policy</div>
        <h1>Billing should be understandable before there is a problem.</h1>
        <p>This Refund Policy explains how SmartSwing AI handles subscription refunds, duplicate charges, billing errors, and cancellation timing. It applies to purchases made directly through SmartSwing AI checkout flows unless a different written agreement applies.</p>
      </article>
      <article class="panel">
        <h2>Summary</h2>
        <ul class="hero-list">
          <li>Monthly and yearly subscriptions can be canceled to stop future renewal charges.</li>
          <li>Unless required by law, past billing periods are generally non-refundable once access has been provided.</li>
          <li>Duplicate charges, billing mistakes, or technical checkout errors should be reported promptly for review.</li>
          <li>Approved exceptions may be handled case by case where fairness, local law, or technical failure supports a refund.</li>
        </ul>
      </article>
    </section>

    <section class="content-grid">

====================================================================================================
FILE: serve.ps1
CATEGORY: script
====================================================================================================
param(
  [int]$Port = 8000
)

$listener = [System.Net.Sockets.TcpListener]::new([System.Net.IPAddress]::Loopback, $Port)
$listener.Start()
$workspaceRoot = Split-Path $PSScriptRoot -Parent

Write-Host "SmartSwing AI serving at http://127.0.0.1:$Port/"

$contentTypes = @{
  '.html' = 'text/html; charset=utf-8'
  '.js' = 'application/javascript; charset=utf-8'
  '.json' = 'application/json; charset=utf-8'
  '.css' = 'text/css; charset=utf-8'
  '.png' = 'image/png'
  '.jpg' = 'image/jpeg'
  '.jpeg' = 'image/jpeg'
  '.svg' = 'image/svg+xml'
  '.ico' = 'image/x-icon'
}

function Send-Response {
  param(
    [System.Net.Sockets.NetworkStream]$Stream,
    [int]$StatusCode,
    [string]$StatusText,
    [byte[]]$Body,
    [string]$ContentType
  )

  $headers = @(
    "HTTP/1.1 $StatusCode $StatusText"
    "Content-Type: $ContentType"
    "Content-Length: $($Body.Length)"
    "Connection: close"
    ""
    ""
  ) -join "`r`n"

  $headerBytes = [System.Text.Encoding]::ASCII.GetBytes($headers)
  $Stream.Write($headerBytes, 0, $headerBytes.Length)
  $Stream.Write($Body, 0, $Body.Length)
  $Stream.Flush()
}

try {
  while ($true) {
    $client = $listener.AcceptTcpClient()
    try {
      $stream = $client.GetStream()
      $reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader($stream, [System.Text.Encoding]::ASCII, $false, 1024, $true)
      $requestLine = $reader.ReadLine()
      if ([string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($requestLine)) {
        $client.Close()
        continue
      }

      while ($reader.ReadLine()) { }

      $parts = $requestLine.Split(' ')
      $rawPath = if ($parts.Length -ge 2) { $parts[1] } else { '/' }
      $relativePath = [System.Uri]::UnescapeDataString($rawPath.Split('?')[0]).TrimStart('/')
      if ([string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($relativePath)) {
        $relativePath = 'index.html'
      }

      $relativeFsPath = $relativePath -replace '/', '\'
      $localPath = Join-Path $PSScriptRoot $relativeFsPath
      if ((-not (Test-Path $localPath)) -or (Get-Item $localPath).PSIsContainer) {
        $localPath = Join-Path $workspaceRoot $relativeFsPath
      }

      if ((Test-Path $localPath) -and -not (Get-Item $localPath).PSIsContainer) {
        $extension = [System.IO.Path]::GetExtension($localPath).ToLowerInvariant()
        $contentType = if ($contentTypes.ContainsKey($extension)) { $contentTypes[$extension] } else { 'application/octet-stream' }
        $body = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes($localPath)
        Send-Response -Stream $stream -StatusCode 200 -StatusText 'OK' -Body $body -ContentType $contentType
      } else {
        $body = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes('Not found')
        Send-Response -Stream $stream -StatusCode 404 -StatusText 'Not Found' -Body $body -ContentType 'text/plain; charset=utf-8'
      }
    } finally {
      $client.Close()
    }
  }
}
finally {
  $listener.Stop()
}

  <script src="./public-app-config.js"></script>
  <script src="/api/runtime-config.js"></script>
  <script src="./app-data.js"></script>
  <script src="./pwa.js"></script>
  <script>
    const store = window.SmartSwingStore;
    const user = store.getCurrentUser();

    if (!user) {
      window.location.href = './login.html?message=' + encodeURIComponent('Sign in to edit your settings.') + '&type=error';
    }

    const access = store.getAccessContext(user?.id);
    const alertBox = document.getElementById('alertBox');
    const avatarPreview = document.getElementById('avatarPreview');
    const roleLabel = user.role === 'coach' ? 'Coach' : (user.role === 'manager' ? 'Manager' : 'Player');
    document.getElementById('dashboardLink').href = user.role === 'coach' ? './coach-dashboard.html' : './dashboard.html';
    document.getElementById('userRole').value = roleLabel;

    (function renderBilling() {
      const plan = store.getCurrentPlan(user.id);
      const planPrice = store.getPlanPrice(plan.id, plan.billingInterval);
      document.getElementById('billingPlanName').textContent = plan.name;
      document.getElementById('billingPlanMeta').textContent = plan.id === 'free'
        ? 'No paid subscription is active.'
        : `${plan.billingInterval === 'yearly' ? 'Yearly billing' : 'Monthly billing'} | ${plan.billingInterval === 'yearly' ? `$${planPrice.amount.toFixed(2)}/year` : `$${planPrice.amount.toFixed(2)}/month`}`;
      document.getElementById('billingStatus').textContent = plan.subscriptionStatus || 'free';
      document.getElementById('billingStatusMeta').textContent = plan.subscriptionCancelAtPeriodEnd
        ? `Cancellation scheduled${plan.billingPeriodEnd ? ` | access ends ${new Date(plan.billingPeriodEnd).toLocaleDateString()}` : ''}`
        : (plan.billingPeriodEnd ? `Renews through ${new Date(plan.billingPeriodEnd).toLocaleDateString()}` : 'Upgrade anytime from pricing.');
      document.getElementById('billingPortalBtn').disabled = !access.canManageBilling || plan.id === 'free';
    })();

    function showAlert(message, type = 'success') {
      alertBox.textContent = message;
      alertBox.className = `alert ${type}`;
    }

    function fillForm(profile) {
      document.getElementById('fullName').value = profile.fullName || '';
      document.getElementById('email').value = profile.email || '';
      document.getElementById('phone').value = profile.phone || '';
      document.getElementById('ageRange').value = profile.ageRange || '';
      document.getElementById('gender').value = profile.gender || '';
      document.getElementById('ustaLevel').value = profile.ustaLevel || '';
      document.getElementById('utrRating').value = profile.utrRating || '';
      document.getElementById('preferredHand').value = profile.preferredHand || 'right';
      document.getElementById('addressLine1').value = profile.addressLine1 || '';
      document.getElementById('addressLine2').value = profile.addressLine2 || '';
      document.getElementById('city').value = profile.city || '';
      document.getElementById('stateRegion').value = profile.stateRegion || '';
      document.getElementById('postalCode').value = profile.postalCode || '';
      document.getElementById('country').value = profile.country || '';
      avatarPreview.textContent = (profile.fullName || 'Player').charAt(0).toUpperCase();
      avatarPreview.style.backgroundImage = '';
      if (profile.avatarDataUrl) {
        avatarPreview.style.backgroundImage = `url(${profile.avatarDataUrl})`;
        avatarPreview.textContent = '';
        avatarPreview.dataset.image = profile.avatarDataUrl;
      }
    }

    fillForm(user);

    document.getElementById('avatarInput').addEventListener('change', (event) => {
      const file = event.target.files?.[0];
      if (!file) return;
      const reader = new FileReader();
      reader.onload = () => {
        avatarPreview.style.backgroundImage = `url(${reader.result})`;
        avatarPreview.textContent = '';
        avatarPreview.dataset.image = reader.result;
      };
      reader.readAsDataURL(file);
    });

    document.getElementById('saveBtn').addEventListener('click', async () => {
      const button = document.getElementById('saveBtn');
      button.disabled = true;
      button.textContent = 'Saving...';
      try {
        await store.updateProfile({
          fullName: document.getElementById('fullName').value,
          phone: document.getElementById('phone').value,
          ageRange: document.getElementById('ageRange').value,
          gender: document.getElementById('gender').value,
          ustaLevel: document.getElementById('ustaLevel').value,
          utrRating: document.getElementById('utrRating').value,
          preferredHand: document.getElementById('preferredHand').value,
          addressLine1: document.getElementById('addressLine1').value,
          addressLine2: document.getElementById('addressLine2').value,
          city: document.getElementById('city').value,
          stateRegion: document.getElementById('stateRegion').value,
          postalCode: document.getElementById('postalCode').value,
          country: document.getElementById('country').value,
          avatarDataUrl: avatarPreview.dataset.image || user.avatarDataUrl || ''
        });
        if (store.syncNow) {
          await store.syncNow().catch(() => {});
        }
        showAlert('Profile saved. Your dashboards will use the updated identity immediately.', 'success');
      } catch (error) {
        showAlert(error.message || 'Unable to save profile changes.', 'error');
      } finally {
        button.disabled = false;
        button.textContent = 'Save profile changes';
      }
    });

    document.getElementById('signOutBtn').addEventListener('click', () => {
      store.signOut();
      window.location.href = './index.html';
    });

    document.getElementById('billingPortalBtn').addEventListener('click', async () => {
      const button = document.getElementById('billingPortalBtn');
      if (button.disabled) return;
      button.disabled = true;
      button.textContent = 'Opening billing...';
      try {
        const session = await store.createStripeBillingPortal('./settings.html');
        window.location.href = session.url;
      } catch (error) {
        showAlert(error.message || 'Unable to open the billing portal.', 'error');
        button.disabled = false;
        button.textContent = 'Manage billing';
      }
    });
  </script>
</body>
</html>


====================================================================================================
FILE: signup.html
CATEGORY: page
====================================================================================================
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">

  <style>

  <div class="shell">
    <a class="logo" href="./index.html">SmartSwing AI</a>
    <div class="card">
      <h1>Create Account</h1>
      <p class="subtext">Set up your player or coach profile, save analyses, compare sessions over time, and schedule targeted training.</p>
      <p class="subtext" id="planHint" style="margin-top:-12px; margin-bottom: 18px;">Default plan: Free (1 monthly report).</p>

      <div class="mode-switch">
        <a data-preserve-intent href="./login.html">Sign in</a>
        <a class="active" href="./signup.html">Create account</a>
      </div>

      <div id="alertBox" class="alert" role="status" aria-live="polite"></div>

      <div class="oauth-grid">
        <button class="oauth-btn social-btn" data-oauth-provider="google" type="button" onclick="loginWithProvider('google')">Google</button>
        <button class="oauth-btn social-btn" data-oauth-provider="facebook" type="button" onclick="loginWithProvider('facebook')">Meta</button>
        <button class="oauth-btn social-btn" data-oauth-provider="apple" type="button" onclick="loginWithProvider('apple')">Apple</button>
      </div>

      <div id="authStatus" class="alert" role="status" aria-live="polite"></div>

      <div class="role-grid">
        <button class="role-card selected" data-role="player" type="button" aria-pressed="true" onclick="selectRole('player')">
          <div class="role-title">Player</div>
          <div class="role-copy">Track technique scores, drills, and progress from session to session.</div>
        </button>
        <button class="role-card" data-role="coach" type="button" aria-pressed="false" onclick="selectRole('coach')">
          <div class="role-title">Coach</div>
          <div class="role-copy">Review athlete assessments and manage training sessions from one dashboard.</div>
        </button>
      </div>

      <form autocomplete="on" onsubmit="handleSignup(event)">
        <input id="userRole" name="userRole" type="hidden" value="player">
        <input id="planId" name="planId" type="hidden" value="free">
        <input id="startTrial" name="startTrial" type="hidden" value="0">
        <input id="billingInterval" name="billingInterval" type="hidden" value="monthly">

        <div class="field">
          <label for="avatarInput">Profile picture</label>
          <div class="avatar-preview" id="avatarPreview">P</div>
          <input id="avatarInput" name="avatar" type="file" accept="image/*">
        </div>

        <div class="two-col">
          <div class="field">
            <label for="fullName">Full name</label>
          <input id="fullName" name="fullName" type="text" autocomplete="name" required>
          </div>
          <div class="field">
            <label for="email">Email</label>
            <input id="email" name="email" type="email" inputmode="email" spellcheck="false" autocomplete="email username" required>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="two-col">
          <div class="field">
            <label for="phone">Phone</label>
            <input id="phone" name="phone" type="tel" inputmode="tel" autocomplete="tel" placeholder="(555) 555-5555">
          </div>
          <div class="field">
            <label for="addressLine1">Address line 1</label>
            <input id="addressLine1" name="addressLine1" type="text" autocomplete="address-line1" placeholder="Street address">
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="two-col">
          <div class="field">
            <label for="addressLine2">Address line 2</label>
            <input id="addressLine2" name="addressLine2" type="text" autocomplete="address-line2" placeholder="Apartment, suite, unit">
          </div>
          <div class="field">
            <label for="city">City</label>
            <input id="city" name="city" type="text" autocomplete="address-level2" placeholder="City">

          </div>
          <div class="field">
            <label for="postalCode">Postal code</label>
            <input id="postalCode" name="postalCode" type="text" inputmode="numeric" autocomplete="postal-code" placeholder="ZIP / postal code">
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="field">
          <label for="country">Country</label>
          <input id="country" name="country" type="text" autocomplete="country-name" placeholder="Country">
        </div>

        <div class="two-col">
          <div class="field">
            <label for="password">Password</label>

          </div>
          <div class="field">
            <label for="confirmPassword">Confirm password</label>
            <input id="confirmPassword" name="confirmPassword" type="password" autocomplete="new-password" minlength="6" required>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="two-col">
          <div class="field">
            <label for="ageRange">Age range</label>
            <select id="ageRange" name="ageRange">
              <option value="">Select</option>
              <option>Under 12</option>
              <option>12-17</option>
              <option>18-25</option>
              <option>26-40</option>
              <option>41+</option>
            </select>
          </div>
          <div class="field">
            <label for="gender">Gender</label>
            <select id="gender" name="gender">
              <option value="">Select</option>
              <option>Male</option>

            </select>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="two-col">

            <label for="ustaLevel">USTA / NTRP level</label>
            <input id="ustaLevel" name="ustaLevel" type="text" placeholder="e.g. 4.0">
          </div>
          <div class="field">
            <label for="utrRating">UTR rating</label>
            <input id="utrRating" name="utrRating" type="text" placeholder="e.g. 6.5">
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="field">
          <label for="preferredHand">Preferred hand</label>
          <select id="preferredHand" name="preferredHand">
            <option value="right">Right-handed</option>
            <option value="left">Left-handed</option>
          </select>
        </div>

        <div id="submitFeedback" class="alert" role="status" aria-live="polite"></div>
        <button id="signupBtn" class="btn" type="submit">Create Account</button>
      </form>

      <div class="links">
        Already have an account? <a href="./login.html">Sign in</a>
      </div>
      <div class="links" style="margin-top:10px">
        By creating an account, you agree to the <a href="./user-agreement.html">User Agreement</a> and <a href="./privacy-policy.html">Privacy Policy</a>.
      </div>
    </div>
    <a class="back-link" href="./index.html">Back to homepage</a>
  </div>

  <script src="./public-app-config.js"></script>
  <script src="/api/runtime-config.js"></script>
  <script src="./app-data.js"></script>
  <script src="./site-experience.js"></script>
  <script src="./pwa.js"></script>
  <script>
    const store = window.SmartSwingStore;
    const ALLOWED_PLANS = new Set(['free', 'starter', 'pro', 'elite']);

    async function initOAuthButtons() {
      const authConfig = window.SMARTSWING_AUTH_CONFIG || {};
      const results = await Promise.all(Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('[data-oauth-provider]')).map(async (button) => {
        const provider = button.dataset.oauthProvider;
        const envEnabled = provider === 'google'
          ? authConfig.googleEnabled
          : provider === 'apple'
            ? authConfig.appleEnabled
            : authConfig.facebookEnabled;
        if (!envEnabled) {
          button.disabled = true;
          button.title = `${provider} sign-in is not enabled yet.`;
          button.style.opacity = '0.55';
          button.style.cursor = 'not-allowed';
          return { provider, enabled: false, reason: `${provider} sign-in is not enabled yet.` };
        }
        if (!store.isSupabaseConfigured || !store.isSupabaseConfigured() || !store.getOAuthProviderAvailability) {
          return { provider, enabled: true, reason: '' };
        }
        const availability = await store.getOAuthProviderAvailability(provider);
        if (availability.available) {
          button.disabled = false;
          button.title = '';
          button.style.opacity = '';
          button.style.cursor = '';
          return { provider, enabled: true, reason: '' };
        }
        button.disabled = true;
        button.title = availability.reason || `${provider} sign-in is unavailable right now.`;
        button.style.opacity = '0.55';
        button.style.cursor = 'not-allowed';
        return { provider, enabled: false, reason: button.title };
      }));
      return results;
    }

    function showAlert(message, type = 'error') {
      ['alertBox', 'submitFeedback'].forEach((id) => {
        const element = document.getElementById(id);
        if (!element) return;
        element.textContent = message;
        element.className = `alert alert-${type}`;
        element.style.display = 'block';
      });
    }

    function hideAlert(id) {
      const element = document.getElementById(id);
      if (!element) return;
      element.textContent = '';
      element.className = 'alert';
      element.style.display = 'none';
    }

    function showAuthStatus(message, type = 'info') {
      const authStatus = document.getElementById('authStatus');
      authStatus.textContent = message;
      authStatus.className = `alert alert-${type}`;
      authStatus.style.display = 'block';
    }

    function clearTransientAlerts() {
      hideAlert('alertBox');
      hideAlert('submitFeedback');
    }

    function setSignupAvailability(enabled, message = '') {
      const signupBtn = document.getElementById('signupBtn');
      signupBtn.disabled = !enabled;
      signupBtn.dataset.locked = enabled ? '0' : '1';
      signupBtn.title = enabled ? '' : message;
    }

    function selectRole(role) {
      document.getElementById('userRole').value = role;
      document.querySelectorAll('.role-card').forEach((card) => {
        card.classList.toggle('selected', card.dataset.role === role);
        card.setAttribute('aria-pressed', card.dataset.role === role ? 'true' : 'false');
      });
    }

    async function loginWithProvider(provider) {
      try {
        await store.signInWithOAuthProvider(provider);
      } catch (error) {
        showAlert(error.message || `${provider} sign-in failed.`);
      }
    }

    async function handleSignup(event) {
      event.preventDefault();
      const signupBtn = document.getElementById('signupBtn');
      clearTransientAlerts();

      if (signupBtn.dataset.locked === '1') {
        showAlert(signupBtn.title || 'Account creation is currently unavailable on this deployment.');
        return;
      }

      const password = document.getElementById('password').value;
      const confirmPassword = document.getElementById('confirmPassword').value;

      if (password !== confirmPassword) {
        showAlert('Passwords do not match.');
        return;
      }

      signupBtn.disabled = true;
      signupBtn.textContent = 'Creating account...';

      try {
        const result = await store.signUp({
          fullName: document.getElementById('fullName').value,
          email: document.getElementById('email').value,
          password,
          planId: document.getElementById('planId').value,
          billingInterval: document.getElementById('billingInterval').value,
          startTrial: document.getElementById('startTrial').value === '1',
          ageRange: document.getElementById('ageRange').value,
          gender: document.getElementById('gender').value,
          ustaLevel: document.getElementById('ustaLevel').value,
          utrRating: document.getElementById('utrRating').value,
          preferredHand: document.getElementById('preferredHand').value,
          userRole: document.getElementById('userRole').value,
          phone: document.getElementById('phone').value,
          addressLine1: document.getElementById('addressLine1').value,
          addressLine2: document.getElementById('addressLine2').value,
          city: document.getElementById('city').value,
          stateRegion: document.getElementById('stateRegion').value,
          postalCode: document.getElementById('postalCode').value,
          country: document.getElementById('country').value,
          avatarDataUrl: document.getElementById('avatarPreview').dataset.image || ''
        });

        if (result?.requiresEmailConfirmation) {
          showAlert('Account created. Check your email and confirm your address before signing in.', 'success');
          setTimeout(() => {
            window.location.href = './login.html?type=success&message=' + encodeURIComponent('Email confirmation sent. Confirm your inbox and then sign in.');
          }, 900);
          return;
        }

        showAlert('Account created. Redirecting to your cart...', 'success');
        setTimeout(() => {
          window.location.href = getPostSignupDestination(result);
        }, 700);
      } catch (error) {
        showAlert(error.message || 'Signup failed.');
        signupBtn.disabled = false;
        signupBtn.textContent = 'Create Account';
      }
    }

    function getDesiredCheckoutIntent() {
      const params = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);
      const requestedPlan = String(params.get('plan') || '').toLowerCase();
      if (ALLOWED_PLANS.has(requestedPlan)) {
        return {
          planId: requestedPlan,
          billingInterval: params.get('interval') || 'monthly'
        };
      }
      return store.getCheckoutIntent ? store.getCheckoutIntent() : null;
    }

    function syncIntentLinks() {
      const intent = getDesiredCheckoutIntent();
      if (!intent?.planId) return;
      document.querySelectorAll('[data-preserve-intent]').forEach((link) => {
        const url = new URL(link.getAttribute('href'), window.location.href);
        url.searchParams.set('plan', intent.planId);
        if (intent.planId !== 'free') {
          url.searchParams.set('interval', intent.billingInterval || 'monthly');
        }
        link.setAttribute('href', `${url.pathname.split('/').pop()}${url.search}`);
      });
    }

    function getPostSignupDestination(user) {
      const intent = getDesiredCheckoutIntent();
      if (intent?.planId) {
        store.setCheckoutIntent({
          planId: intent.planId,
          billingInterval: intent.billingInterval || 'monthly',
          source: 'signup-page'
        });
        const destination = store.getCheckoutIntentDestination ? store.getCheckoutIntentDestination(intent) : '';
        if (destination) return destination;
      }
      return store.getPostAuthDestinationForUser(user || store.getCurrentUser());
    }

    (function initPlanSelection() {
      const params = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);
      const requested = String(params.get('plan') || '').toLowerCase();
      const billingInterval = ['monthly', 'yearly', 'annual'].includes(String(params.get('interval') || '').toLowerCase())
        ? String(params.get('interval')).toLowerCase().replace('annual', 'yearly')
        : 'monthly';
      const wantsTrial = params.get('trial') === '1';
      const allowed = ALLOWED_PLANS;
      if (allowed.has(requested)) {
        store.setCheckoutIntent({
          planId: requested,
          billingInterval,
          source: 'signup-page'
        });
      }
      document.getElementById('billingInterval').value = billingInterval;
      if (!allowed.has(requested)) {
        document.getElementById('planHint').textContent = 'Default plan: Free (1 monthly report). Browser autofill can help complete your name, phone, and address when available.';
        syncIntentLinks();
        return;
      }
      document.getElementById('planId').value = requested;
      document.getElementById('startTrial').value = wantsTrial ? '1' : '0';
      const labels = {
        free: 'Free (1 monthly report, no save/export)',
        starter: 'Player ($9.99/mo, 10 monthly reports)',
        pro: 'Performance ($19.99/mo, unlimited + drills/tactics library)',
        elite: 'Tournament Pro ($49.99/mo, unlimited + coach feedback workflow)'
      };
      const intervalLabel = billingInterval === 'yearly' && requested !== 'free'
        ? ' | Billing: yearly (15% off, cancel anytime at period end).'
        : requested !== 'free'
          ? ' | Billing: monthly, cancel anytime.'
          : '';
      document.getElementById('planHint').textContent = wantsTrial && requested !== 'free'
        ? `Selected plan: ${labels[requested]} | 14-day trial starts after account creation.${intervalLabel}`
        : `Selected plan: ${labels[requested]}${intervalLabel}`;
      syncIntentLinks();
    })();

    async function bootstrapAuth() {
      const currentUser = store.getCurrentUser();
      if (currentUser) {
        window.location.href = getPostSignupDestination(currentUser);
        return;
      }

      let oauthStatuses = [];
      if (store.isSupabaseConfigured()) {
        oauthStatuses = await initOAuthButtons();
        try {
          const restored = await store.restoreSupabaseSession();
          if (restored) {
            window.location.href = getPostSignupDestination(restored);
            return;
          }
        } catch (error) {
          showAlert(error.message || 'Unable to restore an existing session.');
        }
        const enabledProviders = oauthStatuses.filter((entry) => entry.enabled);
        if (!enabledProviders.length) {
          showAuthStatus('Social sign-up is unavailable because the Supabase OAuth providers are not enabled yet. Email signup still works.', 'info');
        }
      } else {
        const authAvailability = store.getAuthAvailability ? store.getAuthAvailability() : {
          supabaseConfigured: false,
          localDataMode: false,
          emailPasswordAvailable: false
        };
        document.querySelectorAll('.social-btn').forEach((button) => {
          button.disabled = true;
          button.style.opacity = '0.55';
          button.style.cursor = 'not-allowed';
        });
        if (authAvailability.emailPasswordAvailable) {
          setSignupAvailability(true);
          showAuthStatus('Social sign-up is disabled in this preview because the Supabase public configuration is missing. Email signup still works locally.', 'info');
        } else {
          const message = 'Live account creation is unavailable on this deployment until the Supabase public URL and anon key are published.';
          setSignupAvailability(false, message);
          showAuthStatus(`${message} Social sign-in is also disabled.`, 'error');
        }
      }
    }

    document.getElementById('avatarInput').addEventListener('change', (event) => {
      const file = event.target.files?.[0];
      if (!file) return;
      const reader = new FileReader();
      reader.onload = () => {
        const preview = document.getElementById('avatarPreview');
        preview.style.backgroundImage = `url(${reader.result})`;
        preview.textContent = '';
        preview.dataset.image = reader.result;
      };
      reader.readAsDataURL(file);
    });

    bootstrapAuth();
  </script>
</body>
</html>


====================================================================================================
FILE: site-experience.js
CATEGORY: script
====================================================================================================
(function () {
  const COOKIE_KEY = 'smartswing_cookie_preferences_v1';

  function initPlanSelection() {
    const store = window.SmartSwingStore;
    document.querySelectorAll('[data-plan-select]').forEach((link) => {
      link.addEventListener('click', (event) => {
        const planId = String(link.dataset.planSelect || '').toLowerCase();
        if (!planId) return;
        const billingInterval = link.dataset.billingInterval || 'monthly';
        if (store?.setCheckoutIntent) {
          store.setCheckoutIntent({
            planId,
            billingInterval,
            source: window.location.pathname || ''
          });
        }
        const destination = store?.getCurrentUser?.() && store?.getCheckoutIntentDestination
          ? store.getCheckoutIntentDestination()
          : link.getAttribute('href');
        if (!destination) return;
        event.preventDefault();
        window.location.href = destination;
      });
    });
  }

  function saveCookiePreferences(preferences) {
    const payload = {
      necessary: true,
      analytics: Boolean(preferences.analytics),
      personalization: Boolean(preferences.personalization),
      marketing: Boolean(preferences.marketing),
      savedAt: new Date().toISOString()
    };
    localStorage.setItem(COOKIE_KEY, JSON.stringify(payload));
    window.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('smartswing:cookies-updated', { detail: payload }));
  }

  function initCookieBanner() {
    const banner = document.querySelector('[data-cookie-banner]');
    if (!banner) return;
    if (localStorage.getItem(COOKIE_KEY)) {
      banner.hidden = true;
      return;
    }

    banner.hidden = false;
    const acceptBtn = banner.querySelector('[data-cookie-action="accept"]');
    const essentialBtn = banner.querySelector('[data-cookie-action="essential"]');

    if (acceptBtn) {
      acceptBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
        saveCookiePreferences({ analytics: true, personalization: true, marketing: true });
        banner.hidden = true;
      });
    }

    if (essentialBtn) {
      essentialBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
        saveCookiePreferences({ analytics: false, personalization: false, marketing: false });
        banner.hidden = true;
      });
    }
  }

  function preservePlanIntentLinks() {
    const store = window.SmartSwingStore;
    const intent = store?.getCheckoutIntent?.();
    if (!intent?.planId) return;
    document.querySelectorAll('[data-preserve-intent]').forEach((link) => {
      const url = new URL(link.getAttribute('href'), window.location.href);
      url.searchParams.set('plan', intent.planId);
      if (intent.planId !== 'free') {
        url.searchParams.set('interval', intent.billingInterval || 'monthly');
      }
      link.setAttribute('href', `${url.pathname.split('/').pop()}${url.search}`);
    });
  }

  function init() {
    initPlanSelection();
    initCookieBanner();
    preservePlanIntentLinks();
  }

  if (document.readyState === 'loading') {
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', init);
  } else {
    init();
  }
})();

FILE: smartswing-database.sql
